Name: Walgreens
Description: Founded in 1901, Walgreens (www.walgreens.com) has a storied heritage of caring for communities for generations and proudly serves nearly 9 million customers and patients each day across its approximately 8,500 stores throughout the U.S. and Puerto Rico, and leading omni-channel platforms. Walgreens has approximately 220,000 team members, including nearly 90,000 healthcare service providers, and is committed to being the first choice for retail pharmacy and health services, building trusted relationships that create healthier futures for customers, patients, team members and communities.

Name: Farmatodo
Description: FARMATODO es la cadena pionera en la implantación y desarrollo del concepto de farmacias autoservicio de Venezuela. Es una empresa 100% venezolana dedicada a la comercialización directa de medicinas, artículos de cuidado personal, uso diario en el hogar, belleza y comestibles.

Name: CVS Pharmacy
Description:
CVS Pharmacy is America’s leading retail pharmacy with more than 9,600 locations nationwide. For more than 50 years, CVS Pharmacy has offered customers the products and services they need to stay on their path to better health. In addition to our pharmacies, our stores feature on-trend beauty departments, photo labs and general merchandise.


About CVS Health 
CVS Health is the leading health solutions company, delivering care like no one else can. We reach more people and improve the health of communities across America through our local presence, digital channels and over 300,000 dedicated colleagues – including more than 40,000 physicians, pharmacists, nurses and nurse practitioners. 

Wherever and whenever people need us, we help them with their health – whether that’s managing chronic diseases, staying compliant with their medications or accessing affordable health and wellness services in the most convenient ways. We help people navigate the health care system – and their personal health care – by improving access, lowering costs and being a trusted partner for every meaningful moment of health. And we do it all with heart, each and every day.  


Please note: We reserve the right to delete any posts that contain personal health information (PHI), personally identifiable information (PII), Sensitive Personal Information (SPI) or are approaching HIPAA violations. We reserve the right to remove comments that are discriminatory, harassing, bullying, threatening, defamatory, or unlawful.

Name: Walgreens Boots Alliance
Description:
Walgreens Boots Alliance (Nasdaq: WBA) is an integrated healthcare, pharmacy and retail leader serving millions of customers and patients every day, with a 170-year heritage of caring for communities.

A trusted, global innovator in retail pharmacy with more than 12,500 locations across the U.S., Europe and Latin America, WBA plays a critical role in the healthcare ecosystem. The company is reimagining local healthcare and well-being for all as part of its purpose – to create more joyful lives through better health. Through dispensing medicines, improving access to a wide range of health services, providing high quality health and beauty products and offering anytime, anywhere convenience across its digital platforms, WBA is shaping the future of healthcare.

WBA employs approximately 330,000 people and has a presence in eight countries through its portfolio of consumer brands: Walgreens, Boots, Duane Reade, the No7 Beauty Company and Benavides in Mexico. Additionally, WBA has a portfolio of healthcare-focused investments located in several countries, including China and the U.S.

The company is proud of its contributions to healthy communities, a healthy planet, an inclusive workplace and a sustainable marketplace. WBA has been recognized for its commitment to being an inclusive workplace. In fiscal 2023, the Company received a score of 100 from the Human Rights Campaign’s Corporate Equality Index, scored 100 percent on the Disability Equality Index for disability inclusion and was named Disability:IN’s 2023 Employer of the Year. In addition, WBA has been recognized for its commitment to operating sustainably as the company is an index component of the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices (DJSI).

Name: Al-Dawaa Medical Services Co.
Description: Al-Dawaa Pharmacies are a chain of pharmacies located in KSA, which follow recognized international standards. The main objective of such pharmacies is to provide the optimal health care services to the Saudi market.

Name: Redcare Pharmacy
Description:
At Redcare Pharmacy, care comes first.

As Europe’s leading online pharmacy – formerly known as Shop Apotheke Europe-, we combine innovative digital services with trusted pharmaceutical expertise to make healthcare more accessible, personal and supportive for millions of people across seven European countries.

Our strengths in e-commerce, retail media and marketplace innovation support us in providing reliable services, seamless access and an outstanding customer journey across Europe. 

With headquarters in Sevenum, the Netherlands, distribution centers in Sevenum and Milan – and soon to be Pilsen -, as well as offices in Cologne, Berlin, Munich, Tongeren, Warsaw, Milan, Lille and Eindhoven, we are an international team of dedicated professionals.

We believe in responsibility, collaboration and growth - and in welcoming colleagues who want to shape the future of online healthcare with us.

Until every human has their health.

Name: Farmacias Central Oeste
Description:
Desde 1963, en Farmacias Central Oeste ayudamos a las personas a vivir plenamente. Siempre orientados en el bienestar, buscamos mejorar la calidad de vida de la comunidad. La confianza de nuestros clientes nos potencia para seguir brindando el mejor nivel de atención y un servicio farmacéutico actualizado. 

Hoy somos una gran familia con cientos de integrantes que suman valor en nuestro proceso de transformación. Con más de 60 años de trayectoria, tenemos 23 farmacias en Zona Oeste y 8 en CABA. Nos impulsan nuestros valores de confianza, cercanía, vocación farmacéutica, colaboración e innovación. 

Desde nuestros inicios, pensamos en las personas que nos rodean. Esta filosofía de vida nos acompañará siempre. Porque estamos #CentradosEnVos

Name: Salcobrand
Description:
Somos una cadena de farmacias en Chile. Con un equipo de más de 6000 colaboradores, a través de todos nuestros puntos de contacto; más de 400 locales en todo el territorio nacional, salcobrand.cl, ventas telefónicas, APP, contribuimos al bienestar de las personas.
Estamos entre las empresas más atractivas para trabajar por nuestra cultura de trabajo, promovemos la colaboración y el trabajo en equipo; impulsamos la innovación y creatividad, fomentamos la inclusión y valoramos la diversidad.
Contamos con distintos programas, unos dirigidos a promover el desarrollo de nuestros colaboradores, también para garantizar una experiencia memorable para nuestros clientes, e incluso un programa con el que apoyamos a la comunidad emprendedora: Open Salcobrand.
Además, tenemos el Centro de Bienestar de Salcobrand, con el que, por más de 12 años, hemos realizado talleres gratuitos para toda la comunidad.
Nuestra cadena es la filial más grande de Empresas SB, holding dedicado a hacer sentir bien a las personas, estén donde estén, entregando lo mejor en salud, belleza y bienestar.

Name: Dr. Max Romania

Suntem dedicați să punem întotdeauna pacienții și clienții în centrul tuturor acțiunilor noastre, ascultând oamenii și oferindu-le ce își doresc. Fie că vorbim despre sfaturi de specialitate, servicii personalizate, branduri proprii, experiența omnichannel sau programe de loialitate, ne dorim să fim mai mult decât o companie farmaceutică, ci un partener de încredere în sănătate.

Name: Pharmacie
Description:
PHARMACIE , SCIENCES PHARMACEUTIQUES ET BIOLOGIQUES. 
La pharmacie (du grec φάρμακον/pharmakôn signifiant à la fois le remède et le poison) est la science s'intéressant à la conception, au mode d'action, à la préparation et à la dispensation des médicaments.
Cette dispensation prend en compte les interactions médicamenteuses possibles entre les molécules chimiques ou bien encore, les interactions avec des produits comestibles.
Elle permet également la vérification des doses et/ou d'éventuelles contre-indications. C'est à la fois une branche de la biologie, de la chimie et de la médecine.

Name: Wellness Forever Medicare Limited
Description:
Wellness Forever is India’s third-largest retail pharmacy and wellness products chain in terms of revenue. Operating a large omnichannel and hyperlocal retail network of 24x7 stores, the brand focuses on providing customers with a diverse range of pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, lifestyle and wellness products.
Our present catalogue boasts over 1,00,000+ products, including curative & preventive products.

Founded in 2008 as a single store, Wellness Forever now operates over 430+ stores across Maharashtra, Goa, Karnataka and Madhya Pradesh, giving it a leading market position in western India in terms of revenue.

The Wellness Forever brand is committed to product safety and earning consumer trust above all else. Our one lakh square feet ZEDC (Zero Error Distribution Center) facility in Bhiwandi, on the outskirts of Mumbai, ensures 100% accuracy in stocking, storing, maintaining cold chain & updating the latest products & medicines.

Mentored & backed by reputed business leaders from corporations such as the Allana Group, Patni Group, Poonawalla Group & Thakral Corporation, Wellness Forever ultimately aims to be India’s most respected chain of pharmacy & wellness stores.

Name: PT K-24 INDONESIA OFFICIAL

Apotek K-24 merupakan retail apotek yang dengan konsep bisnis Komplit 24 Jam, 100% Obat Asli, Harga sama pagi/siang/malam/hari libur, Konsultasi Gratis, dan layanan online.

Selain Apotek K-24, PT K-24 Indonesia juga terafiliasi dengan PT Ka Dua Empat (PBF), PT K24Klik (PSEF),  PT Odixa Pharma Laboratories, Medi-Call, SMK Kesehatan Pelita Bangsa Bantul, Fakultas Farmasi UKRIM, dan PT HI-Lab International.

Bergabung dengan PT K-24 Indonesia tidak hanya bermanfaat untuk pengembangan diri, tetapi juga turut andil dalam menyehatkan masyarakat Indonesia.

Mari bergabung bersama PT K-24 Indonesia di https://recruitment.apotek-k24.com/ atau follow akun sosial media kami

Name: pharmaSuisse - Schweizerischer Apothekerverband
Description: Der Schweizerische Apothekerverband pharmaSuisse ist die Dachorganisation der Apothekerinnen und Apotheker. Der Verband vertritt ihre Interessen und beteiligt sich unter diesem Blickwinkel aktiv an politischen und gesetzgebenden Verfahren. pharmaSuisse unterstützt seine Mitglieder dabei, die Bevölkerung bei Gesundheitsfragen optimal zu beraten und begleiten. Dazu erarbeitet der Verband wirkungsvolle Präventionsmassnahmen und entwickelt zukunftsweisende Dienstleistungen für die medizinische Grundversorgung. Alles mit dem Ziel, das hohe Vertrauen der Bevölkerung in die Apotheken weiter zu stärken. Der Schweizerische Apothekerverband pharmaSuisse besteht seit 1843 und ist somit der älteste Dachverband der Schweiz.

Name: McCabes Pharmacy
Description:
What does it mean to work at McCabes Pharmacy?

It means, that as a member of our team that we care about you, your welfare, your aspirations, your ambitions, your health and Wellbeing, your safety, your extended family and the people who support you in your job. It means that you’ll be treated fairly and justly and with respect.

Working for McCabes Pharmacy means that you care about other people especially those that are not in the full of their health, you want to make a difference to the lives of your patients and their carers, you want to help others, find easier ways to do things for the patient, remember their name and the interesting details of their lives. You’re interested in other people and in serving other people.

Working for McCabes Pharmacy means that you like contributing to a team, helping colleagues and having fun. You respect the different styles of working that different people have and you’re willing to work with others for to assist your customer and drive the profitability of your pharmacy branch.

Working for McCabes Pharmacy means that you’re a consummate professional. Always trying your hardest, keeping your standards and expecting good habits from yourself and those around you. You expect everyone to put in the effort in their work that you do. You want to be part of a team that is commercially very successful, that maintains the best pharmacy standards, finds the most interesting products to sell, introduces the most innovative services and delivers the kindest, most compassionate care in Ireland, that’s why you choose to work at McCabes Pharmacy. You care about the company that you choose to work in.

Sharen McCabe.

For more information about McCabes Pharmacy please visit our website:  http://mccabespharmacy.com/

Name: Farmácias Vale Verde
Description:
A Vale Verde é a maior rede de Farmácias do Norte do Paraná, com 27 lojas e um laboratório de Manipulação. Nós estamos constantemente reinvestindo no crescimento e aperfeiçoamento das suas operações, com foco na ética, qualidade de atendimento e ofertas de produto e, acima de tudo, no compromisso genuíno pelo cliente.

A história da Farmácias Vale Verde começa em 1974, com a inauguração da Farmácia Augusto, localizada na Av. 10 de dezembro, em Londrina (PR), de propriedade do empresário Rubens Augusto. Uma farmácia pequena, voltada para atender as necessidades da população do bairro, carente de atendimento de saúde. Era uma administração simples, caracterizada pela garra e determinação, com foco no atendimento personalizado e muito próximo dos clientes. Em 1985, uma nova fase se inicia. A esposa, D. Mirian Augusto começa a participar da administração. Inauguram a primeira loja com o nome Vale Verde, na Av. Juscelino Kubitschek, em frente ao vale Verde em Londrina. 

Moderna, atualizada e inovadora, com mix diferenciado na perfumaria e o atendimento personalizado. Surge, então, a marca Vale Verde.

Name: Amcal Pharmacy
Description:
From our beginnings in the 1930’s as Allied Master Chemists of Australia Limited (A.M.C.A.L.), we have grown to become one of the most widely recognised pharmacies, and we’re part of the largest network of pharmacies in Australia.
Amcal pharmacy puts professional healthcare within reach of every Australian. From prescription care to heart health support, health tests to pain relief, Amcal’s growing range of comprehensive health services are redefining pharmacy care; making expert health advice and support more available, affordable and accessible to those in need.

Amcal is an integral part of local communities in every state and territory, delivering a customer-focused healthcare experience based on advice and information to improve health and wellbeing outcomes. We are committed to providing friendly service, value-for-money and, most importantly, expert advice.

Safety Reporting & Medical Enquiries:
To report adverse events, side effects and medical enquiries, please call 1800 331 792 or email us at medicalenquiry@sigmahealthcare.com.au

Please include details about the product, the adverse event or side effect and your contact details.  Please do not provide information about another individual unless you have their express consent to do so.

Please note all personal and health information will be dealt with in accordance with our privacy policy which is available at  www.sigmahealthcare.com.au/privacy-policy

For medical emergencies, please contact your Healthcare Professional, Poisons Information Centre or, emergency services. Amcal does not provide medical advice.

Name: Drogaria Santa Marta
Description:
Abraço que vem do coração.

Estamos aqui para que as pessoas se sintam bem e aproveitem o melhor da vida. No que os outros veem apenas números e resultados, nós enxergamos você.

Esse é o compromisso que nos leva a trabalhar todos os dias com um sorriso no rosto e uma vontade genuína de dar o nosso melhor para cuidar de você de um jeito especial, que só a gente sabe. Afinal, somos a marca do coração.

Todas as nossas lojas são cuidadosamente preparadas para você, proporcionando a melhor experiência, além de todos os produtos que você mais confia e muitos outros que vão surpreender!

Pharmacy Sales – helping clients buy and sell pharmacy businesses with confidence and confidentiality.

Goodwill Valuations – providing accurate and trusted valuations based on in-depth market knowledge.

Pharmacy Stocktakes – offering reliable, efficient, and precise stocktaking services.

Led by our Sales Director, Ivor Craig, who has been selling pharmacy businesses since 1989, our team combines expertise, integrity, and hard work to ensure every client receives the highest standard of service.

We are proud that the majority of our business comes through recommendations and long-standing relationships built during stocktakes and consultations. Our competitive fees and 24/7 client support make us one of the most trusted and cost-effective partners in the pharmacy sales market.

At the heart of everything we do is a commitment to exceptional service, professionalism, and results.

Name: Florida PGX Consulting, LLC
Description:
Hi, I’m Dr. Melissa Smith, founder and CEO of Florida PGX Consulting, LLC. As an Independent Consultant Pharmacist specializing in Pharmacogenomics (PGx), I help healthcare providers address critical challenges in patient care:

1 **Limited knowledge of PGx** – Many prescribers lack specialized training to interpret genetic test results effectively.  
2 **Time constraints** – Busy schedules often leave little time to review PGx results with patients.  
3 **Liability risks** – Adverse drug reactions and hospitalizations can arise from trial-and-error prescribing.  

By partnering with me, you can:  
 Implement personalized medicine to reduce adverse drug reactions and hospitalizations.  
 Receive expert interpretation of PGx results to guide treatment decisions.  
 Streamline workflows, saving time and improving efficiency.  
 Protect your practice with precision-based care that minimizes liability risks.  

Let me help you bring the power of PGx into your practice, ensuring better outcomes for your patients and peace of mind for you. Let’s connect!

Name: Good Days Therapy
Description:
Toate produsele distribuite de Good Days Therapy în România stau sub egida Barny’s Premium Quality, marca a siguranței și a calității, puse în slujba sănătății dumneavoastră! În spatele fiecărui produs Barny’s stă echipa noastră de cercetare canadiană, care vă asigură că substanțele active pe care le folosim sunt testate clinic și acreditate ca fiind sigure.

Toate produsele au certificare GMP. 
GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice) este un set de reguli stricte aplicabile tuturor producătorilor de medicamente sau suplimente. GMP asigură calitatea întregului proces de producție și distribuție, asigurând și evaluând trasabilitatea produselor, de la materie primă până la produsul final. Producătorii primesc certificarea GMP doar dacă respectă întocmai toate regulile. Nu numai că produsele marca Barny’s sunt certificate GMP, dar și furnizorii cu care se lucrează sunt certificați GMP.

Name: Maswell Park Pharmacy + Travel Clinic
Description:
Maswell Park Pharmacy is a long-established, family-run independent pharmacy located at 6 Central Avenue, Hounslow, TW3 2QH. Proudly serving our community for decades, we combine traditional values with modern clinical excellence to deliver a broad range of NHS and private healthcare services.

As an NHS-accredited Healthy Living Pharmacy, we are committed to improving health outcomes, reducing inequalities, and empowering patients through expert advice and accessible care.

Our NHS services include prescription dispensing, electronic repeat dispensing, the New Medicine Service (NMS), hypertension case-finding, contraception consultations, Pharmacy First and NHS flu vaccinations. We work closely with local GP practices and the ICB to ensure seamless continuity of care and efficient service delivery.

Our growing range of private services offers convenient access to clinical care, including:

NHS and Private flu and COVID-19 vaccinations

A fully accredited Travel Health Clinic providing hepatitis, typhoid, meningitis, and other global travel vaccines, alongside malaria prevention and travel certificates

Weight management programmes using GLP-1 therapies (e.g. Wegovy, Mounjaro) under pharmacist-led PGDs

Vitamin B12 injections and a range of private PGD treatments

Our purpose-built Vaccination & Travel Clinic is staffed by trained clinicians, ensuring safe, professional, and efficient immunisation services supported by robust cold-chain, data, and governance systems.

At Maswell Park Pharmacy, our mission is to deliver accessible, reliable, and innovative healthcare with compassion, clinical integrity, and a focus on excellence — helping every patient live healthier, happier, and more informed lives.

Name: Dploliv
Description:
A Consultoria Farmacêutica especializada em oferecer serviços de consultoria para transportadoras, mentoria para farmacêuticos logísticos e mentoria de LinkedIn para profissionais da área farmacêutica. Com uma equipe altamente qualificada e experiente, a empresa busca auxiliar seus clientes a alcançarem seus objetivos e se destacarem no mercado.

No segmento de consultoria para transportadoras, a Consultoria Farmacêutica oferece soluções personalizadas para otimização de processos logísticos, controle de qualidade no transporte de medicamentos e produtos farmacêuticos, além de auxiliar na adequação às normas e regulamentações vigentes. Com um olhar especializado, a empresa ajuda as transportadoras a garantir a segurança e a integridade dos produtos durante todo o processo de transporte.

Já a mentoria para farmacêuticos logísticos proporciona um acompanhamento individualizado para profissionais da área que buscam aprimorar seus conhecimentos e habilidades. Através de sessões personalizadas, os mentores auxiliam os farmacêuticos a desenvolverem competências específicas para atuarem com excelência na logística farmacêutica, enfrentando desafios e aproveitando oportunidades no mercado de trabalho.

Por fim, a mentoria de LinkedIn oferecida pela Consultoria Farmacêutica é voltada para profissionais farmacêuticos que desejam se posicionar de forma estratégica na maior rede profissional do mundo. Com orientações sobre como criar um perfil atrativo, ampliar a rede de contatos e gerar conteúdo relevante, os mentores auxiliam os participantes a construírem uma presença forte e impactante no LinkedIn, ampliando suas oportunidades de networking e de crescimento profissional.

Dessa forma, a Consultoria Farmacêutica Dploliv se destaca no mercado por oferecer serviços de alta qualidade, com foco na excelência e na satisfação dos clientes. Com um atendimento personalizado e soluções sob medida, a empresa contribui para o desenvolvimento e sucesso dos seus clientes.

Name: Pharma Interim
Description:
Pharma Interim est une agence destinée aux pharmacies et pharmaciens en France.

Jérémy Arzoumanian est le PDG de Stock 12 inventaires, une société familiale créée en 1975. Ce travail aux côtés des pharmaciens l’a mené à vouloir étendre son offre de services.

Les nouvelles missions du pharmacien (entretiens pharmaceutiques, vaccinations, tests, etc.) s’ajoutent à la délivrance traditionnelle. Les pharmaciens doivent donc sans cesse se réinventer et se restructurer.

C’est pour les aider dans cette tâche et pour placer le pharmacien au cœur de son métier qu’est né Pharma Interim.

La gestion quotidienne du back-office représente une activité à la fois exigeante en temps et essentielle pour assurer le bon fonctionnement d’une pharmacie. Compte-tenu des défis actuels auxquels la profession est confrontée, il est devenu primordial de déléguer les tâches non pharmaceutiques à des techniciens spécialisés.

Bien qu’il n’existe pas de formation spécifique pour ces techniciens/logisticiens en pharmacie, Stock 12 s’affirme comme un véritable laboratoire en offrant chaque année une opportunité unique de formation aux intérimaires et un atout majeur pour ses pharmacies utilisatrices.

Por isso, somos rigorosos na seleção das marcas que representamos e te sugerimos:  As fórmulas devem respeitar a saúde gastrointestinal, cumprir elevados padrões de qualidade, privilegiar ingredientes naturais (BIO ou selvagens) e sem aditivos químicos, para entregar maior valor nutricional e benefícios reais de saúde. E, sobretudo, devem cumprir uma regra simples: são os que nós usamos ou escolheríamos, caso precisássemos!

Por tudo isto, é um orgulho representarmos oficialmente em Portugal, em regime de exclusividade marcas:
ALLIUM NOIR – Suplementos à base de Extrato Fluído de Alho Negro Bio | ENERGY Feelings – Nutrição Funcional Bio & Vegan | GOOD MOMENTS – Suplementos Alimemntares Essênciais | HOLOS Nutrition - Suplementos Alimentares Horméticos | INNERME - Nutrição Desportiva Bio & Vegan | MEGARAWBAR - Nutrição Desportiva Bio & Vegan | NORDIC KINGS - Nutrição Funcional Bio & Paleo | NPRO – Saúde Intestinal Plant Based  | WHC Labs – Suplementos Ômegas 3 PescoVegan  | xROVER – Strollers

Description:
Thrive Specialty Pharmacy was founded on May 18, 2023 by two co-workers who worked together at a pharmacy in Miami, FL. They quickly formed a friendship and had very similar ideas about pharmacy operations, more specifically, patient care and felt they could fill a void where patient care and communication has fallen short in several areas within the pharmacy industry. It was at that time they decided to open up their own pharmacy.

One of our founders has been in specialty and retail pharmacy operations & patient services for a decade and understands what it takes to provide the level of detail oriented care that patients need and deserve. In addition to that he is also a Life-Long Chronic Kidney Disease patient for almost 50 years. He has experienced the grueling regiment of dialysis and has since received a life saving kidney transplant.

Our second founder is an exceptional pharmacist with over 22 years of experience in retail and specialty pharmacy operations & patient services but, more specifically in upper management overseeing a major pharmacy chain. He brings expert clinical knowledge, passion and dedication to patient care.

Collectively they have over 30 years of pharmacy experience and counting in the retail and specialty pharmacy industry with an emphasis on Disease State Management and bridging the gap where sometimes patient care falls short in a traditional pharmacy setting.

Name: Seviva
Description:
Cuidar da saúde nunca foi sobre exageros, promessas milagrosas ou fórmulas genéricas. Sempre foi sobre fazer escolhas melhores, todos os dias. A Seviva nasce para quem entende que o corpo é um sistema vivo, em constante adaptação, e busca evolução real, sem ruído, para quem prefere clareza à confusão, ciência ao achismo e constância ao imediatismo.

Aqui, o autocuidado deixa de ser uma obrigação e passa a ser um ritual consciente: cada fórmula existe por um motivo, cada ativo tem uma função e cada decisão é pensada para acompanhar o seu ritmo de vida, não para competir com ele. Não acreditamos em soluções universais; acreditamos em rotinas inteligentes, baseadas em evidência científica, design funcional e estético, e em uma experiência simples, humana e transparente.

A Seviva não é sobre tomar mais, é sobre entender melhor. E quando você entende, cuida. Quando cuida, evolui. E quando evolui, aprende a viver o tempo, com mais saúde, intenção e longevidade.

Name: Droga Viva
Description:
A Drogaviva iniciou a sua história em 1972, pelo Sr. Nelson Augusto Fernandes, que na época com 17 anos de idade, assumiu a direção de sua primeira loja situada na capital de São Paulo, na Avenida Atlântica, 1591, com o nome de Farmatlântica. 

Dando sequência a tradição da família, já que seu pai Sr Virgílio Augusto Fernandes e seus irmãos mais velhos já atuavam no ramo farmacêutico.

A paixão por atender as necessidades e expectativas de seus clientes passou a fazer parte de sua rotina, seus clientes tornaram-se seus amigos. Com a participação de seus três filhos inaugurou a segunda loja em outubro de 2000, sempre focada no atendimento ao cliente de mais alto grau de profissionalismo, eficiência e ótimos preços, pouco a pouco a rede ampliou sua presença na zona sul de São Paulo.

Atualmente, a Drogaviva tem 11 lojas, mais de 180 colaboradores, e cerca de 77.000 clientes atendidos por mês.
Nossa estratégia está focada em construir o reconhecimento da marca Drogaviva, conquistando novos clientes, sua fidelidade e seu retorno frequente às compras através de uma agressiva política de preços baixos.

Chegar aos 51 anos com sucesso foi através de muita dedicação da família Drogaviva e seus colaboradores, que buscam o melhor atendimento aos clientes, sempre aprimorando as técnicas de venda e fazendo da assistência farmacêutica uma prioridade, zelando assim pela saúde das pessoas que adentram a Drogaviva. Além de selecionar os medicamentos de qualidade e preços que sejam acessíveis para todas as classes sociais.

A marca Drogaviva segue sua história, buscando ser referência no mercado de saúde e bem-estar, assim como ser reconhecida pelos clientes como a melhor rede varejista.

 Gestion des modifications de traitements au quotidien.

 Etiquetage des médicaments hors piluliers (sirops, injectables, collyres, etc…).

 Coordination avec les infirmiers et les médecins référents.

 Conciliation médicamenteuse avec les médecins traitants et médecins coordonnateurs.
 Envoi mensuel des factures aux familles et/ou tuteurs pour les produits non pris en charge par les organismes.
 Réalisation d'audits externes du circuit du médicament.
 Formations pour le personnel soignant des établissements partenaires.

Serves patients by preparing medications, giving pharmacological information to multidisciplinary health care team, and monitoring patient drug therapies.

Controls medications by monitoring drug therapies; advising interventions.

Develops hospital staff’s pharmacological knowledge by participating in clinical programs and training pharmacy staff, students, interns, externs, residents, and health care professionals.
Complies with state and federal drug laws as regulated by the state board of pharmacy, the drug enforcement administration, and the food and drug administration by monitoring nursing unit inspection.
Maintains records for controlled substances and removes outdated and damaged drugs from the pharmacy inventory.
Supervises the work results of support personnel.
Maintains current registration, studies existing and new legislation, anticipates legislation, and advises management on needed actions.
Protects patients and technicians by adhering to infection-control protocols.
Maintains safe and clean working environment by complying with procedures, rules, and regulations.
Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.

Em março de 2021, após anos de dedicação, mudamos para a Rua Cristiano Angeli, no mesmo bairro, onde permanecemos até hoje. 
Nosso trabalho é manter fidelidade com todos os nossos clientes, aprimorando cada vez mais a excelência desde o atendimento até a entrega final. 
Aqui na Vick Fórmulas, obedecemos com rigor todas as legislações e normas sanitárias vigentes e temos respaldo técnico para garantir a qualidade de todas as formulações.
Com quase 20 anos de tradição no mercado magistral, seguimos evoluindo diariamente para continuarmos oferecendo as melhores fórmulas e propagando saúde às pessoas através de profissionalismo, rigor, ética e empatia.

Name: PharmGen
Description:
PharmGen – Uw partner in veilige, DNA-gestuurde medicatiekeuze

Bij PharmGen geloven wij dat iedere patiënt uniek is en dat medicatie daarop afgestemd moet zijn. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het leveren van personaliseerde genetische testen; de wetenschap die onderzoekt hoe iemands DNA invloed heeft op de werking van medicijnen.

Wij ondersteunen zorgverleners zoals apothekers, artsen en ziekenhuizen bij het maken van veilige en effectieve medicatiekeuzes. Door middel van DNA-analyse geven wij inzicht in hoe een patiënt bepaalde geneesmiddelen verwerkt. 

Bij PharmGen maken wij persoonlijke zorg mogelijk door DNA-gestuurde medicatiekeuzes. Zo dragen wij samen met zorgverleners bij aan een veiliger en effectiever medicijngebruik.

Onze testen zijn eenvoudig aan te vragen, worden snel verwerkt in Nederlandse laboratoria en leveren heldere rapportages op. Zo ontzorgen wij apotheken, huisartsen en ziekenhuizen en maken we samen medicatie veiliger en effectiever.

Description:
Doppelherz là thương hiệu đại diện cho “truyền thống, tri thức và kinh nghiệm lâu đời” của tập đoàn Queisser Pharma (CHLB Đức). Hơn 125 năm phát triển, đến nay Doppelherz đã trở thành thương hiệu danh tiếng toàn cầu trong lĩnh vực chăm sóc sức khỏe. Các sản phẩm thực phẩm chức năng của hãng không chỉ chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Đức trong nhiều năm liên tục, mà còn dẫn đầu thị trường tại nhiều quốc gia khác trên thế giới.

Với công thức bào chế đa dạng, chủ yếu từ chiết xuất thảo mộc – vitamin – khoáng chất, Doppelherz giúp chăm sóc sức khỏe cho cả gia đình và mang lại cuộc sống năng động khỏe mạnh.

Tại thị trường Việt Nam chúng tôi đã xây dựng được hệ thống phân phối rộng khắp trên toàn quốc. Với sự tín nhiệm cao ngày càng gia tăng từ thị trường, chúng tôi đang vững bước tiến tới trở thành thương hiệu dẫn đầu ngành hàng TPCN và thuốc OTC nhập khẩu tại thị trường Việt Nam.

Hiện nay, các sản phẩm của Doppelherz không chỉ có mặt tại Đức và các nước Châu Âu, mà còn được yêu thích bởi khách hàng trên toàn thế giới. Doppelherz trở thành thương hiệu toàn cầu nổi tiếng bởi chất lượng. Là thương hiệu nhiều năm liên tục chiếm thị phần Số 1 về vitamin và khoáng chất tại Đức (Theo Nielsen market track)

Name: Farmacéutico Barcelona
Description:
Farmacéutico Barcelona es una marca líder en la selección, formación y desarrollo de talento en las oficinas de farmacia de la ciudad de Barcelona. Nos dedicamos a conectar a farmacéuticos cualificados con oportunidades profesionales en esta ciudad, ayudando tanto a recién graduados como a profesionales experimentados a avanzar en sus carreras.

Entendemos que mudarse a una nueva ciudad es un gran paso, por lo que nos encargamos de facilitar todo el proceso. Además de identificar y reclutar talento, ofrecemos un servicio integral de acompañamiento, que incluye la gestión de alojamiento asequible en el centro de Barcelona. De este modo, nuestros candidatos pueden concentrarse en su desarrollo profesional sin preocupaciones adicionales.

Nuestros Servicios incluyen:

Selección de Talento: Buscamos farmacéuticos licenciados con el potencial y la motivación para sobresalir en un entorno profesional dinámico.

Formación Continua: Proveemos programas de formación y desarrollo profesional para mantener a nuestros candidatos a la vanguardia de las mejores prácticas del sector.

Acompañamiento Personalizado: Desde la búsqueda de vivienda hasta el asesoramiento en la integración en la ciudad, estamos a tu lado en cada paso. Garantizamos alojamiento asequible en ubicaciones estratégicas de Barcelona para facilitar tu adaptación.

Red de Farmacias: Colaboramos con una amplia red de farmacias en Barcelona que buscan integrar a profesionales apasionados en sus equipos.

Nuestra misión es fomentar el crecimiento y desarrollo del talento farmacéutico, asegurando que cada profesional que confía en nosotros pueda alcanzar sus metas y contribuir al bienestar de la comunidad. Con un enfoque centrado en la excelencia, la innovación y el apoyo constante, Farmacéutico Barcelona se ha consolidado como un referente en el sector farmacéutico de la ciudad.

*Estamos con vos, desde siempre*

Name: Respahealth

Welcome to Respahealth 
 
Your Trusted Partner in Respiratory Wellness!

At Respahealth, we are passionate about revolutionising respiratory health and empowering individuals to breathe easier and live better. With a deep commitment to natural solutions and innovative science, we offer one groundbreaking product: Respahealth Gold Capsules.

Our journey began with a simple yet powerful mission: to provide effective relief for respiratory ailments such as hay fever, allergies, and asthma, without the side effects of traditional medications. Respahealth Gold Capsules are meticulously formulated using natural ingredients that target deep lung function, offering unparalleled relief and support.

Backed by years of research and expertise, our team is dedicated to delivering excellence in every aspect of our operations. From product development to customer care, we prioritise quality, transparency, and integrity, ensuring that every interaction with Respahealth is met with trust and confidence.

But our vision extends beyond just providing relief. We are committed to fostering a community of wellness, where individuals feel empowered to take control of their respiratory health and live life to the fullest. Through education, advocacy, and innovation, we strive to make a meaningful difference in the lives of those we serve.

Join us on our journey to respiratory wellness. Together, we can breathe easier and build a healthier, happier future.

Breathe better. Live better. Choose Respahealth.

Nossa paixão é a sua saúde! Unimos tecnologia de ponta, matérias-primas rigorosamente selecionadas e expertise em fórmulas personalizadas para entregar soluções sob medida. Nosso compromisso é entregar confiança e resultados, prezando sempre pela ética, inovação e atendimento humanizado. Atendemos prescritores, pacientes e parceiros com agilidade, segurança e respeito à individualidade de cada tratamento.

Seja bem-vindo à Deconto – sua saúde manipulada com responsabilidade.

Whether you require prescription medications, over-the-counter remedies, or specialized healthcare products, our comprehensive online catalogue has you covered.
While our E pharmacy opens doors to new possibilities, rest assured that our commitment to personalized care remains steadfast. Our team of highly skilled pharmacists and healthcare professionals are available to provide expert advice and guidance through online consultations. We understand that healthcare is not one-size-fits-all, and we are dedicated to tailoring our services to your specific needs

SCAB Pharmacy's expansion into the digital realm is driven by our passion to make quality healthcare accessible to all Africans. We envision a future where distance or geographical limitations no longer prevent individuals from receiving the healthcare they deserve. With our E pharmacy, we are bridging the gap and empowering individuals across Africa to take control of their health and well-being.

Description:

A - Accountability

Description:
Welcome to Grassberg, an English trademark renowned for over 12 years in manufacturing top-tier dietary supplements and sports nutrition within the European Union. We pride ourselves on upholding the highest standards of quality, confirmed by certifications from world-leading verification company Bureau Veritas, meeting ISO international standards. Our mission extends beyond borders, offering consumers across Europe and around the globe an opportunity to maintain optimal health. Rooted in our core values, we have earned the trust and gratitude of our customers for the efficacy of our products. 

Quality control is at the heart of our operations, from sourcing raw materials to shipping and manufacturing, adhering to strict European regulations. Our dedication to excellence includes random sampling and rigorous testing of products in various environments, ensuring unparalleled quality and safety for our customers. 

Located in Europe, our state-of-the-art production facilities are staffed by dedicated scientists and technologists, continuously innovating to develop new and enhanced products designed to enhance the quality of life for our customers. Our commitment to innovation is matched by our commitment to sustainability. 

At Grassberg, we believe in harnessing the power of nature through cutting-edge research. Our platform seamlessly integrates technology with the natural world, allowing us to experiment with novel ingredients and formulations. Guided by the principle of using natural materials, we strive to unlock the full potential of nature to benefit our customers. 

One of our core values is environmental stewardship, and we actively advocate against the use of harmful packaging materials, particularly plastic. Unlike many manufacturers, we prioritize sustainable packaging options such as glass and aluminum, ensuring product freshness and minimizing environmental impact. 

Grassberg is more than a brand - it's a testament to the power of innovation.

The Community Pharmacist Association (CPA) is a professional association whose members are community pharmacists. Pharmacists are the custodians and specialists of medicines. One of our role is to educate the public on the correct and safe use of medicines and medicinal products.

Mission of the Association
To be the strongest and most influential association in the promotion of public health through provision of pharmaceutical care to patients under the community pharmacy practice setting

Objectives of the Association
To protect and promote the interests and rights of community pharmacy practice
To encourage a spirit of solidarity and cooperation amongst its members and to raise the status of the pharmacy profession in the health industry and in the public eye.
To work in close conjunction with affiliate professions and associations, and other allied trades including government, civic organizations and Non-Governmental Organizations
To improve the science and art of community pharmacy practice through continuous professional development and peer reviews.
To create and maintain a standard of professional conduct which at its minimum is stated in the Code of Ethics of the Association.

Name: Nowa Farmacja
Description:
Powstaliśmy z myślą o zapewnieniu profesjonalnej i łatwo dostępnej opieki farmaceutycznej polskim pacjentom. Jako grupa z blisko 20-letnim doświadczeniem wiemy, że aby to osiągnąć, musimy tworzyć najlepsze środowisko pracy i rozwoju dla naszych farmaceutów. To ich wiedza i zaangażowanie budują kapitał zaufania, jakim obdarza nas coraz więcej Polaków.

Jesteśmy sprawdzonym partnerem w biznesie. W ciągu ostatniej dekady podwoiliśmy liczbę aptek, a nasza sieć liczy dziś ponad 170 placówek własnych i partnerskich w każdym województwie. Co najważniejsze, nasz model biznesowy działa – średni obrót apteki w Grupie Nowa Farmacja jest dwukrotnie wyższy niż statystycznej placówki w regionie. To dowód skuteczności, na którym budujemy naszą wspólną przyszłość. Stale poszerzamy też asortyment naszej apteki wysyłkowej (e-commerce), w której ofercie znajduje się dziś kilkanaście tysięcy pozycji.

Wierzymy, że inwestycja w zespół to inwestycja w jakość. Nasza Akademia Nowej Farmacji to unikalna platforma e-learningowa, dająca farmaceutom dostęp do dziesiątek szkoleń rocznie, zapewniając przy tym elastyczność nauki i realne premie za stałe poszerzanie wiedzy. Uzupełniamy to kompleksowym pakietem pracowniczych benefitów (m.in. prywatna opieka medyczna, karty MyBenefit), ponieważ zaangażowanie rodzi się z poczucia stabilności i docenienia.

Nie podążamy ślepo za trendami – wyroby medyczne i suplementy tworzymy słuchając głosu naszych ekspertów i pacjentów. Tak powstała nasza marka własna Zdrowe Korzyści: linia blisko 140 produktów, których jakość i skład są bezpośrednią odpowiedzią na realne potrzeby. W każdej naszej aptece można też znaleźć Strefę Zielnik, gdzie łączymy siłę natury z nowoczesną wiedzą farmaceutyczną.

Nowa Farmacja to dowód, że siła ogólnopolskiej sieci i sprawdzony model biznesu idą w parze z realną inwestycją w rozwój najlepszych specjalistów. Ta unikalna kombinacja pozwala nam nie tylko dynamicznie rosnąć, ale też stale podnosić standardy opieki farmaceutycznej.

Name: Alternativ Pharma XV
Description:
Alternativ pharma XV est un groupement de pharmacies situées dans le sud-ouest de la France, créé en 2017 à l’initiative de quelques amis pharmaciens. 

Le groupement tire ses racines, comme son nom d’origine Pharma XV l’indique, du rugby et des valeurs que ce sport véhicule : esprit d'équipe et entraide, cohésion et unité, force et conviction, engagement et dynamisme. Depuis 2020, le groupement s’est rassemblé sous l’enseigne Alternativ Pharma XV, pour coller au plus près de l’ensemble de ses valeurs.

Il se positionne en effet comme une alternative aux réseaux nationaux par la cohésion, l’indépendance et l’engagement dont font preuve les pharmacies adhérentes, le souci de proximité entre adhérents, et avec les patients, tout en garantissant les meilleurs prix et des niveaux de service toujours plus innovants et personnalisés.

Élaboré par des pharmaciens, pour des pharmaciens, ce groupement propose un ensemble de services, d’outils et d’accords partenaires pour favoriser le meilleur développement à ses  adhérents. 
Soucieux de mettre l’humain et ses relations au cœur de leurs pratiques, le groupement a aussi à cœur de faire évoluer l’officine face aux défis actuels de numérisation et nouvelles pratiques et la remettre au centre des débats de santé.

Et parce que prendre soin de la santé de tous, c’est aussi préserver la planète, Alternativ s’engage dans une démarche de développement durable dans ses pratiques, comme dans le choix de gammes locales ou bio.

100% unis, 100% indépendants et 100% engagés 
Tel est l'état d'esprit du groupement Alternativ Pharma XV qui met le collectif en première ligne pour le meilleur service, l’entraide tout en gardant une totale indépendance.

Name: Acheter Officine
Description:

Cette entreprise familliale créée en 2022 conseille et accompagne les pharmaciens dans leurs différents projets.

Basé sur toute la Nouvelle-Aquitaine  et DROM-COM 
notre cabinet de transaction travaille comme partenaire du Cabinet Guerry. 

Nous sommes là pour vous fournir une gamme complète de services. 
Nous recherchons les acquéreurs et vendeurs appropriés pour chaque officine, en nous appuyant sur notre vaste réseau de contacts. 

Notre métier consiste à négocier pour nos clients pharmaciens, avec un audit précis et détaillé, pour la vente, l’acquisition et le regroupement de pharmacies. 
 
 Cette négociation s’accompagne d’études financières réalisées par un service spécialisé et d’une assistance à la recherche d’un prêt bancaire et / ou un  booster en toute indépendance pour s’occuper au mieux de tous vos projets.

Aujourd’hui, notre mission consciste en un conseil permanent durant TOUT le projet d’installation, allant même jusqu’à l’accomplissement des actes de cession et de toutes les formalités.  

 Rédaction des actes, statuts de la société exploitante et / ou financière, règlement intérieur et pacte d’associés, montage et dépôt des dossiers professionnels, gestion du contrat de prêt et déblocage des fonds, formalités diverses d’installation et de radiation, gestion du séquestre sans frais.

Venez nous rencontrer avec plaisir, nous sommes là pour VOUS !

Name: Apotheken voor Gaza
Description:
Wij zijn apotheekmedewerkers en geen politici of wereldleiders. Maar we zijn wel mensen die niet stil willen toekijken.

In Gaza werken collega-zorgverleners onder omstandigheden die we ons nauwelijks kunnen voorstellen.
Kinderen sterven aan honger. Medicatie is er nauwelijks en het zorgstelsel is kapot gebombardeerd.
Wij weten dat we hier, vanuit Nederland, de wereld niet kunnen veranderen.
Maar we weten ook: stil zijn is geen optie meer.

Onze eigen apotheekorganisaties blijven stil. Ze noemen het neutraliteit.
Maar als je stil blijft terwijl mensen lijden, kies je uiteindelijk wél een kant. Wij kiezen ervoor om niet te zwijgen.

Met Apotheken voor Gaza geven we de mensen daar een stem. We delen hun verhalen en wij bouwen aan zichtbaarheid. We laten zien dat er in onze beroepsgroep wél mensen zijn die menselijkheid belangrijker vinden dan reputatie.

 Volg ons, deel dit, sluit je aan.
We kunnen misschien niet alles doen. Maar we kunnen wél iets doen en dat begint met niet zwijgen.

Name: Pharmacy Careers Summit 2026
Description:
The annual Pharmacy Careers Summit is a unique gathering of leaders in all fields of Pharmacy that will come together to discuss the amazing career opportunities that exist and are ever-changing in the fields of Pharmacy Practice in Australia today.

Never before in the industry has there been a single event that's sole purpose has been to focus purely on the career journeys of Pharmacists from high school through every stage of their career and supported by all the peak Pharmacy bodies in Australia.

Through an extensive program of conference sessions in the Auditorium, PCS25 brings together Universities, Peak Industry Member Bodies, Hospitals, Pharmacy Retail Banner Groups, and Industry for discussions, insights, and actionable steps to grow your career.

Attendees will explore the trends shaping Pharmacy and the practical actions that can be taken to build a resilient, exciting, and sustainable career in the Pharmacy Industry in Australia.

By joining the Summit you will be able to:

As a student, considering studying pharmacy, hear the amazing opportunities and experiences that are available by studying Pharmacy direct from leaders who are working in the fields of Community Pharmacy, Hospital, other Healthcare settings, and Industry. 

As a university student about to commence your search for an internship, listen and talk to representatives from a broad cross-section of employers about programs and opportunities currently available across the breadth of Australia. 

Discuss real jobs and opportunities available with potential employers, without the need to travel to a physical location. 

As a current or potential owner of a community pharmacy, listen to leaders in the fields of ownership in the Auditorium and then interact with a cross-section of Australia’s leading experts and Pharmacy Banner Groups in the Virtual Exhibition Hall.

REGISTER NOW! https://pharmacycareerssummit.com.au/en/registration

Name: Chemist Clinic
Description:
Chemist Clinic is a community pharmacy group.
Our vision involves leading the sector in delivery of professional services that promote the safe and quality use of medicines.  Our specific mission relates to enhancing the wellness of at-risk consumers.  To achieve this, we work closely with care recipients, nurses, GPs and care providers and embed our support wherever Credentialed Pharmacists operate.  This includes the residential, home and disability care sectors.

Chemist Clinic is the leading employer of Aged Care Onsite Pharmacists in Australia.  We are experts in nurturing the development of new-career pharmacists and cultivating that team member into becoming a genuine medication safety expert.

Chemist Clinic's pharmacist proprietor is credentialed pharmacist, Michael Bonner.  Michael is also the sole owner of Choice Aged Care (Australia's largest RMMR/QUM/HMR service provider) and the Pharmacy Care Academy (the RTO provider of Australia's first accredited combined Aged Care Onsite Pharmacist and Medication Management Review training program).

Name: Unica Vicina a te
Description:
UNICA Vicina a te
OLTRE LA FARMACIA, UN LABORATORIO DI ESPERIENZE
Unica S.r.l., nata nel novembre 2017, è prima di tutto un modello di farmacia innovativo, in espansione e in grande fermento creativo-strategico; è anche un vero e proprio laboratorio di esperienze, idee e opportunità per il farmacista in primis oltre che per i cittadini. Si contraddistingue per l’approccio lungimirante e pragmatico, aderente il più possibile alla visione che i farmacisti hanno della farmacia di eccellenza: alto profilo dei dipendenti, dal punto di vista della capacità di consiglio e introduzione di servizi di prossimità di screening e prevenzione. UNICA propone un modello di Farmacia all’avanguardia, punto di riferimento accessibile e vicinissimo alle persone, presidio di salute di quartiere. UNICA eredita la grande esperienza di UNICO S.p.A., distributore intermedio di Farmacisti per i Farmacisti. Grazie all’approccio di condivisione e interscambio costante, si propone di utilizzare le risorse e le competenze delle Società del Gruppo UNICO, per rispondere in modo impeccabile alle esigenze dei Farmacisti, in un’ottica prospettica e avanzata.

RISPETTO
L’obiettivo di UNICA è rendere le Farmacie del Gruppo accessibili, aperte all’ascolto e al consiglio.

ESPERIENZA e INNOVAZIONE
Il progetto strategico di UNICA ambisce ad aumentare le competenze dei Farmacisti, attraverso un percorso formativo che migliori il servizio in Farmacia e aumenti la soddisfazione del Cliente, grazie anche all’ausilio di uno specifico category management, di strumenti innovativi e di tecnologie all’avanguardia.

GESTIONE DEL TEMPO
I nostri sistemi puntano a una migliore gestione del tempo dei Direttori e dei Collaboratori. Obiettivo raggiungibile attraverso il software di riordino automatico CAREP e magazzini automatizzati. La scelta di spingere le Farmacie UNICA verso l’automazione consente di liberare tempo professionale da dedicare ai Clienti.

سواء كنت تبحث عن منتجات للعناية بالبشرة، الشعر، أو مستحضرات مكياج، فإننا نقدم مجموعة واسعة من المنتجات ذات الجودة العالية التي تلبي احتياجات جميع عملائنا. تتميز منتجاتنا بأنها خالية من المواد الضارة وتعتمد على تقنيات حديثة لتحقيق أفضل النتائج دون التسبب في تهييج البشرة.

نحن في رمز الجمال الطبيّة نسعى دائمًا لتقديم الابتكار والجودة في كل منتج نقدمه، حيث نؤمن بأهمية العناية بالبشرة كجزء لا يتجزأ من الصحة الشاملة.

Name: OfficeIn
Description:
Le Partenaire Stratégique pour le contrôle en temps réel des remises et factures au coeur de votre officine

Créée après sept années d'expérience terrain auprès des pharmacies et des laboratoires, 
Office In est une solution SaaS novatrice conçue pour répondre aux défis contemporains de la gestion en pharmacie. Constatant qu'il est pratiquement impossible pour les pharmaciens de vérifier en temps réel les montants de factures, les remises, les conditions de marché, ou encore de suivre l'avancement des remises de fin d'année, notre outil offre une solution complète et intuitive.

Office In permet non seulement d'accéder à un catalogue de prix toujours à jour, mais aussi de calculer à l'avance les prix en triple net, optimisant ainsi votre gestion financière. Notre service se distingue par un suivi personnalisé et efficace via chat, téléphone, et email, enrichi par des rapports personnalisés envoyés directement à votre boîte mail pour vous alerter sur toutes les fonctionnalités clés.

Adoptez Office In pour transformer et simplifier votre gestion quotidienne, avec tous les outils nécessaires pour prendre des décisions éclairées et rester à l'avant-garde de votre secteur.

Name: Unipharm Wholesale Drugs
Description:
Unipharm Wholesale Drugs Ltd. is the only wholesale pharmaceutical cooperative in Canada, committed to the success and sustainability of independent pharmacies. 

Founded in 1980 and headquartered in Richmond, British Columbia, Unipharm operates under a cooperative ownership model governed by an elected Board of Directors. This structure ensures that the needs and interests of member pharmacies remain at the core of all business decisions.

For over four decades, Unipharm has served as a trusted full-line, full-service wholesaler, providing a comprehensive range of products including pharmaceuticals, over-the-counter medications, home health care supplies, health and beauty products, confectionery, and private label items. 

By offering the flexibility of tailored purchasing alongside the strength of collective buying power, Unipharm helps independent pharmacies remain competitive in an increasingly consolidated market.

Unipharm is more than a supplier—it is a strategic partner. The company is known for its award-winning customer service, responsive support, and deep industry expertise. Through customized business solutions and ongoing collaboration, Unipharm supports pharmacy owners and operators in enhancing patient care, strengthening business operations, and fostering long-term growth.

As a responsible corporate citizen, Unipharm is dedicated to giving back to the communities it serves. The company actively supports a number of health-related charities and initiatives through financial contributions and employee participation, including the ALS Society, the BC Cancer Foundation, the Canadian Breast Cancer Foundation, the Richmond Food Bank, and Covenant House.

Unipharm remains steadfast in its mission to empower independent pharmacies—advancing community health care through cooperative strength, strategic support, and a shared commitment to excellence.

Unipharm, Dedicated to Independent Pharmacies since 1980.

Name: Community Pharmacy Norfolk & Suffolk
Description:
Community Pharmacy Norfolk & Suffolk (also known as your Local Pharmaceutical Committee or LPC) is one of a number of LPC’s which operate in East Anglia, as the local voice for community pharmacies. Across Norfolk & Suffolk we work with community pharmacies which are both independently owned or part of larger community pharmacy chains.

The aim of Community Pharmacy Norfolk & Suffolk is to represent community pharmacies, working in collaboration with others, to improve the health and well-being of the people across both counties. Community pharmacies are working with other health care professionals to become an effective integrated part of primary health and social care to deliver the best outcomes for their patients. There are significant opportunities for community pharmacies to do more to support their local communities. It is our role as the local representative body to be the voice and support for community pharmacies so they can continue to develop and deliver a wide range of services that meet the needs of local people.

The work of Community Pharmacy Norfolk & Suffolk is not for profit, with our funding coming directly via a small levy on each pharmacy Contractor.  We are not primarily a patient-facing organisation, and so unfortunately cannot routinely respond to queries from members of the public. Please do though follow us on social media where useful community pharmacy messages will be broadcast.

Name: MedRadar
Description:
MedRadar - Farmacia in buzunarul tau

Cu MedRadar, poți găsi rapid și ușor produsele farmaceutice de care ai nevoie în apropierea ta. Indiferent dacă cauți medicamente, suplimente, produse pentru sănătatea personală sau alte articole farmaceutice, MedRadar îți oferă acces la o bază de date extinsă și actualizată cu informații despre farmacii și stocurile lor.

Prin intermediul tehnologiei de localizare a dispozitivului tău mobil, MedRadar identifică farmaciile din zona ta și îți afișează produsele disponibile în fiecare dintre ele. Nu mai trebuie să umbli dintr-o farmacie în alta sau să cauți pe internet. Cu doar câteva apăsări de buton, poți afla unde găsești exact ceea ce cauți, economisind timp și efort.

Principalele caracteristici ale aplicației MedRadar includ:

Căutare eficientă: Cu un design intuitiv și o interfață prietenoasă, MedRadar îți permite să cauți rapid produse farmaceutice după denumire, brand sau categorie. Poți rafina căutarea după distanță și alte filtre relevante pentru a obține rezultatele cele mai potrivite nevoilor tale.

Informații detaliate: Fiecare produs listat în aplicație este însoțit de informații detaliate, cum ar fi prețul, descrierea, compoziția și disponibilitatea în farmacii. Astfel, poți lua o decizie informată înainte de a merge la farmacie.

Farmacii locale și lanțuri de farmacii: MedRadar acoperă o gamă largă de farmacii independente și lanțuri de farmacii, oferindu-ți o perspectivă completă asupra stocurilor disponibile în zona ta. Indiferent de preferințele tale, MedRadar te poate ajuta să găsești cea mai apropiată și convenabilă opțiune pentru tine.

Evaluări și recenzii: MedRadar îți oferă posibilitatea de a evalua și de a lăsa recenzii despre farmaciile pe care le-ai vizitat. Aceasta poate fi o modalitate utilă de a împărtăși experiențele tale cu alți utilizatori și de a contribui la comunitatea MedRadar.

Apoteke "Maelia" 
Mlada, progresivno razvojna mreža u Srbiji. Poveravaju nam ono najvrednije – zdravlje.
Specijalisti apoteke Maelia se odnose prema svakom kupcu sa ljubavlju, brigom i pažnjom.
Pozivamo vas da postanete deo tima "Maelia"!
Na tržištu Srbije od 2023. godine otvoreno je 60 apoteka u: Beogradu, Novom Sadu, Pančevu, Nišu, Kruševcu i Kragujevcu.

"Maelia" je atraktivna i po svom asortimanu i po projektima, pokrenutim u apoteci.
Ekskluzivno predstavljamo:
- dijetetski suplementi iz Rusije
- medicinsku kozmetiku iz Engleske: Cosfo17 i  Malinia, iz Nemačke- Babor
- asortiman Vivacia vitamina iz Engleske

Apoteke "Maelia" predstavljaju jedinstven projekat za Srbiju pod nazivom Mali Farmaceut.
Deca imaju priliku da se igraju kao pravi farmaceuti sa svim atributima ove profesije:  lažnim lekovima veselih boja i smešnih naziva. Tu se uključuje i kasa u kojoj je tehnički moguće vratiti račune, vitrine i tezge, pa čak i sopstveni novac - "Taksiki".

"Maelia" je više od apoteke.

Name: Hann's Fertility Pharmacy
Description:
At Hann’s Fertility Pharmacy, we believe that every journey to grow a family deserves compassion, expertise, and support. We are a woman-owned pharmacy with personal experience in fertility treatments, we have been there ourselves, and we know how overwhelming, emotional, and confusing the process can feel. That is why we speak from a position of empathy, not just expertise. We Are Here For You. 
We specialize in fertility medications and offer certified in-house compounding, giving patients and providers confidence in both quality and care. Our team combines the capabilities of a nationwide specialty pharmacy with the heart and accessibility of your trusted neighborhood pharmacy. Whether it is answering late-night questions, coordinating with providers, or navigating insurance and benefit managers, our promise is simple: you will never feel like just another number.

What Sets Us Apart
Fertility Focused: Decades of experience supporting patients, providers, and employers in reproductive health.
Compounding Expertise: Certified, in-house compounding for personalized treatment needs.
Nationwide Shipping: Temperature-controlled, reliable delivery, we make sure your medications arrive safely and on time.
Personal Touch: We treat every patient like family. You can call or text us directly, no call centers, no endless transfers. Our owner is available to you personally to help.
Woman-Owned & Empathy-Led: We have walked this path. We understand. We care.
Connect With Us
We are more than a pharmacy, we are your partner in care. Visit our website to learn more or simply call/text us at 703-495-3350. We would love to hear from you.

Hann’s Fertility Pharmacy: Nationwide care, neighborhood feel.

Unlock your pharmacy’s full potential with HealthGrowth—your partner in growth, profitability, and operational success.

Name: State Pharmaceuticals Corporation of Sri Lanka
Description:
The State Pharmaceuticals Corporation was established in 1971 under the State Industrial Corporations Act Number 49 of 1957. This far-sighted decision was the result of the report submitted by Prof. Senaka Bible and Dr.S.A. Wickramasinghe report (March 1971) based on an assignment given to them by the then Prime Minister, Mrs. Sirimavo Bandaranaike.

Prof. Senaka BibleGoing by the vision of its founding father Professor Senaka Bibile, the State Pharmaceuticals Corporation (SPC) has at all times striven to provide quality assured drugs at prices that are reasonable in the market. For the past 40 years SPC has been the sole supplier of pharmaceuticals, surgical consumable Items, laboratory chemicals and equipment to all institutions administered by the health ministry.

Our first chairman created a great philosophy and great culture to our organization as well as to the whole Sri Lanka to follow the "Senaka Bibile Drug Policy" regarding the pharmaceuticals. He started using generic names for pharmaceuticals and instructed the suppliers to use generic names in labeling. He has specifically mentioned that when the pharmaceuticals Corporation purchases drugs on tender basis, it is important to ensure the quality of drugs purchased. He suggested that in an ideal situation, the Corporation would it self inspect factories of suppliers and purchased only from those who follow good manufacturing practices. These management practices are still followed by the Corporation.

It has operated up to now as a profitable venture with the largest market share in the industry supplying pharmaceuticals to the nation.

SPC's national role is to serve Sri Lanka by providing safe, efficacious and high quality medicinal products and health services at affordable prices, while promoting the usage of generic drugs. It's vision therefore is to be the leading health care organization of the nation.

Name: Heals Pharmacy
Description:
Η Ιστορία Μας
1979: Η ιστορία των φαρμακείων μας ξεκινά με το άνοιγμα του πρώτου μας φαρμακείου στην καρδιά της Θεσσαλονίκης, στην οδό Κομνηνών, στα Λουλουδάδικα. Η τότε επωνυμία του ήταν Φαρμακείο Καραπατάκη, ένα όνομα που για δεκαετίες συνδέθηκε στην πόλη της Θεσσαλονίκης με τη συνέπεια, την επαγγελματική συνείδηση και την αξιοπιστία.
2017: Η επωνυμία της επιχείρησης αλλάζει σε Φαρμακείο Αρσλάνογλου, το όνομα που διατηρούμε ακόμα και σήμερα. Τα αδέρφια Αρσλάνογλου αναλαμβάνουν το φαρμακείο, εκσυγχρονίζοντας την οικογενειακή επιχείρηση. 
2021: Δημιουργούμε το Heals Online Pharmacy, ένα ηλεκτρονικό κατάστημα (e-shop) φαρμακείου, με πάνω από 12.000 κωδικούς προϊόντων που μας δίνει πλέον τη δυνατότητα να εξυπηρετούμε ανθρώπους σε ολόκληρη την Ελλάδα.
2022: Ανοίγουμε το μεγαλύτερο και πιο εκσυγχρονισμένο φαρμακείο στη Βόρεια Ελλάδα, στην οδό Μάρκου Μπότσαρη.
2024: Ανοίγουμε το τρίτο μας φαρμακείο στην οδό Μεταμορφώσεως, στην Καλαμαριά.
Οι Άνθρωποί Μας
Στα Φαρμακεία Αρσλάνογλου απασχολούμε εξειδικευμένους επιστήμονες. Εκπαιδευμένοι και ενημερωμένοι, προσφέρουμε εξειδικευμένες συμβουλές και εξυπηρέτηση μέσω διαφόρων καναλιών επικοινωνίας.
Οι Στόχοι Μας
Να παρέχουμε στους πελάτες μας την καλύτερη δυνατή εξυπηρέτηση.
Να προσφέρουμε μια ευρεία γκάμα προϊόντων και υπηρεσιών υγείας.
Να συνεργαζόμαστε με τους κορυφαίους προμηθευτές στον κλάδο.
Να διασφαλίζουμε την ασφάλεια και την ποιότητα των προϊόντων μας.
Να διατηρήσουμε την ανταγωνιστικότητά μας σε μια συνεχώς μεταβαλλόμενη αγορά.
Να συμβάλουμε στην ευημερία της τοπικής κοινωνίας
Να βελτιωνόμαστε συνεχώς.
Γιατί Εμάς
Είμαστε αφοσιωμένοι στην υγεία και την ευεξία. Προσφέρουμε ποικιλία προϊόντων σε ανταγωνιστικές τιμές, με εξειδικευμένες συμβουλές και γρήγορη παράδοση.
Το Όραμά Μας
Στο heals.gr και στα Φαρμακεία Αρσλάνογλου, πιστεύουμε ότι η υγεία και η ευεξία είναι αναντικατάστατες. Στόχος μας είναι να παρέχουμε το σωστό προϊόν, για τους σωστούς λόγους, στη σωστή τιμή.
Εμπιστευτείτε τους ειδικούς!

Interactive webinars 
Comprehensive how-to materials 
Templated forms 
Analytics and auditing support

Name: Pharmacie Vermette & Huynh
Description:
Médicaments d’exception. Service d’exception.
Pour les besoins en médicaments de spécialité, notre service de pharmacie soigne chaque commande, chaque conseil et chaque bonjour!

Une équipe passionnée par votre santé!
Nous accompagnons les patients pour rendre accessibles à tout moment les médicaments qui soignent des maladies à traitements particuliers, avec des conseils personnalisés complémentaires à ceux des autres professionnels de la santé, selon une totale relation de confiance mutuelle.

Notre mission
Nous facilitons la vie des personnes atteintes de maladies nécessitant des traitements particuliers qui affectent leur qualité de vie, en nous occupant de l’ensemble de leur dossier pharmacologique, tant sur le plan administratif qu’en ce qui a trait aux médicaments parfaitement adaptés.

Nos valeurs
→ Empathie : Pour bien soigner les gens, il faut les aimer. Dans le respect de l’intimité et des différences, nous comprenons que c’est à nous d’aller vers les patients, de les écouter, de tenter de les comprendre.
→ Intégrité : Notre quotidien, en tant que professionnels de la santé qui manipulent des médicaments spécialisés afin de soigner des pathologies particulières, est guidé par la transparence, l’honnêteté, un très grand sens de l’éthique et la loyauté. Nos responsabilités sont grandes, car elles sont souvent vitales pour nos patients.
→ Curiosité : Parce que la science évolue sans cesse, de même que les maladies qui nous affectent, notre esprit est constamment en éveil et nous comblons notre soif de savoir par la formation, la recherche et la veille d’information en continu. Ce n’est pas un travail… c’est un plaisir!

Name: CUBO FARMÁCIA
Description:
A Cubo Farmácia é composta por duas unidades que trabalham em perfeita sinergia para oferecer soluções completas em saúde:
	•	Cubo Medicamentos, com vasta experiência na comercialização de medicamentos especiais, atende todo o território nacional com atendimento diferenciado e preços competitivos.
	•	Cubo Manipulação, especializada na produção de fórmulas manipuladas personalizadas, desenvolvidas com matérias-primas de alta qualidade e rigoroso controle de processos, garantindo a segurança e eficácia no tratamento de seus pacientes.
Sabemos que para um tratamento ser realmente eficaz, não basta adquirir o medicamento prescrito. É essencial ter segurança quanto à qualidade dos produtos, bem como orientação sobre o uso correto, especialmente quando se trata de medicamentos especiais ou fórmulas manipuladas.
Por isso, contamos com profissionais altamente qualificados, que oferecem assistência farmacêutica personalizada, estão disponíveis para esclarecer dúvidas e, se necessário, entram em contato com o seu médico para entender profundamente o tratamento e proporcionar a melhor orientação.
Nosso compromisso é com o bem-estar e a qualidade de vida dos nossos clientes. Trabalhamos todos os dias com máxima eficiência, atenção e cuidado para acompanhar cada etapa do seu tratamento.
Location: São Caetano do Sul, São Paulo

Name: Oak Lawn Pharmacy Texas
Description:
Welcome to Oak Lawn Pharmacy - Your Trusted Partner in Health and Wellness! 

Located in the heart of the thriving LGBTQ community in Oak Lawn, Dallas, TX, Oak Lawn Pharmacy is not just your typical pharmacy; we are a beacon of care and support for everyone seeking top-notch healthcare solutions. As a locally owned and operated independent pharmacy, our commitment to the community runs deep, and we take immense PRIDE in managing your prescription needs with unwavering dedication.

Specializing in a range of healthcare services, we are proud to offer specialty medications, including those for HIV and Prep, ensuring that you receive the personalized care you deserve. Our team of LGBTQ-friendly staff is passionate about providing exceptional customer service, making you feel right at home when you step through our doors.

Our caring and knowledgeable pharmacist, deeply rooted within Oak Lawn, is dedicated to serving his local community and the greater Dallas area. We believe in building meaningful relationships with our patients, understanding your unique needs, and tailoring our services to meet them precisely.

We understand the importance of convenience in your healthcare journey, which is why we offer free same and next day medication delivery, sometimes even within minutes. Toss away the stress of traveling with medications or worrying about missed doses - let our innovative RxMedPacks handle it for you, ensuring you stay on track with your prescriptions.

Furthermore, our non-sterile pharmaceutical compounding services are here to address your individual needs effectively. With custom compounding, we can create personalized medications that cater to your specific requirements, making your treatment process smoother and more efficient.

At Oak Lawn Pharmacy, we strive to revolutionize your healthcare experience with cutting-edge technology integrated into our dispensing system.

Name: Abdin Pharmacies
Description:
Abdin Pharmacies is an Egyptian pharmacy chain that started in Sohag Governorate, Upper Egypt, and expanded to include Cairo, Giza and most of the Upper Egypt governorates.
Abdin Pharmacies was the first to establish the first Egyptian pharmacies with the Mega Pharmacy system. Abdeen Pharmacies services also include medical devices, sunglasses, children's toys and cosmetics, in addition to special sections in some branches specializing in hospital equipment and medical devices. All products displayed in Abdin Pharmacies are subject to strict pharmaceutical control and supervision by Abdin Pharmacies Management Company and are managed by qualified pharmacists who have been selected according to specific and clear criteria.

Our Mission
To provide an integrated pharmacy service to our customers, at the right time and in the right manner, and to reduce administrative obstacles that may hinder any step towards the health and well-being of Abdin Pharmacies customers.

Our Vision
We strive to provide integrated pharmacy services to our customers, and although dealing with medicines and medical preparations is one of the most important things we can do, Dr. Mohamed Abdin's vision goes beyond that. We aspire to make Abdin Pharmacies the largest provider of pharmaceutical services in Egypt. Within a few years of the launch of Abdin Pharmacies, we have become pioneers in our areas of presence, and we are constantly striving for more. Abdin Pharmacies' activities are constantly expanding, and we will not accept anything less than leadership and providing the best pharmacy service in every field we expand into. We are very excited about the future. As we build on our previous achievements, we hope to enter new fields such as biotechnology, import and export, and pharmaceutical manufacturing. We are committed to our customers to remain leaders in new and existing markets.

Name: NPS Pharmacy
Description:
NPS Pharmacy is on a mission to provide the most judgment-free, culturally competent pharmacy services to patients living with HIV, members of the LGBTQ+ community, communities of color and patients of low socioeconomic status. Today, nearly 20,000  patients from Ryan White/STD Grantees, HIV/AIDS Services Organizations and Federally Qualified Health Centers nationwide get pharmacy services from NPS Pharmacy. 

NPS Pharmacy's expectation is that our team members always go above and beyond to take care of every patient—no matter who they are or where they come from. Unlike our competitors, NPS Pharmacy never puts profit above patients, as our company does not answer to private investors or venture capital firms. We see ourselves as having a bigger purpose than just filling prescriptions and delivering pharmacy services. We believe it is our duty to serve our neighbors, friends, colleagues and acquaintances as unselfishly as possible and to the highest level of service we can deliver. 

CORE BELIEFS
1. Ensure all patients feel valued, seen, heard and appreciated. 
2. Make decisions locally, quickly and always in the best interest of patients. 
3. Do everything with the highest levels of integrity. 
4. Always be 100% honest & transparent. 

DIVERSITY, EQUITY, INCLUSION, & ACCESS
NPS Pharmacy is unapologetically accepting and affirming of diversity, equity, inclusion, and lived experiences as values that shape our future. We believe in actively fostering a culture that respects, celebrates, and values differences, serving as a catalyst to accomplishing our mission of providing pharmacy services in a safe and affirming environment. 

NOTICE 
We reserve the right to delete any posts that contain personal health information (PHI), personally identifiable information (PII), Sensitive Personal Information (SPI), or are approaching HIPAA violations. We also reserve the right to remove comments that are discriminatory, harassing, bullying, threatening, defamatory, or unlawful.

Name: INSIGHT PHARMACY
Description:
Insight Pharmacy  is a subsidiary of Insight Hospitals, a highly regarded pharmacy chain in World. It is the largest and first-ever Omni-Channel Pharmacy network in Asia, with a vast network of over 2500 outlets strategically located in key locations across the Globe. The delivery service covers over 31000+ pin codes, making it highly accessible to people throughout India.

The pharmacy is accredited with an International Quality Certification, which speaks to its commitment to providing authentic and reasonably priced medication round the clock. The 24-hour pharmacies and home delivery network are designed to ensure customers' convenience, while the customer care is available at any time of the day.

Quality is the foundation of Insight Pharmacy's operations. Over the last two decades, the pharmacy has gained extensive experience in pharmacy operations management, and it is dedicated to offering the best services in the industry. The pharmacy is adequately stocked with a comprehensive range of medicines, over-the-counter (OTC), and fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) products. The qualified and experienced staff are available to address all your needs.

Insight pharmacy is a one-stop online destination with a vast range of over 70,000 products in various categories such as vitamins and supplements, baby care, personal care, health, and nutritional foods, and OTC. In addition, the pharmacy has over 400 Insight Branded products available in categories like vitamins and supplements, health food, oral care, skincare, among others.

Name: Pharmacie Apoteca Natura France
Description:
Une santé consciente existe. Unissons-nous pour la transmettre.

Chez Apoteca Natura, depuis plus de 20 ans, nous avons fait le choix d’une santé plus consciente. Nous avons choisi d'agir de manière responsable, durable et transparente, qui soit réellement centrée sur la personne, qui remplisse une fonction économique et sociale et qui œuvre pour le bien commun.

Il s'agit de placer la personne au centre, de l'écouter, de la comprendre et de la guider sur le chemin d'une santé consciente, en lui recommandant des solutions capables de la prendre en charge dans le respect du corps et de l'environnement.

Nous sommes le premier Réseau de Pharmacies Benefit au monde, et avons obtenu la certification B Corp en 2018, en promouvant le Modèle Benefit auprès des Pharmacies du Réseau.

Notre réseau de pharmacies indépendantes Apoteca Natura, né en Italie en 2000, s’est ensuite développé à l'international (Espagne puis Portugal), et arrive aujourd’hui en France. Fort de 1 300 pharmacies adhérentes en Europe, Apoteca Natura démontre que le succès économique peut coexister avec un impact positif sur la société et l'environnement. Cette initiative ouvre la voie à un futur où la santé et la durabilité vont de pair, pour le bien de tous.

Diabetes & metabolic health

Immunity & inflammation

ENT conditions

Paediatric care

Digestive health

Our Signature Patented Line Includes:
— GlycoCare / Glycometacure (Diabetes Support)
— BrainoHealth (Cognitive support)
— Griporelief (Paediatric colic & digestive care)
— OtoTreat (ENT wellness)
