As we continue evolving as a leader in integrative homeopathy, Amazohealth is also expanding into professional training and wellness education, including the GlycoCare Coach Certification — a first-of-its-kind program empowering wellness professionals with a structured diabetes reversal ecosystem.

With 20+ years of clinical leadership, three authored books, and a commitment to precision manufacturing, Amazohealth stands for trust, quality, and transformation.

Experience homeopathy redefined.

Name: Farmácia Economize
Description:
Desde 2008 no ramo
De um grande sonho do seu visionário criador Rodolfo Jaquinta, a Rede Economize nasceu em abril de 2013, com a essência de fornecer experiências novas aos consumidores e preços justos em toda a linha de medicamentos e perfumaria.



Buscando sempre evoluir, a Rede Economize é destaque de mercado em todas as cidades onde as suas lojas estão localizadas. Hoje com o propósito de ajudar na realização dos sonhos de pessoas, a Rede está formatada no modelo de licenciamento de marca, o qual proporciona para donos de farmácias e investidores a oportunidade de fazer parte do melhor modelo de farmácias do Brasil. 



Atualmente, com um faturamento que já ultrapassa a casa dos 200 milhões de reais ao ano, a Rede Economize abre expansão em todo o território nacional, tendo certeza de que onde nasce uma Economize, nasce um destaque de mercado. Nossa gestão é aplicada com muita clareza e assertividade, sempre estamos avaliando de perto o mercado em que estamos inseridos, buscando sempre estar um passo à frente em ideias, tendências e tecnologia para modernizar nossos processos. Trabalhamos com uma gestão de foco em resultados, pautada com muita disciplina que nos traz excelentes resultados.

Name: Global Services
Description:
Founded in 1998 , Global Services has established itself as one of the biggest and most reputable partner-in-progress for the Scientific fraternity in India.
Our goal and commitment is to bridge the gap between the end users and manufacturers by providing access to state of the art equipment from global manufacturers which support users with value throughout the workflow requirements.
We started as a small business in 1998. Founded by Ravi Vadyala, ours is a story of humble beginnings. The Pharma sector was gaining significance in the state of Andhra Pradesh and we began supplying Lab chemicals, glassware, consumables to government research labs and industries in the city of Hyderabad. With time, we expanded our business by adding products and providing solutions pertaining to analytical and microbiology applications for a wide range of market segments.
Today, we have a strong sales and marketing team, and a customer support team and an exceptionally trained technical support and service team, all built on our core values of customer first mindset. We take this opportunity to thank our beloved customers profusely for all the unconditional support and trust they shower on us.

Name: Bell Pharmacy, Camden NJ
Description: Bell Pharmacy was established in 1931 at the corner of Haddon & Kaighns Avenue in the historic Parkside neighborhood of Camden, NJ. We are proud to be Camden's oldest family owned & operated neighborhood pharmacy. Bell Pharmacy remains committed to the "old fashioned" practice model of personal service provided by pharmacist owners. As the field of health care in general, & pharmacy in particular, continues to evolve, we've expanded our service based model to accommodate these new dynamics. While maintaining our core mission as a traditional neighborhood pharmacy, we've expanded our practice to encompass many new & often underserved areas. These include; compounding(non-sterile),specialty pharmacy,HIV certified disease state management,PrEP counseling,comprehensive specialized services for the LGBTQ community, Narcan dispensing/opioid addiction services, & mobile immunization clinics. We are a certified 340-B pharmacy & offer comprehensive solutions for home healthcare providers & adult day care centers. Bell Pharmacy also partners with drug manufacturers in limited distribution agreements, & we serve as regional distribution partner for several national pharmacy "hub" services. We are licensed to ship to most states.

Name: DéPhie
Description:
Le groupement DéPhie a été créé en 2015 par des pharmaciens d’officine pour des pharmaciens d’officine. Il est dirigé par Béatrice Cosson, pharmacien riche d’une expérience en officine et dans la répartition pharmaceutique.

La force de Déphie est d’assurer aux pharmaciens la puissance des négociations groupées générique et grossiste et la vérification mensuelle du versement des conditions. Leurs partenaires exclusifs sont Viatris et le grossiste-répartiteur l'OCP.

DéPhie propose un catalogue de conditions négociées auprès de laboratoires en direct ou par l’intermédiaire d’une centrale d’achat.

Le groupement DéPhie accompagne les pharmaciens dans le développement de leurs compétences et les transformations du métier de pharmacien tout en conservant leur indépendance :

 Organisation de formations
 Accompagnement dans la mise de la mise en place de la certification qualité
 Accompagnement dans la digitalisation de l’officine (réseaux sociaux, dématérialisation du suivi des factures, des litiges et des plans trade)
 Aide au recrutement de collaborateurs


Le groupement constitue une communauté de pharmaciens solidaires regroupés autour des valeurs de partage, solidarité, transparence et proximité. Cette approche collaborative est bénéfique pour l’ensemble du groupement.

En résumé, au sein de DéPhie, le pharmacien est au centre de la stratégie de développement du groupement, il bénéficie d’une optimisation de sa rentabilité, de gain de temps, il est force de proposition, vote les décisions d’orientation et de mise en place de partenariats et partage ses préoccupations de chef d’entreprise avec ses confrères.

Le pharmacien est au cœur du modèle économique du groupement, il ne paie pas de cotisation mensuelle et bénéficie d’un versement de dividendes en fin d’année.

Name: Télépharmacie Pascale Arsenault, pharmacienne inc.
Description:
La TPA est une entreprise qui met à disposition des professionnels de la pharmacie à distance..
Notre équipe de pharmaciens, techniciens et infirmières cliniciennes se connecte directement à votre système pour fournir des soins de qualité aux patients de votre succursale.
De la saisie de prescriptions à leur analyse, en passant par les demandes de consultation de toutes natures ainsi que les sorties d'hôpital, notre équipe peut effectuer pratiquement toutes les tâches en télétravail.
L'employé du laboratoire n'a qu'à sélectionner le type de rendez-vous souhaité et l'heure qui convient à votre patient, et nous nous occupons du reste au moment opportun !
Nous ne vous demandons pas de vous engager à réserver un nombre fixe de services. Votre demande peut donc varier de 0 à 50 d'une journée à l'autre, et nous serons en mesure d'y répondre.
Nos plages horaires constituent notre atout majeur. Notre équipe est disponible en semaine jusqu'à 20h et le week-end jusqu'à 16h.
Étant directement connectés à votre système RxPro, c'est vous qui percevez l'intégralité des honoraires de nos services.
Notre projet est soigneusement encadré par des avocats et a été soumis aux parties prenantes avant d'être proposé. Par conséquent, nous vous garantissons un service fiable et sécurisé. Récemment, nous avons même réussi à intégrer avec succès la signature électronique dans notre pratique à distance, permettant ainsi l'impression directe sur place.
Faire appel à la TPA vous permet donc d'accéder facilement à une main-d'œuvre qualifiée au moment précis où votre équipe en a besoin. La facturation est effectuée chaque semaine et dépend uniquement du nombre et du type de rendez-vous que vous aurez réservés. Ainsi, vous bénéficiez d'une flexibilité totale et d'un contrôle sur les coûts liés à nos services.
La TPA : votre solution pour économiser, simplifier votre problème de main-d'œuvre, améliorer la qualité de vos services et gagner du temps pour l'implantation du télétravail à l'interne.

Name: Farmácia Posanga
Description:
Farmácia de manipulação 
Dourados-MS
Segunda à sexta | 8h às 18h
Aos sábados | 8h às 12h

A Farmácia Posanga está situada em Dourados/MS e foi fundada em 09 de julho de 1986. A princípio a empresa comercializava produtos naturais e fitoterápicos, a partir do ano 1988, iniciou a manipulação de fórmulas homeopáticas e, após alguns anos a manipulação de fórmulas alopáticas.

A proposta da Posanga farmácia de manipulação é oferecer a máxima qualidade em seus produtos e serviços, e também para fazer o que é o mais importante para nós: "Promover o bem-estar físico e mental aos nossos clientes, com produtos de qualidade voltados para a saúde e beleza dos mesmos".

Nossa Política de Qualidade visa a manipulação de fórmulas com excelência de qualidade e em cumprimento a legislação vigente, adquirindo matérias primas de qualidade, de fornecedores qualificados e buscando a melhoria contínua do processo de produção.

Para tanto, nesses muitos anos, investimos em processos de melhoria contínua, controle de qualidade, equipamentos, treinamentos e capacitação de nossa equipe, visando sempre o melhor para nossos clientes.

A farmácia Posanga manipula medicamentos alopáticos e homeopáticos, bem como substâncias sujeitas à controle especial, hormônios, antibióticos e citostáticos. Essas formulações são manipuladas em cápsulas, sachês, comprimidos orodispersíveis, xaropes, soluções orais, géis, cremes, entre muitas outras opções.

Desde 2013 estamos cuidando do seu PET, pois obtivemos licença do Ministério da Agricultura e Pecuária (MAPA) para a manipulação de formulações para uso veterinário.

No ano de 2018, decidimos inovar novamente e implantar nosso site com loja virtual, em um novo conceito de farmácia, com linha própria de medicamentos, fitoterápicos, cosméticos desenvolvidos para atender as necessidades dos clientes. Produtos diferenciados, elaborados com os melhores ativos do mercado cosmético e farmacêutico, buscando os melhores resultados.

Name: Be.multti
Description:
Nossa jornada se iniciou em 2020, em meio a um dos maiores desafios de saúde pública da humanidade. Depois de alguns anos trabalhando com vitaminas e minerais em grandes empresas, entendemos que para podermos realmente ajudar as pessoas a terem acesso a melhor nutrição e qualidade de vida por meio da suplementação, precisaríamos simplificar a proposta.

Fomos aprofundar o conhecimento que já tínhamos do mercado para entender quais seriam as reais motivações das pessoas para consumirem suplementos, e principalmente, o que as afastava dessa categoria.

Encontramos muitas respostas pelo caminho e a certeza de que o universo de suplementos ainda era um quebra-cabeças.

Nossa missão então foi além de desenvolver produtos de qualidade. Nossa missão estava em tornar a escolha prática, consciente, individual e ao mesmo tempo acessível.

Reunimos um time de especialistas e desenvolvemos fórmulas inéditas no mercado brasileiro. Composições únicas e multifuncionais, com ingredientes naturais e de alta performance.

Entendemos que todo consumidor de vitaminas e minerais busca, em primeiro lugar, ter mais disposição e fortalecer a sua imunidade. Por isso, todos os nossos MULTTIS possuem em sua composição os nutrientes essenciais para atender a estas duas necessidades. E para individualizar nossa proposta, cada MULTTI ainda conta com um benefício extra, alinhado aos principais objetivos dos consumidores brasileiros.

Assim nasceu a linha BeMultti. Multivitamínicos que atendem a diversas necessidades, garantindo ENERGIA E IMUNIDADE em qualquer escolha.

Não encontrou um Be Multti que seja a sua cara? Entre em contato com a gente. Teremos o prazer de trabalhar em uma versão que atenda a sua forma de viver.

Be Multti. Múltiplas formas de viver.

Name: Axcess Pharmacy
Description:
Axcess Pharmacy: Closing the Healthcare Equity Gap in Africa

At Axcess Pharmacy, we’re transforming how healthcare is delivered in underserved communities by reimagining pharmacies as primary care hubs.

We are called to rebuild health systems and improve outcomes for the 1.2 billion underserved people in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs)—where 70% seek care first at pharmacies, yet over half of that care is delivered without trained professionals.

Our solution: a scalable group pharmacy practice model that goes beyond dispensing to deliver community-based, professionalized care.

We are:
•	Raising healthcare leadership through workforce learning, peer-led development, and Contract Research equipped pharmacy teams.
•	Strengthening the supply chain to ensure quality, availability, and affordability of essential medicines.
•	Delivering primary care services that are person-centered, dignified, and outcome based.

We’re more than a pharmacy chain—we’re a care movement built on three pillars and a bold vision:

One pharmacy. One leader. One community at a time.

Description:
A Rede MaxiFarma nasceu no início dos anos 1990, com a proposta de ser referência no ramo farmacêutico.

Missão
A Maxifarma tem como vocação a administração próspera entre licenciados e fornecedores, fornecendo meios e ações que possibilitem objetivos claros e benéficos para ambos, visando sempre a satisfação do consumidor final.

Visão
A Maxifarma tem como objetivo expandir sua atuação de forma vertical, agregando valor com serviços, presença na comunidade e oferta de produtos de qualidade; e de forma horizontal, expandindo sua rede para o interior do Paraná e para Santa Catarina.

Valores
Ética. Acreditamos que parcerias são contratos de confiança que criam vínculos, devem ser honrados para gerar relações duradouras e negócios futuros.

Transparência. As ações são sempre realizadas de forma clara e objetiva, definindo-se o papel de cada um e a expectativa de crescimento de participação e de imagem.

Respeito. A Maxifarma deve ser vista como um processo de satisfação de seus clientes, na procura do seu bem-estar, e não simplesmente como venda de produtos e serviços.

Name: Jan Sanjeevani Generic Pharmacy
Description:
Health should never be considered a luxury in the hectic world of today. We are aware that the cost of healthcare can be prohibitive, with costs for doctors, diagnostic procedures, hospital stays, and prescriptions frequently reaching unbelievable heights. Our goal is to provide every Indian with access to high-quality healthcare.

Our motivation comes from the visionaries who have steered our country, such Prime Minister Narendra Modi and the late Prime Minister Atal Bihari Vajpayee. They are our inspiration because of their commitment to the health of our people and their relentless work to advance the nation's healthcare system.

The demand for widespread access to cheap drugs led to the creation of Jan Sanjeevani. We understand the difficulties experienced by people who, although having a strong desire to work in healthcare, are constrained by a lack of funding. Our mission is to assist future chemists and medical professionals who want to help the public. By taking care of their financial requirements, we give them the ability to establish their own businesses while guaranteeing that the general public receives high-quality, reasonably priced medications.

Our qualified and committed pharmacists are not only committed to their work but also to your health. Access to skilled healthcare professionals who can prescribe the appropriate medications while taking into account contraindications and negative drug responses is essential in a large and diverse country like India. By offering knowledgeable advice and assistance to our fellow citizens, the Jan Sanjeevani team aims to improve the standard of healthcare services and lower the mortality rate.

At Jan Sanjeevani, we are adamant that having excellent health is a fundamental human right, not a privilege. We are striving for a better and happier India with the help of our dedicated chemists and the determination to make healthcare accessible to all.

Description:
At AllDay, we believe in the transformative power of nutrition to improve lives. As a niche retail pharmacy chain, we have dedicated ourselves to a singular mission: helping people live healthier lives through the power of nutrition. This commitment is our passion and our purpose.

Our Core Values

Health Empowerment: We empower our customers and our team members to make informed choices about their health. We believe that everyone has the potential to lead a healthier life, and we are here to guide and support them on their journey.

We have innovated a system that reduces costs by eliminating unnecessary operational overhead like middlemen, distribution channels, and extensive staffing. Moreover, we have automated the purchasing process, making it easier and more efficient.

By working directly with international distributors and manufacturers, Pharmaco allows customers to order pharmaceuticals at an average of 50% lower price, making essential medication more accessible to everyone. We offer convenient delivery to any location, ensuring our customers receive their medications swiftly and securely.

Our primary customers are individuals with chronic diseases who require long-term medication and small to medium-sized hospitals seeking cost-effective and efficient pharmaceutical sourcing. Name: NextRx
Description:
No more middlemen
Lots more savings

Tired of an ever-changing, complex, and unfair prescription drug system? We are too. Bypass the traditional middlemen, get direct pricing and reduce prescription costs by up to 80%.

The future of
pharmacy is here

Traditional pharmacies answer to insurance companies and so-called discount programs that drive up costs and stand between you and signiﬁcant savings. NextRx isn’t obligated to any insurance or any 3rd party contracts. Our pharmacy is more responsive and less expensive because we don’t spend hours on the phone convincing insurance to pay for your medication.

No monthly membership.

Stop overpaying 
Start saving

NextRx is here to make a positive difference in the health of our customers and our community. We simplify the process and continually work with you and your prescriber to provide the most affordable options available—finally, a pharmacy that works best for your health and your budget.

Name: Farmacia Rotondo
Description:
La nostra filosofia si fonda sull’ascolto, sulla professionalità e sulla continua attenzione alle esigenze individuali di ciascun cliente. Ogni giorno ci impegniamo affinché la farmacia non sia solo un luogo di dispensazione di farmaci, ma uno spazio di fiducia, dialogo e supporto.

Il cliente è e rimarrà sempre al centro della nostra missione, seguendo l’esempio e i valori trasmessi con dedizione e passione dal dott. Franco e dal dott. Leonardo, punti di riferimento per tutta la comunità. Il loro approccio umano e la visione orientata alla salute globale della persona continuano a guidare il nostro operato quotidiano.

Grazie alla competenza, all’aggiornamento continuo e alla disponibilità dei nostri collaboratori, siamo in grado di offrire un servizio di elevata qualità. Ogni membro del nostro team condivide l’obiettivo comune di prendersi cura della persona, con attenzione, empatia e professionalità, offrendo consulenze personalizzate, soluzioni mirate e un ascolto sempre attento.

Alla Farmacia Rotondo crediamo che la salute sia un valore da coltivare ogni giorno, attraverso piccoli gesti, consigli mirati e un’accoglienza sincera. Ed è proprio con questo spirito che ci impegniamo quotidianamente, al servizio del benessere di tutti.

Name: Encon Pharma
Description:
Most community pharmacies are sitting on unclaimed NHS revenue. Not because they are lazy, they are just too busy.

That's where we come in.

Encon Pharma helps UK pharmacies squeeze more value from the New Medicines Service without drowning in admin. Our platform handles the grunt work: tracking patients, automating outreach, managing follow-ups.

The result? More completed NMS consultations. More revenue. Less stress.

Whether you are a single-site independent or a growing chain, we have built tools that actually work for how busy pharmacies operate.

Simple and effective while you focus on caring for your patients.

Name: Associatie van Ketenapotheken (ASKA)
Description:
De Associatie van Ketenapotheken (ASKA) is een branchevereniging van ketenapotheken. Leden zijn ketenapotheken met minstens 15 eigendomsapotheken. De vereniging is opgericht in 2004 en behartigt collectief een aantal zakelijke belangen van de leden. Op de kerntaken arbeidszaken, NZa en wet- en regelgeving wordt door de leden collectief samengewerkt. ASKA vertegenwoordigt haar leden in commissies van de NZa en overlegt namens de leden met het ministerie van VWS.

De werkgeversvereniging ASKA sluit, samen met collega werkgeversorganisaties, namens de leden Cao’s af met vakbonden en benoemt namens ketenapotheken vertegenwoordigers in onder andere SBA en PMA.

De leden van ASKA vertegenwoordigen samen 450 eigendomsapotheken en ca. 5.000 werknemers in de openbare farmacie.

Name: Arslanoglou Pharmacy
Description:
Η Ιστορία Μας
1979: Η ιστορία των φαρμακείων μας ξεκινά με το άνοιγμα του πρώτου μας φαρμακείου στην καρδιά της Θεσσαλονίκης, στην οδό Κομνηνών, στα Λουλουδάδικα. Η τότε επωνυμία του ήταν Φαρμακείο Καραπατάκη, ένα όνομα που για δεκαετίες συνδέθηκε στην πόλη της Θεσσαλονίκης με τη συνέπεια, την επαγγελματική συνείδηση και την αξιοπιστία.
2017: Η επωνυμία της επιχείρησης αλλάζει σε Φαρμακείο Αρσλάνογλου, το όνομα που διατηρούμε ακόμα και σήμερα. Τα αδέρφια Αρσλάνογλου αναλαμβάνουν το φαρμακείο, εκσυγχρονίζοντας την οικογενειακή επιχείρηση. 
2021: Δημιουργούμε το Heals Online Pharmacy, ένα ηλεκτρονικό κατάστημα (e-shop) φαρμακείου, με πάνω από 12.000 κωδικούς προϊόντων που μας δίνει πλέον τη δυνατότητα να εξυπηρετούμε ανθρώπους σε ολόκληρη την Ελλάδα.
2022: Ανοίγουμε το μεγαλύτερο και πιο εκσυγχρονισμένο φαρμακείο στη Βόρεια Ελλάδα, στην οδό Μάρκου Μπότσαρη.
2024: Ανοίγουμε το τρίτο μας φαρμακείο στην οδό Μεταμορφώσεως, στην Καλαμαριά.
Οι Άνθρωποί Μας
Στα Φαρμακεία Αρσλάνογλου απασχολούμε εξειδικευμένους επιστήμονες. Εκπαιδευμένοι και ενημερωμένοι, προσφέρουμε εξειδικευμένες συμβουλές και εξυπηρέτηση μέσω διαφόρων καναλιών επικοινωνίας.
Οι Στόχοι Μας
Να παρέχουμε στους πελάτες μας την καλύτερη δυνατή εξυπηρέτηση.
Να προσφέρουμε μια ευρεία γκάμα προϊόντων και υπηρεσιών υγείας.
Να συνεργαζόμαστε με τους κορυφαίους προμηθευτές στον κλάδο.
Να διασφαλίζουμε την ασφάλεια και την ποιότητα των προϊόντων μας.
Να διατηρήσουμε την ανταγωνιστικότητά μας σε μια συνεχώς μεταβαλλόμενη αγορά.
Να συμβάλουμε στην ευημερία της τοπικής κοινωνίας
Να βελτιωνόμαστε συνεχώς.
Γιατί Εμάς
Είμαστε αφοσιωμένοι στην υγεία και την ευεξία. Προσφέρουμε ποικιλία προϊόντων σε ανταγωνιστικές τιμές, με εξειδικευμένες συμβουλές και γρήγορη παράδοση.
Το Όραμά Μας
Στο heals.gr και στα Φαρμακεία Αρσλάνογλου, πιστεύουμε ότι η υγεία και η ευεξία είναι αναντικατάστατες. Στόχος μας είναι να παρέχουμε το σωστό προϊόν, για τους σωστούς λόγους, στη σωστή τιμή.
Εμπιστευτείτε τους ειδικούς!

Name: Soficopharm Global
Description:
Soficopharm, founded by Dr. Maher Scandar, has been a pharmaceutical importation and distribution leader since the late 1970s. Building on a legacy from the 1950s, the company has grown to serve the market with over 1,000 SKUs from more than 15 global partners. With offices in Ghana, Uganda, Niger, and Kazakhstan, Soficopharm Global offers comprehensive services to ensure efficient distribution and product availability, including order fulfillment, customer care, product returns, compliance, and market strategies.
Mr. Karim El Ashram proudly represents the third generation of leadership at Soficopharm Global, carrying forward a rich family legacy in the medical and pharmaceutical industry. Under his guidance, the company is embarking on an ambitious journey of global expansion, driven by a commitment to excellence and innovation that has been cultivated over generations.
As we extend our reach across international borders, we remain steadfast in our core mission: to serve and support both patients and the broader healthcare community. This dual focus on global growth and unwavering dedication to health outcomes reflects the values instilled by previous generations and further developed under Mr. El Ashram's leadership with his mentor’s Dr. Ezzat Scandar’s guidance.
Our legacy is not just about longevity, but about the positive impact we continually strive to make. With each new market we enter and each new product we develop, we carry forward our family's vision of improving lives through advanced medical and pharmaceutical solutions.
Looking to the future, Mr. El Ashram is committed to building upon this strong foundation, ensuring that Soficopharm Global remains a beacon of innovation, reliability, and compassionate care in the global healthcare landscape for generations to come.

Name: CNP PPO
Description:
Un Conseil National Professionnel (CNP) est une association de type loi 1901 créée à l’initiative des professionnels de santé pour rassembler l’ensemble des professionnels de santé d’une même spécialité, afin d’effectuer notamment, les missions suivantes :

proposer les orientations prioritaires de Développement Professionnel Continu (DPC)
proposer les candidatures de sa spécialité pour siéger dans les Commissions Scientifiques Indépendantes (CSI) dans le cadre de la formation continue et du développement professionnel continu (DPC)
proposer le parcours pluriannuel de DPC
proposer des outils de traçabilité d’actions de DPC réalisées
apporter la contribution des professionnels de santé susceptibles d’être désignés en tant qu’experts, dans les domaines scientifiques et opérationnels du métier
désigner, à la demande de l’Etat, des représentants de la profession pour siéger dans les structures appelées à émettre des avis sur les demandes d’autorisations d’exercice ou de reconnaissance des qualifications professionnelles

Name: MedApp Nederland
Description:
Voor een zorgprofessional is het belang van adequate therapietrouw geen geheim. Helaas slaagt zo’n veertig procent van de patiënten er niet in om consequent medicatie toe te dienen. Er liggen meer dan driehonderd oorzaken hieraan ten grondslag, waarvan een groot deel te classificeren valt als uitstelgedrag, vergeetachtigheid of onvoldoende voorraad. MedApp geeft medicijngebruikers grip op medicatie door een oplossing te bieden die daadwerkelijk werkt.  
 	
Bovendien gaat MedApp verder dan de medicijngebruiker door de link naar de professionele zorgwereld. Door de registratie van medicijninnames kan een zorgverlener gemakkelijk inzichten vergaren in het innamegedrag binnen de populatie en kan een apotheker eenvoudig alle patiënten van herhaalmedicatie voorzien door de geïntegreerde herhaalservice. Hiermee bevordert MedApp therapietrouw. 
 
Neem vrijblijvend contact met ons op voor informatie over toepassingen bij apotheken, ziekenhuizen en farma.

Website: https://medapp.nu/
Helpdesk: +31 (0)40 782 0817
Zakelijk: +31 (0)40 782 0813 
E-mail: info@medapp.nu

Name: Montana Family Pharmacies
Description:
Independent pharmacies around Montana (and the country) are going out of business – the pharmacies that actually take the time to get to know their patients, understand their health concerns, and help them become the healthiest version of themselves.

People are being all but forced to fill their prescriptions online or at big box stores where the pharmacists are time-pressured and unable to adequately help them on their health journeys.

In 2014, our founder, Mike Matovich, realized if he didn't do something to collaborate with other independently-owned pharmacies around Montana, they would all end up out of business and their customers – and communities – would suffer the consequences.

So, he and five other pharmacy business owners came together and decided to form a group to help them negotiate better product pricing, improve insurance reimbursements, and more effectively run and market their businesses. 

It was then that Montana Family Pharmacies (MFP) was born. 

Since then, over 60 Montana pharmacies – and beyond – have become Montana Family Pharmacies Members. What started out as a buying group has evolved into a business consulting service, marketing firm, and pioneer of patient health management programs and services.  

We’ve worked tirelessly to help some of our Members avoid closure, others compete more effectively with the chains in their towns, and ultimately, positively impact the communities and improve the health of the friends and families our Members serve.  

If you're an independent pharmacy owner who wants to survive in today’s marketplace, we would love to help you! Contact us to learn how to become a Member.  

If you’re a patient looking for more personalized care than you currently get from your pharmacy – a place where they actually take the time to get to know you and your specific health care needs – find your local Montana Family Pharmacies Member pharmacy at www.montanafamilypharmacies.com.

La nostra vision guarda al futuro della farmacia: più orientata ai servizi, più digitale, più vicina alle nuove esigenze dei cittadini. Un futuro che costruiamo insieme, senza rinunciare ai valori dell’indipendenza.

Grundpfeiler der gesunden Hautpflege aus Apotheken

Auch Pflegeprodukte aus APOTHEKEN können gesundheitsbelastende Inhaltsstoffe enthalten z.B.:

 Mikroplastik
 flüssige Kunststoffe
 hormonell wirkende Stoffe 
 giftige Farbstoffe 
 krebserregende PFAS

Diese Stoffe gelangen über Abwässer in die Natur. Sie reichern sich in der Nahrungskette an und sind schädlich für unsere Gesundheit.

 Ziel von dermaplastik:

Mit schadstofffreien Pflegeprodukten bekannter Marken aus APOTHEKEN 
 
 Gesundheit schützen
 Schadstoffe reduzieren
 die Umwelt erhalten

 Wie macht das dermaplastik?

 Unsere Infoplattform dermaplastik.de listet ausschließlich gesundheitsfreundliche Produkte bekannter Marken aus APOTHEKEN.

 Und das kannst du beitragen:

 Deine Entscheidung! 
Du hast die Wahl und kannst dich für deine Gesundheit einsetzen, indem du bewusst Hautpflegeprodukte über unsere Infoplattform wählst oder empfiehlst. 

 Deine Chance! 
Die Empfehlung unbedenklicher Produkte von dermaplastik steigert das Image deiner APOTHEKE, PRAXIS oder KLINIK! 

 So einfach ist dein persönlicher Weg zur Gesundheit und zu einem gesunden Planeten!

 Was kostet dich das?

Nichts. Die Nutzung unserer Plattform ist für dich kostenlos. Du kannst die Infos einfach in deinen Arbeitsalltag integrieren oder privat nutzen. 

 Und das sind bereits unsere Partner:

 Geschäftspartner: Pierre Fabre, Eco Elio, boep, Biostastics, e.cooline, samplistick 
 Startups mit klarem Mehrwert: z. B. Biovox, DocGreen, go.ecoblister, e.boten.de, Zuke Green, FDA FragDieApotheke usw.

At Adwitiya Healthcare, we’re on a mission to change the way India experiences healthcare.

Our name, Adwitiya — meaning “unique” — reflects our commitment to building India’s largest chain of neighborhood pharmacies with fair, transparent pricing every single day. No hidden markups. No gimmicks. No flash sales. Just the trust and consistency your health deserves.

We’re more than pharmacies — we’re part of your community. Our stores are staffed with qualified pharmacists who greet you by name, understand your needs, and treat your health like it’s their own.

Because when healthcare is fair, accessible, and human, entire neighborhoods thrive. And that’s the India we’re working toward — one neighborhood at a time.

Mission:
To make quality healthcare accessible and affordable to every Indian, through a transparent and trustworthy pharmacy network.

Values:

Honesty: Clear pricing, no games.

Affordability: Fair prices every day.

Accessibility: Pharmacies where people live, not miles away.

Community: Serving with care, not just selling products.

#AdwitiyaHealthcare #IndiasHealthOneNeighborhoodAtATime #FairPricesEveryDay #HonestHealthcare #NoPromoCodes #NoGimmicks #TransparentPricing #HealthcareForAll #NeighborhoodPharmacy #TrustMatters

Description:
«داروخانه آنلاین زیوش»، نسخه آنلاین از داروخانه «تکفارم» است که در سال 1398 تاسیس شد. این وبسایت در ابتدا با نام «دارومارکت» فعالیت خود را با نگرشی متفاوت به مقوله درمان، سلامت و زندگی شاد و نیز با هدف ارتقای کیفیت زندگی مخاطبانش آغاز کرد. بهره مندی از تجارب بهترین متخصصان این حرفه، پس از مدت سه سال تجربه مستمر کاری در فضای آنلاین، حس ما از «مارکت» و «فروش» را به سمت ارتقای سلامت جامعه متمایل کرد. به همین خاطر نیازمند فضایی بودیم که بتواند بستری مناسب برای هدف و رویای ما در اختیارمان قرار دهد. 
 
داروخانه آنلاین زیوش، فعالیت خود را با دریافت مجوز رسمی از وزارت بهداشت و تحت نظر سازمان غذا و دارو آغاز کرده است. داروخانه زیوش، داروخانهای مدرن در زمینه فروش انواع محصولات آرایشی، بهداشتی، درمانی، محصولات جنسی و مکملهای درمانی، کمک درمانی و ورزشی است؛ مهمترین اصل ما در گروه زیوش، رضایت مشتریان، کیفیت و اصالت کالا، ارائه مشاوره تخصصی توسط کارشناسان متخصص و پزشکان داروساز مورد اعتماد است.
ما در زیوش شرایطی را فراهم کردهایم تا شما بتوانید علاوه بر خریدی راحت و مطمئن، پشتیبانی 24 ساعته را تجربه کنید. «زیوش» از شما و برای شماست! «تا چه قبول افتد و که در نظر آید...».

Name: ICT Farmacêutica
Description:
O ICT Farmacêutica é um laboratório de manipulação especializada em medicamentos injetáveis, com atuação nas áreas da oftalmologia, estética, ortomolecular, medicina integrativa e urologia.

Desde 2021, operamos com foco técnico, inovação e responsabilidade sanitária, oferecendo soluções personalizadas e seguras para profissionais da saúde que exigem alto desempenho e precisão nas formulações.

Nosso trabalho é baseado em evidência, controle de qualidade rigoroso e um time altamente capacitado. Atuamos com excelência técnica em todas as etapas: da análise da prescrição à manipulação, controle e liberação final do medicamento.

Investimos em Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento para criar fórmulas estáveis, eficazes e alinhadas com os avanços da medicina. Temos estrutura, método e uma cultura profissional que valoriza segurança de processo, clareza na comunicação e responsabilidade com o resultado.

Nossa operação é sustentada por três pilares: segurança, entrega e presença. Isso significa executar com rigor técnico, cumprir compromissos e manter uma postura profissional ativa diante dos desafios do dia a dia.

Somos um laboratório especializado que entende a importância de cada detalhe na rotina clínica do prescritor. Por isso, crescemos rápido, com consistência e visão de longo prazo.

Nosso objetivo é claro: sermos reconhecidos como o maior e mais confiável laboratório magistral do Brasil.

Name: Choice Pharmacy & Compounding Center
Description:
In the relatively short but impactful history of our pharmacy, which was established in 2012, we have witnessed a remarkable transformation in the field of pharmaceutical care. Since our inception, our primary mission has been to provide accessible, personalized, and high-quality healthcare services to our community. In our early years, we began as a modest neighborhood pharmacy, serving the immediate healthcare needs of our local residents. Over time, we’ve grown to become a trusted healthcare resource, continuously evolving to meet the changing needs of our patients.

As we reflect on our journey, we’re immensely proud of the milestones we’ve achieved. Our commitment to patient-centric care has remained unwavering. We’ve invested in state-of-the-art technology to enhance prescription accuracy and streamline processes, making healthcare more convenient for our patients. In addition to dispensing medications, our services have expanded to include medication therapy management, immunization clinics, and health education programs. Our pharmacy has become a focal point for health and wellness, actively engaging with the community through outreach initiatives, health fairs, and partnerships with local healthcare providers. With every passing year, we look forward to continuing our legacy of providing exceptional care and contributing to the well-being of our community.

Name: BENU Apoteka
Description:
BENU je vodeći farmaceutski maloprodajni brend u kontinentalnoj Evropi. Preko 1400 apoteka u 14 zemalja i preko 8500 zaposlenih daju svoj stalni doprinos razvoju vrhunske zdravstvene usluge, o čemu svedoči i 65 miliona zadovoljnih kupaca širom Evrope. Od januara 2014. godine BENU je prisutan i na tržištu Srbije, a u ponudi se može naći široka paleta lekova, medicinske kozmetike i drugih proizvoda.

Naša misija je da Vam ponudimo vrhunsku farmaceutsku uslugu u našim inovativnim apotekama.
Posetite nas i osetite BENU iskustvo.

BENU apoteke odlikuje nov i moderan pristup u sprovođenju farmaceutske usluge u oblasti medicinske zaštite i prevencije. Prillagođena zahtevima savremenog potrošača, BENU apoteka pruža mogućnost samostalnog istraživanja proizvoda uz konsultacije sa stručnim farmaceutima i u skladu sa principima dobre farmaceutske prakse.

BENU brend svoju prepoznatljivost zasniva i na jedinstvenom stilu izlaganja proizvoda i modernom i privlačnom dizajnu enterijera apoteke, kombinaciji svedene forme, komfora i topline koji čine jedinstven osećaj udobnosti i dobrodošlice u svakom objektu BENU. Izlaganje proizvoda u BENU apotekama zasniva se na konceptu otvorene apoteke, slobodnog prostora i direktnog pristupa atraktivnom asortimanu.

Stručno i ljubazno osoblje BENU apoteka pružiće pravi savet i olakšati izbor proizvoda, jer svakom kupcu pristupa sa aspekta specifičnosti njegovih potreba.

Name: Discount Drug Stores
Description:
Discount Drug Stores began with just one store in Queensland in 2001. Now it is one of the largest pharmacy brands in Australia with over 120 stores across the nation. 

Established by experienced pharmacists Peter Newman, John Clark and Rosa Chen, it is Discount Drug Stores’ mission to make a positive difference to its customers’ wellbeing by providing quality medicines and healthcare solutions at an affordable price. 

On 8th September 2014, Discount Drug Stores entered into a sale agreement with Central Healthcare (CH), a wholly owned subsidiary of Sigma Pharmaceuticals Ltd (Sigma). At almost 130 stores strong at the time, DDS had become one of the fastest growing brands in Australia. 

Discount Drug Stores takes an uncompromising approach towards the delivery of professional heath advice and exemplary customer service, which is why its customers will travel out of their way to shop at its pharmacies. 

Safety Reporting & Medical Enquiries:
To report adverse events, side effects and medical enquiries, please call 1800 331 792 or email us at medicalenquiry@sigmahealthcare.com.au

Please include details about the product, the adverse event or side effect and your contact details.  Please do not provide information about another individual unless you have their express consent to do so.

Please note all personal and health information will be dealt with in accordance with our privacy policy which is available at  www.sigmahealthcare.com.au/privacy-policy

For medical emergencies, please contact your Healthcare Professional, Poisons Information Centre or, emergency services. Discount Drug Stores does not provide medical advice.

Description:
EUROAPOTHECA is an international group of Northern European companies that operate retail pharmacy chains and pharmaceutical wholesale companies as well as online pharmacies in Lithuania, Sweden, Latvia, and Estonia. EUROAPOTHECA group was established in 1998.
EUROAPOTHECA group comprises 767 pharmacies and 118 franchised pharmacies in four countries and more than 6600 employees. EUROAPOTHECA controls pharmacy chain Eurovaistinė (265 pharmacies) in Lithuania, Euroaptieka (55 pharmacies) in Latvia, operates Euroapteek franchise network (73 franchised pharmacies) in Estonia, and has 50% shareholding in Swedish Pharmacy Holding AB, which controls pharmacy chain Kronans Apotek (447 pharmacies and 45 franchised pharmacies) in Sweden.
EUROAPOTHECA is a member of “Vilniaus Prekyba” – private holding company which oversees, controls and manages the group of subsidiary companies operating the chains of retail stores, pharmacies and real estate development and management companies in the Baltic States, Sweden, Poland and Bulgaria.

Name: Dr. Max Slovensko
Description:
Sme jednotkou v starostlivosti a máme recept aj na vašu kariéru.

Lekárne Dr. Max vznikli v roku 2006 spojením viacerých verejných lekárni, s cieľom poskytovať MAXimálnu lekárenskú starostlivosť dostupnú regionálne na celom území Slovenskej republiky, o čom hovorí aj aktuálny počet našich lekární, ktorých je viac ako 400.

Naši kolegovia v lekárňach poskytujú pacientom na celom Slovensku starostlivosť a odborné poradenstvo už 18 rokov. V súčasnosti zamestnávame viac ako 2 600 zamestnancov v lekárňach, na centrálach v Bratislave a Košiciach, v e-shope v Senci a v distribučnej spoločnosti ViaPharma, ktorých prácu si nesmierne vážime.

Našim zamestnancom, ale aj zákazníkom prinášame jedinečnú starostlivosť. Zdieľame spoločné hodnoty, navzájom sa podporujeme, kolegom ponúkame možnosť participovať na spoločnom úspechu.

Už niekoľko rokov po sebe sme hrdým nositeľom ocenenia #najzamestnavatel v kategórii Nemocnice a zdravotná starostlivosť, k čomu pristupujeme s obrovskou pokorou a úctou. Sme vďační našim zamestnancom za ich každodennú prácu a robíme všetko pre to, aby boli u nás v dobrých rukách.

Name: Medirite
Description:
Welcome to Medirite, where our mission since 1999 has been to revolutionize healthcare accessibility and affordability. It all started with our first store at Checkers Hyper Brackenfell, and now, with over 140 in-store dispensaries across Shoprite and Checkers, we're proud to serve communities nationwide. 

Convenience is key to our approach. Nestled within selected Checkers and Shoprite supermarkets, and backed by Transpharm, our pharmaceutical wholesaler, we're strategically positioned to meet the growing demand for accessible healthcare. Many of our locations cater specifically to previously underserved communities, addressing a crucial gap in pharmaceutical services. 

As a trusted service provider and preferred partner to numerous medical aids, we offer customers the ease of filling chronic and scheduled prescriptions while doing their grocery shopping. Moreover, our wellness screenings, covered by most medical aids, empower customers to take proactive steps towards better health. 

Our team of skilled pharmacists and healthcare professionals stands ready to offer expert advice and guidance, ensuring every customer receives top-notch care. Whether it's managing a chronic condition or selecting the right product, we're here to support you. 

Explore our 11 standalone Medirite Plus stores, a comprehensive health and wellness destination, designed to offer a wide range of affordable and accessible products. 

Our dynamic working environment at Medirite is unlike any other. Every day brings fresh challenges and chances to develop skills. As we adapt to evolving industry trends and customer needs, we value grit and forward-thinking. Join our passionate team, where innovation, collaboration, and inclusivity drive our culture, creating a space for everyone to thrive. 

Follow us for updates on our products, services, and community initiatives. Together, we can create a healthier, happier future for everyone!

We provide the entire physical, clinical, and digital infrastructure needed to operate and grow best-in-class 340B pharmacy programs.

Our team has deep clinical pharmacy, technology, and operations experience. Together, we have spent 18 years in Africa building the largest HIV access program in the world, and we have set up, operated and scaled pharmacies that have dispensed over 25M+ prescriptions to patients across all 50 states in the US. After setting up your in-house pharmacy, we design and implement clinical pharmacy programs and deploy technology products that leverage your pharmacy to expand patient reach, improve clinical outcomes, and increase the financial impact of your 340B program.

We are on a mission to serve safety net clinics and their patients. Drop us a line at hello@alchemyhealth.com.

we are dedicated to providing excellent customer service and we pride ourselves on the exceptional quality of products, professional advice, healthcare

Our staff are regularly and intensively trained to help customers with all aspects of healthcare needs 
 Who We Are – Delmar & Attalla Pharmacies
The story began in 1924 with the founding of Delmar Pharmacy on 26th of July Street in Downtown Cairo. In 1946, Attalla Pharmacy was established nearby on Sharif Street. Though unrelated, both pharmacies shared a commitment to exceptional service and built strong reputations, becoming landmarks in the area.
In 2001, the two pharmacies united under one entity—Delmar & Attalla—managed by Dr. Farouk Fouad Ibrahim, a respected figure in the field. The goal was to combine tradition with a modern work system that meets international standards while preserving the core values of the pharmacy profession.

 - Entregas a domicilio: Entregamos en tiempos óptimos y condiciones adecuadas, según legislación vigente. Asegurándote el cumplimiento estricto de la cadena de frío y una inalterable calidad de los medicamentos que nos proveen los laboratorios y droguerías Nro. 1 del país.
 - Stock: Contamos con un amplio stock permanente de productos medicinales, oncológicos, vacunas, respetando siempre la cadena de frío y conservación, estrictamente controlado por nuestros profesionales farmacéuticos.
 - Productos NO medicinales: También contamos con un excelente surtido en accesorios, todos los productos de cuidado personal e higiene para tu cuidado y el de tu familia, las líneas de belleza más reconocidas y un gran surtido de fragancias nacionales e importadas.
 - Perfumería y dermocosmética: Contamos con un trato profesional y personalizado, que te asesoraran para que te sientas bien atendida. Generamos relaciones de confianza construida sobre la base de la honestidad y el genuino interés en tu bienestar, y el de tu piel.
 - Asesoramiento profesional: Contamos con profesionales farmacéuticos que, además de estar capacitados para aconsejarte, conforman un excelente grupo humano dispuesto a brindar una cálida atención.
 - Atención personalizada a empresas: Realizamos alianzas con empresas para ofrecerles beneficios especiales a sus empleados. Para más información, escribanos a empresas@farmaciaromy.com.ar

Name: Del Plata Salud
Description:
El 10 de agosto de 1994, en Mendoza, dos amigos —Andrés Musacchio y Eduardo Herrera— decidieron transformar una visión compartida en realidad: crear una farmacia centrada en las personas, con atención cálida, confiable y profesional.

Así nació la primera Farmacia Del Plata, un pequeño local que pronto se ganó el corazón de la comunidad mendocina. Con cercanía, profesionalismo y compromiso, fue creciendo y sumando propuestas pensadas para el bienestar de cada cliente.

Hoy, a 30 años de aquel inicio, Del Plata Salud es una red de 28 puntos de venta físicos. Además, cuenta con otras unidades de negocio como Del Plata Express (venta telefónica), E-commerce y Droguería del Valle, que abastece a todas las sucursales.

Está presente en once de los dieciocho departamentos que conforman la Provincia de Mendoza con un amplio stock, horarios extendidos y asesoramiento farmacéutico personalizado.

La innovación, la capacitación constante y el compromiso con la experiencia del cliente son pilares que guían a Del Plata Salud desde el primer día.

Name: Dr. Scholl’s Brasil
Description:
Fundada em 1906 pelo Dr. William Mathias Scholl, um podólogo e inventor pioneiro, nossa marca lidera o avanço dos cuidados com os pés há mais de um século. O Dr. Scholl dedicou sua carreira a aprimorar a saúde e o conforto dos pés, combinando expertise médica com soluções inovadoras para problemas comuns nos pés. Sua visão e compromisso com a qualidade estabeleceram um legado de produtos confiáveis que promovem o bem-estar e a mobilidade de pessoas em todos os lugares.

Hoje, a Dr. Scholl’s continua a honrar essa herança, oferecendo uma linha completa de produtos para os cuidados com os pés, desde um simples curativo até palmilhas e órteses de suporte e tratamentos para condições comuns, como a fascite plantar. Apoiados por mais de 100 anos de pesquisa e inovação comprovada, nossos produtos são confiáveis em todo o mundo por sua eficácia e conforto.

Com um legado de expertise e um compromisso duradouro com a confiabilidade, a Dr. Scholl's capacita as pessoas a se movimentarem com conforto e confiança, passo a passo.

L’Espace Santé est au cœur de la transformation des pharmacies du groupement qui poursuit ses missions initiales que sont l’achat et l’accompagnement des pharmaciens au quotidien.

Name: Аптеки SOpharmacy
Description:
SOpharmacy е иновативна концепция аптеки, създадена с вдъхновение, енергия и професионализъм, за да предложи съвременен подход в обслужването на здравните потребности на българските пациенти и клиенти. SOpharmacy е част от семейството на Софарма Трейдинг и продължава и надгражда дългогодишната традиция на компанията в грижата за здравето. Към днешна дата SOpharmacy обединява над 200 аптеки, разположени в над 45 населени места в страната.

Нашата мисия е да се превърнем в доверен партньор в грижата за здравето на клиента за цял живот.

Ние споделяме и вярваме в общи ценности, на които се осланяме, както в работата с нашите клиенти, така и помежду ни като екип: 
-	Грижа
-	Доверие
-	Богат избор
-	Иновативност
-	Отдаденост

Те са движещата сила, която ни ръководи ежедневно в нашата работа.

В SOpharmacy работят професионалисти, които търсят постоянно развитие на своите умения. 

Всичко това ни прави уникални и различни.

Name: APSAGIR
Description:
14 groupements unissent leurs forces pour défendre la pharmacie indépendante.

LA FORCE DU COLLECTIF AU PROFIT DE L’INDIVIDUEL

Cette Fédération de Pharmacies Indépendantes, forte de + de 1000 pharmacies adhérentes, mutualise dès à présent ses moyens pour négocier leurs conditions commerciales afin de mettre en place une offre Sell-In encore plus performante.


La mise en commun d’outils de Sell-Out performants et nationaux dédiés à faciliter la sortie des produits va également garantir des résultats optimisés tant pour les pharmacies que pour les partenaires laboratoires.

En proposant à leurs adhérents une offre de services communs, la Fédération de 13 groupements apporte un des panels de services le plus complet du marché pour donner la juste réponse à tous les besoins du pharmacien dans son exercice quotidien.

DÉFENDRE L’INDÉPENDANCE DE LA PHARMACIE

En se positionnant comme l’unique alternative indépendante aux enseignes et fonds d’investissement qui menacent l’indépendance économique du pharmacien d’officine, les groupements-membres d'APSAGIR veulent démontrer que le pharmacien indépendant aura une place prépondérante dans le marché qui se dessine dès lors que les groupements d’indépendants sauront se réunir pour défendre ce modèle économique.

Dans cette optique, les groupements régionaux qui partagent leur vision du métier sont invités à nous rejoindre dans ce mouvement de défense professionnelle et commerciale.

Membre de FEDERGY et de Pharma Système Qualité (Iso9001 QMS Pharma)

Name: SMP - Global
Description:
SMP-Global: Your Trusted Partner in Pharmaceutical Distribution

About SMP-Global:
SMP-Global is represented in the CIS countries, UAE, Vietnam, Finland (Europe), and more. We specialize in the distribution of medicines and operate under a licensing-supply model.

Marketing Team:

We have dedicated marketing teams in the few CiS countries, who coordinate promotional efforts and branding activities across the CIS region. These teams also collaborate with key partners, such as pharmacies, to launch joint marketing initiatives.

Field Force Size and Capabilities:

Our field force currently includes 22 skilled representatives across the CIS countries, particularly in Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, and Kyrgyzstan. For World Medicines products, we plan to expand this team by adding 2 representatives in Kazakhstan, 2 more in Uzbekistan, and an additional 2-3 in the CIS region, with potential for further growth.

Distribution Channels and Coverage:

We distribute products through pharmacies, direct engagement with doctors, digital platforms, and retail outlets, depending on the product. This multi-channel strategy maximizes product visibility and accessibility across the CIS markets.

Market Position:

In Kazakhstan, we rank among the top 5 distributors (2nd or 3rd place), and in the CIS countries, we are ranked among the top 10. We have received awards recognizing our achievements and excellence in the market. Our annual revenue in the CIS markets exceeds $40 million. We operate licensed warehouses and hold pharmaceutical licenses, ensuring that we manage storage and distribution efficiently, in full compliance with industry regulations.

Name: GeniusFarma.it
Description:
Fondata nel 1974 dal Dr. Ivano Borin – il secondo italiano a specializzarsi in cosmesi – la nostra azienda nasce con una visione pionieristica che ha segnato l'inizio di un percorso costellato di passione, innovazione e dedizione alla salute e al benessere. Fin dai primi passi, abbiamo unito la tradizione farmacologica a un approccio innovativo, mettendo il cliente e la qualità al centro di ogni nostro progetto.

Nel corso degli anni, abbiamo ulteriormente ampliato la nostra offerta attraverso la fondazione di Saluterbe e Sapò, aziende leader nella produzione e distribuzione di integratori e cosmetici. Queste realtà incarnano il nostro impegno a promuovere la salute e la bellezza, offrendo soluzioni all’avanguardia studiate per migliorare il benessere quotidiano dei nostri clienti.

Con decenni di esperienza e una solida reputazione, le Farmacie Mazzini sono oggi sinonimo di eccellenza e affidabilità. Abbiamo saputo evolverci con i tempi, integrando la nostra attività tradizionale con le nuove frontiere digitali. Il lancio di GeniusFarma.it rappresenta il culmine di questa trasformazione, un portale e-commerce all'avanguardia che porta la nostra esperienza e il nostro impegno direttamente a portata di click, garantendo l’accesso rapido a prodotti di alta qualità, consulenze specialistiche e un servizio clienti impeccabile.

La nostra storia è una testimonianza di determinazione e innovazione, radicata nella tradizione ma sempre proiettata verso il futuro. Ogni prodotto, ogni servizio e ogni interazione raccontano il nostro impegno a valorizzare il benessere e la bellezza dei nostri clienti, continuando a scrivere pagine di successo nel settore della cosmesi, della salute e del benessere.

Name: Markt-Apotheke Winsen
Description:
Wir, die Marktapotheken Winsen, leben jeden Tag pharmazeutische Qualität.
 
Vor allem der Kundenservice und eine umfassende Beratung zu Ihren Arzneimitteln liegen uns sehr am Herzen.

Für Sie halten wir an unseren Standorten im Gesundheitszentrum und beim EDEKA-Schanzenhof in Winsen/Luhe über 15.000 Artikel vorrätig, sodass Sie Ihre Arzneimittel in der Regel direkt mitnehmen können. Gern stellen wir auch Ihre individuellen Sonderanfertigungen wie Cremes, Salben oder Zäpfchen in unserer hochprofessionellen Rezeptur her.

Wir bieten neben der Beratung zu Ihren Medikamenten viele weitere Dienstleistungen rund um das Thema Gesundheit an. Dazu gehört neben der Messung von Cholesterin, Blutdruck, Blutzucker und dem Verleih von Milchpumpen auch unser Medikationscheck, bei dem wir Ihre Arzneimittel auf Verträglichkeit prüfen.

Außerdem können wir Ihnen mit unserem umweltfreundlichen E-Botendienst eine kostenfreie und schnelle Alternative anbieten, falls Sie einmal nicht persönlich zu uns in die Marktapotheken kommen können.
In enger Zusammenarbeit mit dem Gesundheitszentrum Winsen suchen wir immer nach Wegen, um Sie erstklassig versorgen zu können. Dabei haben wir und unsere Partner nur ein Ziel: Ihre Gesundheit.

Wir freuen uns auf Ihren Besuch!

Name: MouthFood
Description:
MouthFood är varumärket som kombinerar vetenskapligt förankrad munvård med ett engagemang för hållbarhet. Med produkter utvecklade tillsammans med svensk tandvård, baserade på flera års gedigen forskning, erbjuder vi munvårdsprodukter som inte bara skyddar din munhälsa, utan också bidrar till social och miljömässig hållbarhet. Varje såld produkt innebär att vi donerar munskölj till unga. Detta genom samarbeten med organisationer som Blåljus, Svenska Bussar och Svensk Tandvård. Våra produkter är tillverkade med omsorg i Danmark och kommer i biobaserade, miljövänliga förpackningar.

MouthFood Munskölj – Hållbar Andedräkt:
En innovativ vegansk svensk produkt som erbjuder 12 timmars skydd mot dålig andedräkt. Den är framtagen i samråd med svensk tandvård och innehåller både aloe vera och 0,2 % (NaF) – för skydd mot karies och plack. Aloe vera bidrar till en mild och återfuktande formula som skonsamt skyddar känsliga slemhinnor och ger en frisk smak. Förpackningen är gjord av bioplast, och varje såld flaska innebär att vi donerar munskölj till unga.

MouthFood Aloe Vera Tandkräm – Hållbar Munvård:
MouthFoods fluoridtandkräm är speciellt framtagen för att ge optimalt skydd och vara vårdande för både tänder och tandkött. Med 45 % aloe vera, den högsta andelen på marknaden, och 1450 ppm fluorid, stärker tandkrämen tänderna och skyddar mot karies och plack samtidigt som den lindrar besvär som inflammation, afte och muntorrhet, med flera, tack vare sin aloe vera- och propolis-berikade formula, som har naturliga antibakteriella egenskaper. Tandkrämen är fri från SLS och förpackad i ett miljövänligt sockerrörs-baserat material, är denna tandkräm inte bara skonsam mot din mun utan också mot planeten.

Il gruppo nasce a Roma nel 1989, da allora continua a crescere, diventando presente in modo capillare in tanti quartieri della Città Eterna: Prati, Parioli, Monteverde, Cipro, Aurelio, Balduina, Centro Storico, Colli Aniene, Fleming, Eur.

Negli ultimi anni le Farmacie Pharma Experience sono diventate farmacie 4.0, cogliendo lo spirito dei tempi e avvalendosi delle più recenti innovazioni tecnologiche, come il robot automatizzato per il carico e l'erogazione dei farmaci, e per la preparazione dei vostri ordini.

Ci impegniamo costantemente per fornire ai nostri clienti un’esperienza eccezionale con un’ampia scelta di prodotti e prezzi super competitivi. Nel 2014 Farmacia Mazzini decide di creare un sito web per dare la possibilità ai clienti di poter acquistare anche comodamente da casa.

Con un sito web intuitivo e una procedura di acquisto semplice, potete trovare e ordinare i prodotti di cui avete bisogno con pochi clic.

Farmacia Mazzini si distingue per le sue Pharma Spa che sono a tutti gli effetti un fiore all’occhiello, diventate un punto di riferimento per tutti i clienti che vogliono concedersi una pausa salutare di benessere, bellezza e relax. Veri e propri centri all’avanguardia collocati all’interno delle farmacie del gruppo Pharma Experience offrono ogni tipo di servizio per la cura del proprio corpo.

Name: Ortopedia Moderna Lda
Description:
A Ortopedia Moderna, Lda. foi constituída em 1946, sendo uma das primeiras empresas no ramo ortopédico a ser criada no nosso País.
Ao longo dos anos, várias gerências por aqui passaram sempre orientando a sua actividade no fabrico de próteses e ortóteses, acompanhando o desenvolvimento das novas tecnologias a nível mundial.
Desde 1996 até aos dias de hoje, tem sido gerida pelo seu sócio-gerente António João Pardal, que criou a sua sede na Travessa da Glória, 28, 1250-118 Lisboa e está representada por uma filial na Av.ª São Sebastião, 23 7000-767 em Évora.
A 21 de Março de 2007, inaugura as suas novas instalações, com uma área equivalente a 1400 m2, na Rua Luciano Cordeiro,24-A, onde dispõe de sala de atendimento ao público, sala de exposição, sala de formação, laboratórios de próteses e ortóteses e uma sala do estudo do pé equipada com um aparelho baropodómetro electrónico, que permite o alinhamento do corpo bem como das próteses.
Com a empresa em ascensão adquiriu novos técnicos já com curso superior em Ortoprotesia, melhorando ainda mais a capacidade técnica nesta área expandindo-se mais no mercado no âmbito de ajudas técnicas e de material hospitalar, com um crescimento contínuo. Neste momento já confeccionamos assentos moldados em espuma de silicone para que os pacientes de paralisia cerebral tenham uma maior qualidade de vida.

Name: Pharmacie préparatoire Martin-Privat - Beprep
Description:
La préparation magistrale est une thérapeutique spécifique, effectuée pour un patient déterminé et présentant toutes les garanties de sécurité et traçabilité du médicament.

Loin des formules empiriques, cette thérapeutique moderne phytothérapique ou chimique ,encadrée par l’Agence du Médicament présente de nombreux avantages :

    Adaptation de posologie (Pédiatrie et Gériatrie), en fonction de l’âge et du poids du patient,
    Intolérance du patient à certains excipients utilisés dans l’industrie pharmaceutique,
    Permet une observance maximale des traitements par l’adaptation des formes galéniques,
    Pallie l’arrêt de commercialisation ou les ruptures de stock de spécialités,
    Pallie le manque de références en Phytothérapie et Aromathérapie et permet un traitement adapté et personnalisé.

Les nouvelles BPP (Bonnes Pratiques de Préparation) et l’évolution des techniques permettent une fiabilité et une stabilité totale de la forme magistrale préparée, gélules, pommades gels, solutions internes et externes, suppositoires et ovules ainsi qu’une facilité d’administration et une biodisponibilité des Principes Actifs.

La Pharmacie-Préparatoire MARTIN-PRIVAT est accréditée par les ARS (décret 2014)  pour la sous-traitance, la préparation pédiatrique et l’utilisation de TOUS Principes Actifs y compris dangereux et CMR.

Name: NATURLABOR

Our teams are passionate about what they do and run our pharmacies with that passion in mind, our sole purpose is to ensure every person in our communities receives an exceptional experience and continue to live their best lives – healthy, supported and educated.

Name: Chebu Pharmaceutical Limited
Description:
Chebu Pharmaceutical Ltd (CPL) is dedicated to providing quality, cost-effective over-the-counter and prescription medications to patients in rural Kenya. Our revenue is generated through modest profit margins on the products we sell.

Our unique implementation strategy combines the use of technological tools with traditional outreach methods, including physical storefronts. We cater to both B2B and B2C markets, supplying clinics and directly serving consumers.

Our focus is on rural areas, specifically Sub-Counties, ideally with medium population densities of around 250 people per square kilometer. Leveraging over two years of data from CPL’s electronic inventory system, we make informed supply chain decisions. This gives us a competitive edge, enabling us to deliver high-quality pharmaceutical products at the right time and price to the last mile populace in Kenya.

Name: Farmacie Travagliati
Description:
La Tua Salute è il nostro primo impegno, da 40 anni.

Travagliati è un Gruppo cresciuto al servizio della Salute dei propri Clienti: le esigenze di ciascuno sono da sempre lo stimolo a fare di più e meglio, a offrire servizi, consulenza, attenzioni, e naturalmente farmaci e parafarmaci, cosmesi di qualità, integratori sicuri, alimenti su misura per ogni intolleranza, prodotti affidabili per i più piccoli.

Travagliati non è solo questo, è soprattutto un Gruppo: 3 farmacie che si muovono in maniera coordinata, più di 40 professionisti che fanno squadra e si integrano al meglio, tutti mossi da una stessa consapevolezza, la stessa che da anni guida la miglior medicina, “la Salute è il bene più prezioso: prevenire è meglio che curare”.

Ogni giorno ci impegniamo ad essere sempre aggiornati, un passo avanti a tutti; questo significa che chi fa parte dello Staff vive in un ambiente dinamico, aperto all’innovazione, senza pregiudizi, che riconosce e premia il merito del Collaboratore, che mette sempre al centro la salute delle Persone, rispettando l’unicità inimitabile di ciascuno.

Chi fa parte del Gruppo Travagliati condivide questo modo di pensare, che è soprattutto un modo di fare, una regola che governa il presente e costruisce il nostro futuro, dal 1983.

Our goal is to provide our customers with the highest level of service and convenience, which is why we offer a variety of online tools to make it easier for you to manage your prescriptions and order the medications you need.

Name: Farmafórmula Brasil
Description:

Tudo começou quando o seu fundador retornou de São Paulo e Buenos Aires, onde passou por um longo período de aprendizado na área. Depois disso, o crescimento foi meteórico, fundamentado por uma visão empreendedora, especializações no ramo e alto profissionalismo.

Com a sua consolidação no estado, a companhia viu que era chegada a hora de romper fronteiras e partir para o mercado de franchising, foi quando iniciou a sua etapa de franquias em Fortaleza, Ceará.

Hoje, conta com mais de 150 lojas em todo o país e com o respaldo de já ter manipulado mais de 12 milhões de fórmulas, tendo conquistado um excelente nível de acreditação no mercado magistral do Brasil.

Name: Schwanen Apotheke Offenbach
Description:
Gegründet im Jahr 1718 ist die Schwanen Apotheke heute die größte und älteste Versorgungsapotheke im Rhein-Main-Gebiet. Geleitet wird sie von Dr. Guido Kruse in der dritten Generation.

Die Schwanen Apotheke gliedert sich in die Bereiche öffentliche Apotheke (Offizin), Klinikversorgung, Praxis- und Heimversorgung, Rezeptur sowie in eine Abteilung zur Herstellung von sterilen Zubereitungen. Unsere Filialen dienen als Stützpunkte für die Versorgung unserer Kunden in der Wetterau und im Hochtaunuskreis.

Wir haben uns der „Arzneimittelversorgung aus einer Hand“ verschrieben. Durch unsere Strukturen sind wir in der Lage, einen Patienten von der stationären über eine ambulante Behandlung bis zur Genesung zu Hause zu versorgen.

Die Schwanen Apotheke ist in allen Abteilungen nach DIN EN ISO 9001 : 2015 vom TÜV Hessen zertifiziert.

Durch ein umfangreiches Qualitätsmanagement in Verbindung mit unseren Kunden und Partnern, tragen wir zur Verbesserung der Patientensicherheit, aber auch zur Wirtschaftlichkeit der Arzneimittelversorgung entscheidend bei.

Name: Hitchcock Family Pharmacy
Description:
Hitchcock Family Pharmacy – Transparent, Affordable, and Patient-First Care

At Hitchcock Family Pharmacy, we believe pharmacy care should be simple, transparent, and truly patient-focused—not driven by insurance restrictions or hidden costs. That’s why we operate as a cash-only pharmacy, providing upfront pricing that’s often cheaper than insurance co-pays or discount programs like GoodRx. No insurance, no surprise bills—just straightforward, affordable prescriptions.

A Better Way to Get Your Medications

We know that traditional pharmacies can be frustrating, with long wait times, unpredictable pricing, and impersonal service. We’re changing that. Our model allows us to focus on you, ensuring a seamless, hassle-free experience every time you need a prescription.

 Transparent, flat-rate pricing—Know the cost before you pay
 No insurance required—No pre-authorizations, no denials, no red tape
 24/7 prescription pickup lockers—Pick up your medications when it’s convenient for you
 Personalized service—Our pharmacist is here to help, providing expert guidance when you need it

Partnering with Physicians and Employers

We proudly support direct primary care (DPC) physicians, independent medical practices, and local businesses, helping them offer cost-effective pharmacy solutions to their patients and employees. By removing insurance from the equation, we streamline medication access while keeping costs low and predictable. If you’re a physician or employer looking for a better way to provide affordable prescriptions, we’d love to connect.

At Hitchcock Family Pharmacy, we’re not just filling prescriptions—we’re reinventing pharmacy care to make it simpler, more accessible, and truly patient-first.

Name: MEDIPOINT.CZ
Description:
Jsme Medipoint. Nepřepisujeme otevírací dobu lékáren, píšeme vlastní. Jsme tu, když lékárny spí na 2000 místech po celé ČR.

 Medipoint zajišťuje dostupnost vyhrazených léčivých přípravků v situacích, kdy běžná lékárna není otevřená. Díky síti více než 2000 partnerských míst po celé republice najdete naše přípravky na čerpacích stanicích, v hotelech, obchodech i v menších obcích.

 Jsme česká firma, která vyrostla z jednoduché myšlenky zpřístupnit vyhrazené léčivé přípravky lidem i tam, kde lékárna není nablízku. Už roky budujeme síť Medipoint srdcem i rozumem a zakládáme si na kvalitě, spolehlivosti a férovém přístupu.

 Medipoint není náhradou lékaře ani lékárny, ale rozšířením možností, jak mít dostupné vyhrazené léčivé přípravky i mimo jejich otevírací dobu.

Name: Gempita Health Care
Description:
Gempita Health Care (GHC) adalah perusahaan yang saat ini menaungi izin operasional usaha dari Apotek Cantigi 1 dan Apotek Cantigi 2. Sebelumnya, Apotek Cantigi 1 (dulu bernama Apotek Cantigi) sudah beroperasi sendiri sebagai usaha pribadi sejak 1 Desember 2019. Namun setelah berdirinya GHC pada 10 November 2022, Apotek Cantigi menjadi bagian dari GHC dan berubah nama menjadi Apotek Cantigi 1.

Sebetulnya, apa dan mengapa dengan cantigi?

Cantigi (Vaccinium Varingiaufolium) adalah pohon yang tumbuh kuat di puncak gunung. Batangnya kecil namun sangat kokoh, daunnya hijau kemerahan, buahnya mirip blueberry berwarna hitam, akarnya sangat kuat mencengkeram tanah, batu bahkan tebing. Cantigi dapat tetap bertahan hidup, meski di puncak gunung cuaca ekstrim datang silih berganti dan sering diterjang badai.

Di balik berat dan keras hidup yang dijalani, Cantigi tetap dapat memberikan manfaat kepada para pendaki. Batangnya sering dijadikan pegangan saat melewati tanjakan ekstrim. Pohonnya menghalangi terpaan angin kencang. Buah dan daunnya pun dapat dimakan.

Dari cantigi, kami terinspirasi untuk membangun apotek ini. Apotek yang mampu bertahan, tetap berdiri kokoh meski berbagai tantangan dan hambatan datang silih berganti. Apotek yang dapat memberikan manfaat kepada masyarakat, dengan semangat edukasi dan semangat berbagi. Itu lah Apotek Cantigi.

Jika diibaratkan gunung, mungkin saat ini baru tumbuh 2 Pohon Cantigi di Gunung GHC. Semoga ke depan, terus tumbuh pohon pohon cantigi berikutnya sehingga semakin banyak memberikan manfaat bagi masyarakat, khususnya untuk masyarakat Cirebon Timur.

Description:
il gruppo nasce da un farmacista imprenditore milanese appassionato alla propria professione e convinto dell'importanza del servizio che il buon farmacista può svolgere per la popolazione. 
In un quadro economico e storico di rivoluzione per la professione del farmacista, l’intenzione è difendere una professionalità che rischia di perdere valore a causa di un mercato concentrato sul consumo e sul prezzo, anziché sulla cura e la visione globale del paziente.

ACCOGLIENZA
Significa che il cliente deve percepire una qualità differente di servizio. Significa attenzione alle esigenze globali del paziente e cliente, senza osservare il singolo sintomo ma cercando di comprendere bisogni e necessità reali e profondi. Significa educazione, cortesia, ordine e compostezza, dedizione e capacità di servizio. 

PROFESSIONALITA’
Significa continua formazione e informazione del personale. Significa rispetto delle regole e obbligo di esecuzione di tamponi e vaccini. Significa educazione sanitaria per i clienti. Significa approfondimento e creazione di integratori e prodotti funzionali all’avanguardia ed eccellenti. Il gruppo Farmiss contribuisce materialmente alla ricerca di formazione dei propri dipendenti.

ASSORTIMENTO
Significa scelta attenta della merce nel punto vendita senza seguire mode o aziende esterne, ma concentrandosi su qualità ed efficacia. Significa avere una soluzione sempre per ogni esigenza, ma non necessariamente ogni prodotto in pubblicità dove il consiglio del farmacista professionista scompare. Significa ricerca di farmaci contingentati e mancanti dal ciclo distributivo.

Disponiamo di un vastissimo assortimento di prodotti, cosí come di un fornito reparto di cosmesi e integratori che include i piú importanti marchi presenti sul mercato.

Sempre disposti a migliorare, per essere al passo con i tempi e poter accogliere ogni necessitá, mettiamo la nostra esperienza al servizio della clientela.
Abbiamo uno staff altamente qualificato, che con cortesia e preparazione offre assistenza e consulenza per la tutela e la salvaguardia della salute e il benessere dei propri clienti.
Parliamo italiano, inglese, francese e spagnolo per poter dar supporto anche alla clientela straniera abitualmente di passaggio a Firenze.

Ci sforziamo per essere la tua farmacia a portata di click, con vari servizi digitali tra cui: eCommerce, App per prenotazione prodotti, Glovo, eCommerce.

Name: House of Medicine (HOMED)
Description:
Wij zijn een team van gelijkgezinde freelance apothekers die zich bewust verenigen als een zorgende organisatie, gebouwd op gedeelde normen en waarden in werk en leven. 
We streven naar een betere samenwerking, door als team van freelancers hulp te bieden aan apotheken die het nodig hebben. 
Door ons te verenigen onder House of Medicine, kunnen we een nieuw, dynamisch systeem vormen waar freelance apothekers in alle vrijheid en met zo min mogelijk zorgen kunnen samenwerken.

Ontzorging staat bij ons centraal, en om goede zorg te bieden dien je eerst zelf ontzorgd te zijn. Als apotheker hoef je je niet bezig te houden met sales, marketing, planning of administratie, maar kan je focussen op je kerntaken.
Door onze regelmatige bijeenkomsten en workshops, heb je als freelancer ook gelijkgezinde collega's waar je van kan leren, kan mee connecteren en professioneel kan groeien. Bij House of Medicine wordt kennis en expertise gedeeld en kan je als individu meer genieten van de vrijheid om te kiezen waar en wanneer je werkt en wanneer je verlof neemt.

Ontzorging voor uw apotheek betekent dat we continuïteit kunnen voorzien door de juiste apotheker aan uw apotheek te koppelen. We streven naar kwaliteit en kwantiteit in werk en service.
We worden onderdeel van uw team, van een losse dag tot volledige bemanning, met aandacht voor wat uw apotheek uniek maakt.
Ons systeem verbindt onafhankelijke apothekers en apotheken die eerstelijnszorg hoog in het vaandel dragen. 

We willen een fundamenteel verschil maken in hoe werk binnen de apotheeksector georganiseerd wordt. Want om goede zorg te kunnen bieden, moet je in de eerste plaats zelf ontzorgd zijn.

Name: Ellavina Pharmacy
Description:
Ellavina Pharmacy is a retail/community pharmacy founded to ease and improve access to medical supplies and prescription medicine for community residents in Nigeria, beginning with Abuja, the nation’s Federal Capital Territory. 

The business operates a model that offers the medical supplies and medicine to target customers at wholesale prices, hence ensuring ease of access. This model is simple but highly effective for the target market, which is mostly low-income, with over 60% of the nation’s population living in poverty. 

Founded in 2014, Ellavina Pharmacy has served over 25,000 people within Abuja Metropolis, has been consistent in making much-needed pharmaceutical services available within its community, and has generated income to the tune of 50,000 Euros (40 million naira at current market rate). 

Presently, Ellavina is positioning to scale its services and extend its reach to more communities in Abuja and neighbouring states. Over the next 10 years, Ellavina aims to have increased its network of retail pharmacies to a total of 5 states within Nigeria.

Description:
At MedsDirectRx, we believe access to life-changing medications shouldn’t come with life-changing price tags.

Through a strategic blend of international sourcing and domestic 340B partnerships, we deliver fully licensed, FDA-approved medications at a fraction of the standard price.

What We Deliver:
Cost Savings: Substantial reductions on brand-name and specialty drugs.
Quality Assurance: FDA-approved and URAC-accredited pharmacy partners.
Patient Experience: Seamless onboarding, telehealth support, and home delivery.
Compliance: 100% aligned with federal and state regulations.

Why It Matters:
Prescription drug costs are among the fastest-growing expenses for employers and patients alike. Our model not only cuts costs but also ensures continuity of care, giving patients reliable access to the medications they need—when they need them.

Our Mission
To redefine pharmacy benefits by making specialty and brand medications accessible, affordable, and reliable for organizations and the people they serve.
