Name: Farmacia Estación 71
Description:
Imagina que tu vida es un viaje en tren. Cada estación representa un momento crucial en tu camino hacia la salud y el bienestar. En nuestro viaje, encontramos paisajes hermosos, desafíos inesperados y estaciones que nos invitan a detenernos, reflexionar y recargar energías.
En cada estación, nuestra empresa de salud está allí, como una estación acogedora y cálida que te ofrece un respiro del ajetreo del viaje. Nuestro objetivo es proporcionarte un espacio seguro donde puedas sentirte cuidado y entendido. Aquí, encontrarás un equipo de profesionales dedicados que te brindarán el apoyo y la orientación necesarios para continuar tu viaje con fuerza y esperanza renovadas.
En la primera estación, te ayudamos a establecer una base sólida para tu salud, proporcionando los recursos y conocimientos que necesitas para tomar decisiones informadas. A medida que avanzas, estamos a tu lado, ofreciendo consejos, tratamientos y apoyo emocional para que puedas superar los obstáculos y disfrutar de los paisajes más bellos de tu vida.
Cada parada en nuestro viaje es una oportunidad para crecer, aprender y mejorar. Creemos que la salud no es solo la ausencia de enfermedad, sino un estado de completo bienestar físico, mental y emocional. Por eso, en nuestra estación, no solo encuentras tratamientos médicos, sino también programas de bienestar, actividades de relajación y un entorno que promueve la salud integral.
Nuestro compromiso es acompañarte en cada etapa de tu viaje, asegurándonos de que nunca te sientas solo en este camino. Queremos ser tu refugio, tu lugar seguro donde siempre puedes encontrar apoyo y comprensión. Porque en cada estación de tu vida, estamos aquí para ayudarte a seguir adelante, hacia un futuro lleno de salud y felicidad.

Name: Kiềm Thảo Dược Saphia Career
Description:
Kiềm Thảo Dược Saphia được thành lập với sứ mệnh mang đến những sản phẩm chăm sóc sức khỏe an toàn, hiệu quả và 100% từ thảo dược Việt Nam.
Chúng tôi kết hợp tinh hoa Y học cổ truyền cùng công nghệ hiện đại để tạo nên dòng sản phẩm Kiềm Thảo Dược đạt độ Kiềm cao bền vững, được cấp bằng độc quyền sáng chế năm 2024.

Không chỉ dừng lại ở sức khỏe con người, Kiềm Thảo Dược Saphia còn hướng tới mô hình phát triển xanh và bền vững, khi tận dụng nguồn nguyên liệu sau sản xuất để tạo ra các sản phẩm nông nghiệp sạch như phân bón hữu cơ, thức ăn chăn nuôi, mỹ phẩm tự nhiên và thủy hải sản.

 Hành trình phát triển
- Xây dựng mạng lưới hơn 20.000 nhà phân phối, cộng tác viên trên toàn quốc.
- Phục vụ và được tin dùng bởi hơn 100.000 khách hàng.
- Khẳng định vị thế là thương hiệu tiên phong trong nghiên cứu và phát triển các sản phẩm thảo dược Kiềm độc đáo, hiệu quả vượt trội.
Tại Kiềm Saphia, chúng tôi tin rằng: con người – đổi mới – và sự bền vững là nền tảng kiến tạo tương lai.
Hãy cùng Kiềm Thảo Dược Saphia lan tỏa giá trị “Đưa cuộc sống Kiềm tới mọi gia đình vì 1 thế giới khoẻ mạnh hơn” đến Việt Nam và thế giới.

Name: Melbourne Pharma
Description:
Melbourne Pharma is a dermatology-focused compounding pharmacy delivering patient-specific and office-use medications with an unwavering commitment to Quality, Service, Innovation, and Education.

Operating under both 503A frameworks, we support the full continuum of care—from individualized formulations to compliant sterile preparations for clinics, surgical centers, and hospitals. Our dual capabilities give providers confidence in safety, scalability, and regulatory alignment.

Our team invests in ongoing postgraduate medical education and rigorous in-house training to stay on the cutting edge of medical science. We comply with applicable USP <795>, <797>, and <800> standards and continually monitor quality across staff, ingredients, production, testing, storage, dispensing, and shipping.

Clinical focus areas
• Dermatology: pigment disorders, acne, alopecia, warts, anti-aging, AK/neoplasia, topical anesthetics, rosacea
• Tailored therapies: BHRT, mitochondrial/detox support, and specialty formulations
• Delivery systems: custom strengths, vehicles, and combinations designed to optimize outcomes and adherence

For prescribers
Our secure order portal streamlines prescribing and order management 24/7. Expect responsive support, fast turnaround, and precise dosing—personalized medicine you can trust.

Compliance note
Availability may vary by jurisdiction and clinical indication. Melbourne Pharma does not claim to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease. Prescriptions are dispensed in accordance with federal and state regulations.

Get in touch
Visit our website or use the “Sign up” button to request access to the prescriber portal..

Name: PHARMACIE DE LA TOUR, au Grand-Saconnex
Description:
Charte de la Pharmacie de la Tour
Le patient est au centre de nos préoccupations. Nous favorisons son adhésion au traitement.
Il est offert au patient un suivi et une éducation thérapeutique de qualité à travers une communication permanente entre les médecins et l’équipe de la pharmacie.
L'efficacité et l'économicité des traitements sont des préoccupations permanentes.
La sécurité du traitement est assurée par la tenue régulière du dossier patient et la consultation, lors de chaque remise de médicaments, de l’historique des prescriptions et de l'automédication.
L’utilisation des génériques est promue, mais sans perturber les traitements.
La promotion et l’éducation à la santé sont assurées par :
- des campagnes de prévention
- des dépistages des facteurs de risque
- des mesures de contrôle des valeurs telles que la tension artérielle, la glycémie, etc.
- des programmes de suivi personnalisé des malades chroniques
Nous nous astreignons à une formation continue de qualité et confrontons régulièrement notre pratique afin d’améliorer les prestations envers nos patients.

Name: Apoteka Miletić Plus
Description:
Apoteke Miletić Plus su od maja 1997, već četvrtinu veka posvećene svojim pacijentima. Oduvek smo se trudili da stručnost i predanost Vašem zdravlju budu naš prioritet. I pored brojnih izazova, uspeli smo da ih zajednički uspešno prevaziđemo, što potvrđuje i činjenica da se nalazimo na 8 lokacija i da je sve više Vas koji nam verujete. Hvala što ste prepoznali naš trud i što nam poklanjate Vaše poverenje da zajednički brinemo o zdravlju.

Ponosimo se činjenicom da su nam pacijenti uvek na prvom mestu. Bilo da Vam je potreban konkretan proizvod, savetovanje o Vašem trenutnom zdravstvenom stanju ili podrška na putu ozdravljenja, u našim apotekama Vas čeka usluga prilagođena Vama. Svakom pacijentu pristupamo na
jedinstven način i upravo to je razlog zbog kog nam verujete i zbog kog se već 26 godina iznova vraćate apotekama Miletić Plus.

Kontinuirane edukacije iz različitih oblasti farmaceutske delatnosti su prioritet naših zaposlenih, kako bi bili u toku sa svim novostima i savremenim pristupima lečenju. Osim usavršavanja, važno nam je i zadovoljstvo naših zaposlenih, čemu smo posvećeni i čemu konstantno težimo. Zadovoljan i stručan tim farmaceuta i farmaceutskih tehničara, u svakom trenutku će ljubazno odgovoriti na sva Vaša pitanja i pružiti najkvalitetniju uslugu u Vama najbližoj apoteci Miletić Plus.

Wir können Sie professionell über Kontraindikationen, Wechsel- und Nebenwirkungen von Medikamenten informieren.

Memo-Funktion

Sie erinnern sich nicht mehr an den Namen eines Medikaments, das Ihnen beim letzten Mal so gut geholfen hat? Die Frage ist schnell beantwortet, da wir alle Arzneimittelabgaben an Sie speichern. Diese Information können in allen vier CITY-Apotheken Dresden abgerufen werden.

Rabatt

3% Barzahlungs-Rabatt auf nicht verschreibungspflichtige Produkte aus unserem Sortiment gemäß den gesetzlichen Bestimmungen

20% Dauerrabatt auf Ihr Lieblings-Produkt

Regelmäßige Preis-Aktionen nur für Kundenkarten-Inhaber/innen

Einfacher

Sie besitzen eine Befreiungskarte Ihrer Krankenkasse? Wir speichern den Beleg für Sie ab, sodass die einmalige Vorlage je Kalenderjahr ausreicht.

Jahresquittung für Finanzamt und Krankenkasse

Wir speichern Ihre Belege für Medikamenten-Einkäufe und Arzneimittel-Zuzahlungen und erstellen auf Wunsch Ihren Sammelbeleg für die Krankenkasse oder das Finanzamt, den wir gern auch per Mail zusenden. Fordern Sie gern Ihre Jahresquittung an unter: buchhaltung@apotheken-dd.de

Datensicherheit

Auch wenn Sie Ihre Kundenkarte verlieren - dank Ihrer gespeicherten Daten bleiben Ihnen alle Vorteile der Kundenkarte erhalten. Gleichzeitig können Sie sicher sein, dass Ihre Daten nicht in fremde Hände geraten!

Beantragen Sie unsere Kundenkarte auf unserer Webseite.

Name: BioRegenEx
Description:
BioRegenEx is a leading distributor of high-purity, physician-grade exosome biologics for research and clinical advancement in regenerative medicine. We specialize in supplying next-generation exosome formulations to qualified healthcare providers who are pioneering safe, science-backed applications in cellular restoration, tissue support, and inflammation modulation.

Our biologics are processed under rigorous standards and intended strictly for research use only, in accordance with FDA 351(a) guidelines. We do not promote or imply therapeutic use. Instead, we focus on empowering physicians and researchers with compliant access to innovative biologics that are shaping the future of cell-to-cell communication science.

What sets BioRegenEx apart is our commitment to quality, compliance, and clinical integrity. Each product is accompanied by thorough handling protocols and product information designed for responsible implementation. Our team collaborates with regenerative experts, clinical educators, and biotech manufacturers to ensure consistent standards of safety, clarity, and traceability from acquisition to application.

From joint support protocols to investigative IV studies on inflammation and aging, our exosome biologics serve as a versatile research tool for those practicing on the edge of modern health science. We believe in enabling innovation—ethically, transparently, and with precision.

Whether you’re advancing your clinic’s capabilities, exploring non-surgical regenerative solutions, or collaborating on next-generation therapeutics, BioRegenEx is your trusted partner in biologic distribution and education.

We don't just deliver biologics—we deliver possibilities.over the future of cellular medicine at www.BioRegenEx.com.

Name: Tomasoni Pharma Group Srl
Description: La nostra storia inizia nel 2013 a Castrezzato, con l’apertura della prima farmacia. Un progetto nato dalla volontà di offrire un servizio farmaceutico di qualità, vicino alle persone e alle loro esigenze quotidiane. Fin da subito, il nostro obiettivo è stato chiaro: crescere, innovare e diventare un punto di riferimento nel settore. Nel 2014, con l’apertura della farmacia di Cologne, abbiamo fatto un passo avanti, ampliando la nostra presenza sul territorio e rafforzando il legame con la comunità. La crescita è continuata nel 2018, con l’inaugurazione della farmacia di Rovato Franciacorta, segno di un’espansione sempre più strutturata e di una visione orientata al futuro. A dicembre 2023, con l’apertura della quarta farmacia : Farmacia Rovato Stazione, abbiamo raggiunto un traguardo importante: una rete consolidata di farmacie, sempre più integrate e attente alle esigenze del mercato. Era chiaro che, per continuare a crescere e innovare, serviva una nuova struttura gestionale: così nasce Tomasoni Pharma Group, una holding finanziaria creata per ottimizzare la gestione economica delle farmacie e aprire nuove opportunità di crescita e investimento. Questo passaggio non è solo una scelta strategica, ma un’evoluzione naturale del nostro percorso. Grazie a una gestione più solida ed efficiente, possiamo guardare avanti con una visione chiara, puntando su nuove aperture, servizi innovativi e un modello di farmacia sempre più moderno.

Name: Farmacia Borgarelli
Description:
La Farmacia Borgarelli inizia la propria attività nell’attuale sede di Via Madama Cristina 62 a Torino, sotto la direzione dell’allora Titolare Dott. Michele Borgarelli nel 1932.

Nel 2000 la Farmacia si trasforma in una società di cui sono soci il Dott. Giuseppe Borgarelli ed il Dott.  Paolo Borgarelli.
Sin dalle sue origini i titolari ed i loro collaboratori  hanno lavorato con passione e professionalità con l’intento di rendere la propria attività un costante centro di riferimento per la salute pubblica in generale e per diventare un punto di riferimento nel quartiere in cui ha sede.

Luogo di ascolto, di risposte accurate a quesiti sempre degni di attenzione, la Farmacia Borgarelli da sempre incarna il rapporto fiduciario, ma sono i clienti che fidelizzano il “loro farmacista”, non il contrario. 

Il personale segue costantemente corsi di aggiornamento partecipando a corsi di formazione di omeopatia, fitoterapia, medicina naturale.

Tutto il personale ha partecipato al progetto inter ateneo Farmacia Territoriale, in collaborazione con l’Ordine dei Farmacisti della provincia di Torino, la Facoltà di Farmacia  di Torino, Federfarma Piemonte venendo formato su quattro attuali grandi temi: BPCO (broncopatia cronica ostruttiva ), Scompenso Cardiaco, Diabete, Dislipidemie.

La Farmacia ha anche investito, nel tempo, nell’ammodernamento del  laboratorio delle preparazioni magistrali, che è costantemente aggiornato per elaborare preparazioni officinali e galeniche, sia ad uso umano che ad uso veterinario, nel rispetto delle NBP della Farmacopea Ufficiale XII. 

Oltre ai servizi tradizionali sono disponibili il test sulle intolleranze alimentari, le autoanalisi, l’analisi della pelle e del capello, lo screening sulla insufficienza venosa. Oltre ai servizi di comune accezione (autodiagnosi e prenotazioni).

Description:
Established in 2018 by pharmacist Michael Bonner, Choice Chemist has grown into a leading national provider of professional pharmacy services tailored to Australia’s aged care and health sectors.

Unlike traditional pharmacies centred on retail dispensing, we are purpose-built to serve the evolving Care Economy. Our model embeds pharmacists directly into residential aged care, where they deliver clinical oversight, medication safety, and compliance support at scale. Today, Choice Chemist supports more than 40% of all aged care facilities with an onsite pharmacist, making us the largest provider in this field.

Our commitment is to anticipate health reforms and population needs, building workforce capability and pioneering digital innovations that enable pharmacists to step into expanded clinical roles. This forward-looking approach has positioned Choice Chemist at the forefront of redefining how pharmacy integrates with aged care and community health services.

Name: Pharmacie du Tilleul
Description:
En 1901, un pharmacien alsacien, Albert Fessenmayer, crée une pharmacie au cœur de la vieille ville, à la Grand-Rue 20, actuelle rue du 23-juin, qu’il nommera la Pharmacie du Faucon. En 1921, elle est reprise par la famille Montavon.

En 1981, la pharmacie est achetée et complétement restaurée par Pierre et Marie-Louise Steulet, pharmacienne. Avec le concours des habitants de la vieille ville, elle est baptisée Pharmacie du Tilleul.

En 2011, la Pharmacie du Tilleul fête ses 30 ans avec un nouvel agencement suite à d’importantes rénovations. L’introduction d’un robot dans la cave voutée a permis d’agrandir la surface de vente et de créer une cabine pour les entretiens confidentiels ainsi qu’un coin jeux pour les enfants. Une rampe pour les poussettes et les chaises roulantes a également été mise en place.

En 2021, la Pharmacie du Tilleul fête ses 40 ans avec la création d’une seconde cabine destinée à la réalisation des prestations pharmaceutiques, un espace dédié aux soins cosmétiques et un espace de télé-consultations médicales.

In many instances it means formulating a medication in a savory flavor to allow a feline or canine patient to take a medication willingly.  In every case where we are compounding a medication, it is tailored to a specific patient with a specific or unique need.  Oh, and we also fill all the other common medications for pets and humans here as well and have an exceptional gift boutique and even a skin spa all under one roof!

Tutti i prodotti sono certificati Vegano Ok , sono privi di Glutine e di Lattosio.

L'ideatrice del "Marchio" e dei prodotti è la nostra titolare, la Dott.ssa Elisa Giubileo, laureata in farmacia ed in Scienza dell'alimentazione. La distribuzione dei prodotti alle Farmacie e Parafarmacie è gestita sia direttamente che attraverso grossisti/distributori .
Tutti i nostri prodotti sono già presenti nelle Banche dati delle Farmacie.

In commercio, edito da Tecniche Nuove il libro scritto dalla Dott.ssa E. Giubileo "Botanicals" gli effetti fisiologici delle piante medicinali secondo la normativa vigente. All'interno di questo manuale di informazione troverete la descrizione degli effetti fisiologici e delle attività salutari delle piante medicinali a partire da quanto indicato nelle fonti ufficiali di riferimento del Ministero della Salute. Name: Greenwich Rx

As a 503A pharmacy, we do not mass produce medications. Instead, every prescription we fill is made to order, ensuring that the dosage, ingredients, and delivery method are tailored to your unique health needs. We follow strict guidelines set by the FDA and United States Pharmacopeia (USP), and we’re licensed at the state level to ensure the highest standards of quality, sterility, and safety. Being a 503A pharmacy allows us to offer personalized care backed by science, so you can feel confident in every dose you receive from Greenwich.

Name: Farmacia San Matteo - Pavia
Description:
La Farmacia San Matteo di Pavia  è un punto di riferimento per la salute e il benessere nella nostra comunità. Siamo orgogliosi di offrire una vasta gamma di servizi e attività per soddisfare le esigenze di ogni paziente.

La nostra farmacia è molto più di un luogo in cui ritirare i farmaci. Siamo una squadra di farmacisti dedicati e professionisti sanitari che si impegnano a fornire una consulenza personalizzata e un supporto completo ai nostri clienti. La nostra missione è migliorare la qualità della vita delle persone attraverso la promozione di una corretta gestione dei farmaci e uno stile di vita sano.

La nostra gamma di servizi comprende la dispensazione accurata e tempestiva dei farmaci prescritti, ma va oltre. I nostri farmacisti sono a disposizione per fornire consulenze approfondite su farmaci e terapie, rispondendo alle domande dei pazienti e fornendo informazioni chiare ed esaustive. Ci preoccupiamo di garantire che ogni individuo comprenda pienamente i propri farmaci, compresi gli effetti collaterali e le possibili interazioni, per promuovere un uso sicuro ed efficace.

Ma non ci fermiamo qui. La nostra farmacia è impegnata nella promozione della salute e nella prevenzione delle malattie. Offriamo programmi di screening e valutazione del rischio per identificare precocemente eventuali problemi di salute e fornire consigli mirati. La nostra farmacia è anche un HUB di vaccinazione, lavorando per proteggere la nostra comunità dalle malattie infettive.

Riconosciamo l'importanza di una gestione integrata delle terapie farmacologiche, soprattutto per i pazienti con condizioni croniche. I nostri farmacisti collaborano con i medici curanti per ottimizzare le terapie, garantendo che i farmaci siano adeguati alle esigenze individuali di ciascun paziente. Siamo qui per fornire sostegno e consulenza continua, monitorando l'aderenza al trattamento e offrendo suggerimenti per migliorare i risultati di salute.

Name: ONPBF - Ordre National des Pharmaciens du Burkina Faso-Officiel
Description:
L'Ordre National des Pharmaciens du Burkina Faso
L'Ordre national des pharmaciens du Burkina Faso (ONPBF) a été créé par la loi n° 027-2012/AN du 5 juin 2012. Il s'agit d'une organisation professionnelle qui regroupe tous les pharmaciens autorisés à exercer au Burkina Faso, quel que soit leur statut ou leur domaine d'activité. L'Ordre possède une personnalité juridique.


Missions principales
L'Ordre national des pharmaciens du Burkina Faso a pour missions principales de:

Veiller au respect des valeurs fondamentales de la profession, les défendre et les promouvoir.

Assurer la confidentialité des données de santé personnelles.

Garantir la qualité et la sécurité des services fournis aux patients et à la population en exigeant une compétence reconnue de la part de ses membres.

Défendre l'honneur et l'indépendance professionnelle des pharmaciens.

Veiller au respect de la moralité, de la probité et du dévouement, ainsi qu'au respect du code de déontologie par tous les membres.

Organisation
Les organes de l'Ordre sont le conseil national et les conseils régionaux. L'instance suprême de l'Ordre est le congrès, qui se réunit tous les deux ans et regroupe tous les pharmaciens inscrits.





Le siège du conseil national de l'Ordre est situé à Ouagadougou.

Pour plus d'informations, visitez notre site web : https://ordrepharmacien.bf/

Name: BioVitality Romania
Description:
“Medicul îngrijeşte, natura vindecă.” Hipocrate

Teologia in crestinism, sustine ca relatia dintre fiinta umana si Creatorul ei reprezinta cauza bolilor. Atitudinea omului inzestrat cu vointa libera alege uneori sa se indeparteze de Dumnezeu prin neascultare, astfel ca boala sau suferinta pot marca existenta noastra pe pamant. „Dumnezeu, care a făcut trupul, n-a făcut şi boala, tot astfel cum El, deşi a făcut sufletul, n-a făcut nicidecum şi păcatul” (Sfântul Vasile cel Mare).

In acelasi mod, si filozofia Ayurveda trateaza fiinta umana ca pe un intreg: trup, minte si suflet. Dezechilibrul dintre acestea conduce la o sanatate precara si un corp bolnav. Adoptarea şi menținerea unui mod de viaţă înţelept (sau cumpatat in crestinism), amplificarea credinţei şi folosirea rugăciunii ca modalitate de vindecare şi reechilibrare a fiinţei umane, reprezinta una din modalitatile de practica terapeutica in Ayurveda.

Asadar, medicina ar trebui studiata si aplicata prin ambele abordari: holistic  si reductionist . Organismul uman fiind atat de complex, medicina l-a cercetat impartind intregul in parti tot mai usor de studiat, dar numai o analiza finala de ansamblu, va putea ajuta pe cel suferind in vindecare. Acea analiza care intelege corpul uman ca pe un sistem complex de componente interdependente si interconditionate intre ele, dar si cu alti factori din mediul inconjurator.


O ramura foarte importanta a Ayurvedei este fitoterapia. Tradiția de peste 5000 mii de ani in urma, a folosirii plantelor in scop terapeutic este o suficientă ”probă a timpului”. Ele reprezinta o sursa de autentica inspiratie pentru gandirea stiintifica actuala.
Dorinta noastră este de a servi nevoile dumneavoastra de sanatate cu produse pe bază de plante. Cunostintele stravechi de medicina ayurvedica, bazate pe traiul natural si holistic, imbinate cu cercetarea stiintifica si metode de testare moderne, ne-au ajutat sa alegem produsele HISHIMO PHARMACEUTICALS PVT LTD.

Our services span professional prescription care, chronic disease support, maternal and child health guidance, skincare and wellness consultations, sexual health support, and preventive health initiatives. We are also building innovative healthcare access models, including digital health wallets for individuals, families, and organizations: designed to make planning and paying for healthcare simpler, more transparent, and more flexible than traditional insurance systems.

About RXRHAMP Pharmacy Career Services

RXRHAMP Pharmacy Career Services is a mission-driven consulting and coaching organization dedicated to empowering pharmacists and optimizing pharmacy businesses across DC, Maryland, and Virginia. Founded by a pharmacist with over 20 years of combined experience in Nigeria and the United States, our organization bridges clinical excellence, operational expertise, and business leadership. Our founder has served top U.S. healthcare and retail organizations, including Kaiser Permanente, CVS Pharmacy, MedStar Health, Ahold Delhaize USA, Walgreens Pharmacy, and Giant Food of Maryland, gaining unparalleled insight into retail, ambulatory, hospital, and independent pharmacy practice.

We provide two core services:

Pharmacist Coaching & Mentorship – We guide foreign-trained pharmacists and U.S.-based professionals in career development, licensure preparation, clinical skill enhancement, leadership training, and professional growth. Our goal is to equip pharmacists with the knowledge, confidence, and mindset to succeed in diverse healthcare environments.

Contract-Based Pharmacy Services for Businesses – We help pharmacy owners and organizations optimize operations, workflows, and clinical programs while ensuring regulatory compliance, patient safety, and business growth. Our services include medication therapy management, immunization administration, pharmacy workflow optimization, inventory management, asset protection, hazardous waste management, CPR training, diabetes and chronic disease education, and full-spectrum retail pharmacy operations and leadership support.

At RXRHAMP, we combine heart-centered, patient-focused care with strategic business acumen. We believe that pharmacy is not just dispensing

We specialize in custom compounding for humans and pets—from bioidentical hormone formulations to pediatric dosing adjustments to allergen-free alternatives. ΤΟ ΟΡΑΜΑ ΜΑΣ
Να φέρουμε τις υπηρεσίες και τα προϊόντα μας κοντά στο κοινό, προσπαθώντας να ικανοποιούμε κάθε ανάγκη για υγεία και ομορφιά.
Δημιουργούμε προσωπική σχέση με κάθε έναν πελάτη μας ξεχωριστά και φιλοδοξούμε να γίνουμε οι δικοί σας σύμβουλοι υγείας
μέσα σε ένα κλίμα ασφάλειας και εμπιστοσύνης.
Tο πρώτο Φαρμακείο Κατσανδρής, ιδρύθηκε το 1974 από τον φαρμακοποιό Κατσανδρή Δημήτρη στο κέντρο του Μενιδίου επί της οδού Δεκελείας 10 και έκτοτε αποτελεί ένα σταθερό σημείο αναφοράς στο χώρο των φαρμακείων της περιοχής.
Στα σχεδόν 50 χρόνια λειτουργίας του, δραστηριοποιείται στη λιανική πώληση φαρμάκων, παραφαρμάκων, καλλυντικών, δερμοκαλλυντικών, φυτικών προϊόντων, συμπληρωμάτων διατροφής, εξειδικευμένων προϊόντων υγείας, ευεξίας και ομορφιάς, με ομοιοπαθητικά φάρμακα και σύγχρονο φαρμακοτεχνικό εργαστήριο.
Σήμερα διοικείται από τη δεύτερη γενιά φαρμακοποιού Κατσανδρή Γιώργου και διατηρεί το οικογενειακό κλίμα στις σχέσεις με τους συνεργάτες, αλλά κυρίως την προσωπική σχέση με τους πελάτες.
Το προσωπικό του φαρμακείου απαρτίζεται από επαγγελματίες υγείας που διαθέτουν άριστη κατάρτιση και γνώσεις για την παροχή εξειδικευμένων υπηρεσιών και συμβουλών σε θέματα υγείας και ομορφιάς. Δίνει πάντα ευκαιρίες σε ικανούς και δημιουργικούς ανθρώπους για να στελεχώσουν τα καταστήματά του στην περιοχή των Αχαρνών μέσα σε ένα δυναμικά εξελισσόμενο περιβάλλον.
Το 2023 επέκτεινε την δραστηριότητά του ανοίγοντας και δεύτερο φαρμακείο επι της οδού Δημητρίου Δέδε 18. Αναλαμβάνοντας να εξυπηρετήσουμε μια γειτονιά της πόλης παραμένουμε στη διάθεση του κοινού με την γνωστή ποιότητα εξυπηρέτησης που παρέχουμε.

Name: ManipulaMed Farmácia de Manipulação Veterinária
Description:
A origem da ManipulaMed
Quando o cuidado se transforma em missão:
 
A ideia da ManipulaMed nasceu de um momento de dor, coragem e amor incondicional.
 
Tudo começou em Campinas, quando nossa fiel companheira, a Emma uma cadela Pug doce, alegre e cheia de vida foi diagnosticada com um câncer no quadril. O impacto da notícia foi devastador. Entre exames, consultas e a busca por tratamentos, enfrentamos uma realidade que muitas famílias vivem: a dificuldade em encontrar medicamentos personalizados e com entrega rápida para atender às necessidades específicas de um animal em estado delicado.
 
Receitas manipuladas demoravam dias, os prazos não acompanhavam a urgência do caso, e a falta de adaptação das fórmulas comprometia o tratamento. Foi nesse momento que percebemos algo essencial: não havia, em nossa cidade, uma estrutura preparada para oferecer o cuidado personalizado, ágil e de qualidade que os animais merecem.
 
Foi então que nasceu a ideia da ManipulaMed.
 
Mais do que uma farmácia de manipulação veterinária, a ManipulaMed é fruto de uma história real. Um projeto criado para transformar a experiência de outros tutores e animais, oferecendo fórmulas personalizadas com qualidade farmacêutica, atendimento humanizado e entrega rápida em toda a região de Campinas.
 
Nosso compromisso é com a vida, o bem-estar e o amor que existe entre humanos e seus animais. Investimos em tecnologia, parcerias com médicos-veterinários, processos rigorosos de controle de qualidade e uma equipe capacitada para manipular medicamentos com precisão e carinho.
 
Emma nos deixou um legado. Ela nos ensinou que cada segundo importa, que cada dose pode fazer diferença e que todo animal merece um cuidado feito sob medida.
 
Hoje, a ManipulaMed representa mais do que uma farmácia. Representa uma promessa: cuidar de cada animal como se fosse da nossa própria família.

Contudo, a empresa não é somente uma distribuidora de medicamentos, mas sim uma facilitadora aos pacientes, que poderão adquirir seus medicamentos via telefone através do nosso Televendas.

Name: Farmacie Goodlife
Description:
Con orgoglio annunciamo la costituzione del Gruppo Farmacie Goodlife, una nuova realtà che coniuga sapientemente esperienza, innovazione e un profondo impegno per il benessere della persona. Il gruppo, nato a Trento dalla visione lungimirante della Dottoressa Francesca Ferri, farmacista con oltre 40 anni di comprovata esperienza nel settore farmaceutico e di ricerca, e dalla passione e ricerca di innovazione del figlio Giorgio Guerrini, alla guida del gruppo, racchiude nel suo nome la sua filosofia ispiratrice: La Buona Vita.

Un’esperienza consolidata al servizio del territorio

Al fulcro del Gruppo Farmacie Goodlife si colloca la storica Farmacia di Martignano, acquisita nel 1990 dalla Dottoressa Ferri, dove viene aperto un laboratorio galenico all’avanguardia. Profondamente radicata nel tessuto locale, la farmacia rappresenta da sempre un punto di riferimento imprescindibile per la comunità, non solo trentina ma di tutto il territorio nazionale, offrendo un servizio completo e personalizzato che va oltre la mera dispensazione di farmaci. Nel corso degli anni, la farmacia ha saputo evolversi, ampliando la propria gamma di servizi e prodotti al fine di rispondere alle esigenze sempre più complesse dei cittadini.

Un futuro all’insegna dell’innovazione e del benessere a 360 gradi

Con l’ingresso di Giorgio Guerrini, il Gruppo Farmacie Goodlife ha intrapreso un ambizioso percorso di innovazione e crescita, ponendo al centro della propria mission il benessere olistico della persona. L’acquisizione della farmacia di Ravina nel 2020 rappresenta un ulteriore tassello fondamentale di questo progetto, ampliando ulteriormente la rete di servizi e competenze a disposizione dei cittadini.

Un team di professionisti altamente qualificati al servizio della vostra salute

Il Gruppo Farmacie Goodlife vanta un team di farmacisti e professionisti altamente qualificati, costantemente aggiornati sulle ultime novità del panorama farmaceutico e sanitario.

Description:
Pharmacy operations should be seamless, data-driven, and patient-focused—yet, many pharmacies in Africa struggle with outdated systems, inefficient documentation, and regulatory challenges.

That’s where IntelliPharm comes in.

IntelliPharm is the first free-to-use, AI-powered vertical SaaS platform for pharmacy management in Africa. Our mission is to streamline pharmacy operations, ensure accountability, improve patient safety, and elevate pharmaceutical care standards.

Unlike traditional systems, IntelliPharm provides a comprehensive, cloud-based solution that integrates prescription management, inventory automation, financial tools, supplier networks, and regulatory compliance—all in one platform.

 Built for African Pharmacies
We designed IntelliPharm to solve critical industry challenges, including:
 Lack of patient medication records leading to medication errors
 Poor inventory management, causing drug shortages or wastage
 Limited financial visibility, making profitability hard to track
 Fragmented healthcare communication, affecting patient care continuity

 Why Choose IntelliPharm?
 100% Free-to-Use – We remove financial barriers for pharmacies of all sizes.
 AI-Powered Efficiency – Automate stock management, prescription tracking & reporting.
 Patient-Centric Data – Maintain universal patient medication records for better care.
 Integrated Financial Tools – Manage accounts, payments & financing in-platform.
 Supplier Marketplace – Directly connect with verified pharmaceutical suppliers.
 Scalable & Cloud-Based – Manage multiple branches with real-time data syncing.
 Mobile-Friendly – Monitor pharmacy operations anytime, anywhere.

 Who We Serve

Independent Pharmacies | Chain Pharmacies | Hospital Pharmacies | Wholesale Distributors | Patent Medicine Vendors (PMVs)

 Our Vision: To transform pharmacies into pillars of healthcare—not just places to dispense medicine, but essential players in Africa’s healthcare ecosystem.

La nostra storia inizia nel 1992, nel cuore di Cologna di Pellezzano, un incantevole paesino della provincia di Salerno. Grazie alla tenacia e alla determinazione del Dott. Antonio D'Urso, e dopo una battaglia legale intensa ma vittoriosa per il riconoscimento della titolarità acquisita tramite concorso, la nostra farmacia ha aperto i battenti.

Il Dott. Antonio D'Urso, erede di una tradizione familiare di farmacisti che si estende per tre generazioni, ha sempre esercitato la sua professione con dedizione assoluta, onestà e integrità morale. La sua missione è stata quella di servire la comunità, offrendo competenza e professionalità senza pari, rimanendo fedele agli ideali di un operatore sanitario esemplare.

Oggi, continuiamo questa nobile tradizione. Sotto la guida esperta del Dott. Antonio, coadiuvato dai suoi eredi, la nostra farmacia si impegna a mantenere elevati standard di cura e servizio, portando avanti i valori di famiglia nonostante le sfide poste dalla crisi economica al Sistema Sanitario Nazionale.

In Farmacia D'Urso, crediamo nella forza della comunità e nell'importanza di un supporto sanitario accessibile e di qualità. Vi invitiamo a visitarci per scoprire di persona il nostro impegno verso la salute e il benessere di ogni cliente.

La vostra salute è la nostra priorità. Benvenuti in famiglia.

El título de Experto Universitario en Farmacia Práctica Asistencial capacita a los profesionales para enfrentar los nuevos retos. El avance económico y social en nuestro entorno se refleja en una mayor esperanza de vida, que va acompañada de un incremento de las demandas de los servicios públicos sanitarios.  Ello está conduciendo a la transformación social de la Farmacia Comunitaria y a un cambio de paradigma en la profesión farmacéutica, que ha pasado de estar centrada en el medicamento a enfocarse en las necesidades de los y las pacientes, evolucionando hacia una farmacia eminentemente asistencial.
La Farmacia Asistencial va a constituirse en pieza clave en la gestión y asistencia sanitaria. En este contexto, la provisión de servicios de cuidados de la salud mediante la implantación de servicios profesionales farmacéuticos, así como el apoyo de la Farmacia Comunitaria al modelo asistencial público y al uso racional del medicamento, proporcionan beneficios sociales, clínicos y económicos. 

Este título de  Experto Universitario en Farmacia Práctica Asistencial se presenta como una vía para la especialización en farmacia asistencial, permitiendo a los y las farmacéuticas adquirir los conocimientos, habilidades, motivación, confianza y capacidad para prestar servicios de atención farmacéutica de manera responsable y eficiente. Las competencias adquiridas en este título de Experto Universitario les permitirán adaptarse a las nuevas necesidades de la sociedad en relación con el uso de medicamentos y la asistencia sanitaria.

Name: Apotheek Zuiderhaaks & Apotheek Bernhardplein
Description:
Apotheek Zuiderhaaks en Apotheek Bernhardplein willen bekend staan als de beste apotheken van Den Helder.
Dit gaan we bereiken doordat de apotheek onderscheidend is op kwaliteit en servicegerichtheid en voorop loopt in nieuwe ontwikkelingen in de (farmaceutische) zorg.

Wie zijn wij?
Apotheek Zuiderhaaks en Apotheek Bernhardplein zijn twee zelfstandige apotheken in Den Helder. Het team, inclusief de apothekers, rouleert over beide vestigingen. Apotheek Zuiderhaaks is een grote apotheek in de wijk Nieuw Den Helder. Apotheek Bernhardplein is een nieuwe, kleine maar hard groeiende apotheek in het centrum van Den Helder, in een gezondheidscentrum. Uiteindelijk draait alles bij onze apotheken om hoogwaardige patiëntenzorg. We besteden dan ook veel aandacht aan scholing, communicatie, voorlichting en zorgprojecten. Wij verstrekken farmaceutische zorg aan mensen in heel Den Helder, waaronder ook twee verzorgingstehuizen en een aantal kleinere instellingen. Wij hebben een uitstekende samenwerking met de huisartsen, thuiszorg, collega apothekers en het ziekenhuis in de regio. Wij proberen continu onze kwaliteit te verbeteren en maken daarbij gebruik van ons HKZ gecertificeerd kwaliteitssysteem. Door middel van farmabuddy's, baxteren, herhaalservice, central filling, papierloos werken, een track & trace systeem en e-Health via MijnGezondheid.net blijven we telkens weer vernieuwen. Wij werken met Pharmacom. We bereiden niet zelf. We hebben geen avond-, nacht- en weekenddienst. Den Helder is prima bereikbaar per OV of per auto. Het ligt op ca. 40 minuten rijden van Alkmaar.
Ons team
Ons team bestaat uit 3 apothekers, 13 apothekersassistenten, 2 apotheekmedewerkers, 1 administratief medewerker, 4 bezorgers en een schoonmaakster. We hebben vrijwel altijd één of meer stagiair apothekersassistenten in opleiding. Zo bestaat het hele team uit ongeveer 25 personen.

Nos Valeurs

L'éthique, la transparence et le professionnalisme sont au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous nous engageons à construire des partenariats durables fondés sur la confiance et l'intégrité, en respectant les normes les plus élevées de l'industrie.

Collaborons

Il nome della nostra azienda riecheggia nell’ambito farmaceutico ed erboristico campano da più di quattro generazioni, con una missione chiara: prenderci cura della salute e del benessere della nostra clientela con professionalità, innovazione e dedizione.

La nostra storia inizia nel 1920, quando la nostra famiglia, con passione e spirito pionieristico, ha aperto la prima farmacia di quella che oggi è una realtà solida e riconosciuta nel settore. Nel corso degli anni, abbiamo saputo evolverci, mantenendo saldi i valori che ci contraddistinguono: fiducia, integrità e competenza. Oggi, il nostro gruppo rappresenta un punto di riferimento nel settore farmaceutico, offrendo non solo farmaci e prodotti per la salute, ma anche un'ampia gamma di servizi dedicati al benessere della persona. Dalla consulenza personalizzata alla fitoterapia, dalla dermocosmesi alla nutraceutica, il nostro obiettivo è garantire soluzioni efficaci e su misura per ogni esigenza.

La nostra crescita è stata guidata dalla capacità di innovare senza mai perdere il legame con le nostre radici. Crediamo fermamente nell'importanza della formazione continua, investendo nella specializzazione del nostro personale e nell’adozione delle più moderne tecnologie per offrire un servizio sempre all’altezza delle aspettative. Nel corso degli anni, la fiducia dei nostri clienti è stata il nostro più grande riconoscimento. È grazie a loro che continuiamo a espanderci e a rafforzare la nostra presenza nel settore, con la stessa passione e dedizione che ci accompagnano da oltre 100 anni.

Name: 406 Rx, PLLC
Description:
In an era where large-scale corporations are monopolizing the healthcare landscape, the presence of small, independent pharmacies is dwindling. This trend has left rural communities with limited local options for essential pharmacy services, making access to prescriptions, over-the-counter medications, home care supplies, and even basic items like bandages and sports braces a challenge.

In 2018, our founders identified this pressing issue and united to counteract it. Today, 406 Rx, a proud member of Montana Family Pharmacies, stands strong with over seven locations. Our growth and collective strength enable us to compete effectively and bring your healthcare back home!

Our commitment is to deliver exceptional, personalized customer service that prioritizes the health, safety, and well-being of our patients. Our dedicated team, comprising skilled Pharmacists, proficient Pharmacy Technicians, and supportive Clerks, is ready to assist you on your journey towards improved health.

We employ cutting-edge software and robotic automation to streamline our processes, ensuring you receive your medications promptly. We understand that health issues can be time-consuming, and we believe your pharmacy experience should not add to that burden.

As Montana natives, we share a deep connection with our local communities and take immense pride in contributing to their prosperity. We look forward to continuing to serve you and appreciate your trust in us.

Pharmaxy, c'est la plateforme de recrutement pensée pour le secteur officinal normand.
Fondée par un étudiant en pharmacie à Rouen, Pharmaxy répond à un besoin simple mais crucial : faciliter la rencontre entre les pharmacies et les talents qui les cherchent. Trop souvent, les étudiants en pharmacie, les apprentis préparateurs et les préparateurs diplômés galérent à trouver des stages, des postes ou des alternances pour le DEUST. De l'autre côté, les pharmaciens passent du temps à publier des annonces sur les réseaux sociaux et des plateformes généralistes qui non seulement est saturées mais aussi ne sont pas adaptées aux spécificités du secteur.

Pharmaxy change ça : apporter une solution simple, efficace pour connecter les deux parties au bon moment.

Le modèle est pensé pour les réalités des pharmacies et des candidats. Demandes locales, interface intuitive et accessibilité pour tous.

In der Marien-Apotheke werden seit über 10 Jahren sterile Arzneimittel wie Zytostatika-Infusionslösungen, die in der Onkologie angewendet werden, hergestellt. Der vorhandene Sterilraum bietet aber auch die Möglichkeit der Versorgung von Patienten mit chronischen Schmerzen oder Palliativpatienten mit Schmerzpumpen. Hier verstehen wir uns als Partner vor Ort, um die Versorgung onkologischer Patienten sicherzustellen und kurze Wege für die Betroffenen zu schaffen.

Im Bereich der Seniorenheimversorgung bietet die Marien-Apotheke neben der Lieferung der Arzneimittel die Möglichkeit des patientenindividuellen Blisterns an. Dieses System führt zu mehr Sicherheit bei der Arzneimittelanwendung und zur Entlastung des Pflegepersonals. Mitarbeiterschulung und die Kontrolle der Arzneimittelvorräte auf den Stationen gehört mit zu unserem Serviceangebot.

Übrigens können die Wochenblister auch für den Privathaushalt erstellt werden. Das entlastet pflegende Angehörige oder den Pflegedienst und erhöht die Sicherheit bei der Arzneimitteleinnahme.

Seit Juni 2016 sind wir Leukin Servicepoint. Sie können sich bei uns typisieren lassen, um Leben zu retten.

Whether you require specialized compounded medications or routine pharmacy services, Old Monroe Compounding Pharmacy is here to meet your healthcare needs with professionalism, integrity, and compassion.

Name: MODERN VETERINARY CENTRE
Description:
Company Overview

Established in 1999 under the ownership of Saeed Mohamed Al-Kaabi, our veterinary pharmacy has grown into a trusted provider of livestock animal health solutions. From our beginnings as a single outlet, we have expanded to six branches across the country, serving farmers, breeders, and livestock owners with consistency and reliability.

We specialize exclusively in veterinary medicines and pharmaceutical products for livestock animals, focusing on quality, safety, and accessibility. Backed by decades of experience, our pharmacy is committed to supporting healthier herds, improving animal welfare, and strengthening the livestock sector through dependable products and friendly, knowledgeable service.

Our Mission

To provide high-quality veterinary medicines and reliable pharmaceutical solutions for livestock animals, supporting farmers and animal owners through trusted products, professional service, and a strong commitment to animal health and sustainability.

Our Vision

To be a leading and trusted livestock veterinary pharmacy, recognized for excellence, integrity, and innovation in animal health, while contributing to stronger herds and a more sustainable livestock industry nationwide.

نبذة عن الشركة

تأسست صيدليتنا البيطرية عام 1999 تحت ملكية السيد سعيد محمد الكعبي، وقد أصبحت على مرّ السنوات من الجهات الموثوقة في مجال صحة الحيوانات المنتجة. بدأت كفرع واحد، وتوسّعت لتشمل ستة فروع منتشرة في مختلف أنحاء الدولة، لخدمة المربين وأصحاب الثروة الحيوانية بكل التزام وثقة.

نختص حصريًا بتوفير الأدوية والمستحضرات البيطرية للحيوانات المنتجة، مع التركيز على الجودة والسلامة وتلبية احتياجات السوق. وبفضل خبرتنا الطويلة، نعمل على دعم صحة القطيع وتحسين الإنتاجية من خلال منتجات موثوقة وخدمة ودّية يقدمها فريق ذو كفاءة ومعرفة.

رسالتنا

توفير أدوية بيطرية عالية الجودة وحلول دوائية موثوقة للحيوانات المنتجة، بما يدعم المربين وأصحاب الثروة الحيوانية، ويساهم في تعزيز صحة القطيع واستدامة القطاع الحيواني.

Name: Phillips Total Care Pharmacy
Description:
We are a long term care pharmacy services provider, helping you meet the needs of your patients and caregivers.

Phillips Total Care Pharmacy is committed to providing the most cost effective, organized and efficient drug distribution systems to our healthcare partners. We continue to evolve and be a leader in the long-term care pharmacy industry, the implementation of new technology which has allowed us streamline our processes, increase efficiency, and ultimately increase the safety of our product for the residence we service.

Located in Mauston, Wisconsin, Phillips Total Care Pharmacy is an independent long-term care pharmacy provider servicing facilities throughout the state of Wisconsin with over 32 years of successful long-term care pharmacy experience.  Phillips Total Care Pharmacy is the current pharmaceutical provider for over 80 different facilities. This consists of; eighteen long-term care facilities, sixty assisted living/group home facilities, two secure facilities, and nine IV only facilities. Phillips services a total bed count of approximately 2100.

Phillips Total Care Pharmacy specializes in short-cycle pharmaceutical distribution and packaging, industry-leading technology, IV and enteral therapy, durable medical equipment and supplies, pharmacist consulting, and delivery services. Two pharmacists and a registered nurse, share on call duty 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with a fleet of drivers available at all times.

Phillips Total Care Pharmacy holds a current Wisconsin Pharmacy license, is licensed with the DEA, and holds all licenses and qualifications necessary to provide pharmacy services in accordance with accepted professional principles and applicable state and federal regulations. All pharmacists and nursing professionals hold current Wisconsin licenses.

Name: Pharmacie de la Bolière
Description:
Bienvenue à la pharmacie de la Bolière, un véritable espace santé et bien-être pensé pour vous !
Avec une grande surface de vente, lumineuse et organisée, nous vous offrons un très large choix de produits de parapharmacie : dermocosmétique, hygiène, nutrition, aromathérapie, dispositifs médicaux, soins bébé, compléments alimentaires, bien-être naturel… le tout à des prix imbattables.

Notre équipe dynamique, professionnelle et toujours souriante est à votre écoute pour vous accompagner dans toutes vos questions santé. Proximité, bienveillance, expertise : nous mettons tout en œuvre pour que chaque visite soit une expérience agréable et utile.

 Toutes les missions d’aujourd’hui : nous les réalisons !
Notre officine assume l’ensemble des services et missions :
-Dispensation des médicaments sur ordonnance et en conseil.
-Accompagnement personnalisé des patients chroniques (asthme, diabète, hypertension, traitements lourds…).
-Entretiens pharmaceutiques (AVK, AOD, asthme, etc.).
-Vaccinations (grippe, COVID-19, rappel DTP, papillomavirus selon recommandations).
-Dépistages et tests rapides (angine, glycémie, tension…).
-Réalisation des bilans partagés de médication.
-Préparation des doses à administrer (PDA) pour les patients et établissements.
-Suivi des traitements et accompagnement à l’observance.
-Conseils en phytothérapie, aromathérapie, homéopathie et micronutrition.
-Vente et location de matériel médical (contention, orthèses, lits médicaux, aérosols…).
-Accompagnement en santé publique : prévention, éducation thérapeutique, conseils saisonniers.
-Espace bébé et maternité avec accompagnement dédié.
-Services numériques : e-ordonnances, click & collect, renouvellements facilités.

Description:
Biz;

Eczacılığa gönül veren, mesleği ve halk sağlığı için mücadele eden, eczacılık deontolojisini önemseyen ve etik değerlerini yükseltmeye çalışan, özgür düşünen eczacılar yetmişli yıllarda “Çağdaş Eczacılar” olarak bir araya geldiler. Bu bilinçle gerek eczacı odalarında, gerek TEB Merkez Heyeti’nde sorumluluk alıp mesleğimizin sorunlarının çözümünde önemli görevlerde bulunarak, büyük değişikliklere ve önemli kazanımlara imza attılar.

Biz Çağdaş Eczacılar, geçmişten aldığımız güç, bilgi, birikimle ve yeni bakış açılarımızla harmanladığımız projelerimizle; sorgulayan, eleştirilere açık, eşitlikçi, şeffaf, daha güçlü ve örgütlü bir Ankara Eczacı Odası yaratmak için bir araya gelerek umutla bir yola çıktık.

Güzel günlere olan inancımız tam. Yolumuz uzun ancak adımlarımız kararlı! Biliyoruz ki, dayanışmayla birliktelikle her türlü güçlüğün üstesinden gelecek bilgi birikimimiz, deneyimimiz ve cesaretimiz var.  Mesleğimizin geleceği için Birlik’le çatışan değil, “birlikte” üreten, ortak aklı savunan, çözüm odaklı bir anlayış ile uzlaşmacı adımlar atmayı amaçlayan, cumhuriyet değerlerine sahip bir ekip olarak çalışacağız. Meslekte; birimizi değil, hepimizi önemsiyor “ben” değil “biz” olmanın hayalini kuruyoruz. 

Eğer sen de; eczacının toplum sağlığının vazgeçilmez bir parçası olduğunu düşünüyorsan, meslek adına bir hayalin söyleyecek bir sözün varsa, sesimizin duyulmasını istiyorsan, Ankara Eczacı Odası’nı evin olarak benimseyip sahiplenmek için bizimle birlikte meslek mücadelemize sen de katıl, çünkü varlığın meslek için çok kıymetli.

Biz;

Mesleğimiz için Çağdaş Eczacılar var, Çağdaş Eczacılar varsa UMUT var diyoruz.

Birlikte başardık, birlikte başaracağız.

Yeni yüzyılın eczacılığını hep birlikte yazmaya var mısın?

Description:
At Landy's Pharmacy & Compounding we offer traditional pharmacy services as well as compounding for a variety of needs. Compounding is making a medication specific to an individual patient. Let us find a solution for you, your family members, and your pets! 

We offer an extensive line of supplements to keep you and your family healthy. In addition to pharmacy services, Landy's offers a growing gift selection for our patrons.

Inside the Landy's Pharmacy compounding lab we create a wide variety of medications that cover a multitude of needs to include:

* Dentistry - As an compounding pharmacy we work with dentists to create custom made dental gels, mouth washes, and much more.

* Pediatrics -  We make a parents life so much easier by creating flavor filled medicine that kids take without the fuss and fight.  Medications are designed around the specific needs of each individual (considering dosage form,  strength, ingredients, allergies and dye sensitivities).  

* Hormone Replacement Therapy - Balancing hormones is needed for both men and women of varying ages. Our Hormone Specialists offer consultations to make recommendations to your practitioner to customize a plan specifically for each patient. 

* Dermatology and Skin Care - There is much more available that can be compounded to solve wound and skin care issues not available commercially. Wound care powders, creams can be formulated to contain ingredients that assist with pain as well as antibiotics or antifungals. Customized topical anesthetics are an option for in office use for cosmetic procedures. 

* Pain Management - Pain can be managed topically as well as by oral medications. Topical preparations allow the patient a localized treatment option without the side effects of oral medications.  We offer pain consultations to establish the best formula for the issue.

Kompanija Nuceleonpharm je osnovana 2024. godine u Sarajevu, Bosna i Hercegovina. Temelji se na višegodišnjim znanju i iskustvu uposlenika u farmaceutskom i medicinskom sektoru. Osnovna djelatnost kompanije je zastupanje farmaceutskih kompanija, uvoz i distribucija lijekova i medicinskih sredstava.

Cilj nam je primijeniti strukturni, strogo definirani i usklađeni poslovni pristup, zadržavajući fleksibilnost i okretnost u zahtjevnom i promjenjivom poslovnom okruženju.

Praćenjem trendova u savremenom poslovanju i stalnim educiranjem zaposlenika povećavamo kvalitetu i učinkovitost, te tako udovoljavamo svim zahtjevima tržišta.

Društveno odgovornim poslovanjem i odgovornim odnosom prema okolini spremni smo ispuniti najviša očekivanja poslovnih partnera i prilagoditi se specifičnim zahtjevima tržišta.

Moderan pristup, izrazita kvaliteta, kao i ljubazno i stručno osoblje, rezultiraju zadovoljstvom naših kupaca, partnera i na kraju samih pacijenata čime ostvarujemo svrhu i misiju našeg postojanja.

Naša kompanija je zastupnik ugledne turske kompanije Nukleon. Nukleon proizvodi širok spektar proizvoda, uključujući radioaktivne proizvode, instrumente za nuklearnu medicinu, te potrošni materijal i dodatke.

Description:
FARMACIA AL PONTE della Dottoressa Manuela Cecchi a Ponte Buggianese (PT) effettua numerosi servizi come esami diagnostici, tamponi e vaccini, inoltre è dotata di Laboratorio Galenico.

Il Laboratorio Galenico della Farmacia Al Ponte è attivo da molti anni nel rispetto delle Norme di Buona Preparazione della Farmacopea Italiana. Nel laboratorio vengono allestite preparazioni Magistrali con presentazione di ricetta medica o Officinali sulla base delle formulazioni presenti nelle farmacopee dell’Unione Europea. Oltre alla competenza di un personale altamente formato e specializzato, vengono utilizzati strumenti all’avanguardia quali: incapsulatrici per la produzione di capsule di varie dimensioni, un miscelatore per la preparazione di gel, creme ed unguenti, una cappa per la lavorazione di sostanze citotossiche. Inoltre prepariamo lozioni, sciroppi, clismi, supposte, paste e prodotti erboristici e fitoterapici.

Farmacia Al Ponte eroga numerosi servizi come: Elettrocardiogramma; Holter Cardiaco; Holter Pressorio; Pannello Lipidico; Emoglobina Glicata; Proteina C Reattiva; Test GEK per individuare le Infiammazioni Alimentari; Vaccino COVID e Vaccino Antinfluenzale; Tampone COVID antigenico rapido; Tampone Streptococco A; Foratura Lobi.

Mit 01.01.2015 steht Ihnen das altbewährte Team unter neuer Führung tatkräftig zur Seite und berät Sie gerne in allen Fragen zu Arzneimitteln, deren Einnahme, Wirkung und Wechselwirkung mit anderen Arzneimitteln oder Nahrungsergänzungen.

Da uns die Homöopathie als ganzheitliche Therapie, bei der der individuelle Mensch behandelt wird und nie eine bestimmte Erkrankung, sehr am Herzen liegt, besucht das Team der St. Leonhard Apotheke regelmäßig Kurse der Österreichischen Gesellschaft für Homöopathische Medizin (ÖGHM) und berät Sie gerne bei der Auswahl der richtigen Akutarznei oder einem Komplexmittel.
Lassen Sie sich von uns in die Welt der Aromaöle entführen. Wir beraten Sie nicht nur bei der Wahl des richtigen ätherischen Öles für die Duftlampe oder die Sauna, wir mischen Ihnen auch individuelle  Aromaöle (Massageöle) und Salben. Aromatherapie bezeichnet die Anwendung ätherischer Öle zur Linderung von Krankheiten und zur Steigerung des Wohlbefindens und ist daher fester Bestandteil der Naturheilkunde.

Wir beraten Sie gerne ausführlich zu allen Themen und freuen uns auf ein Wiedersehen in der St. Leonhard Apotheke.

Mag. Nuk und ihr Team

Name: Apotheekhulp
Description:
Apotheekhulp, opgericht door 2 apothekers, begeleidt Apotheekassistenten om op zelfstandige basis in apotheken doorheen heel Vlaanderen aan de slag te gaan. Ons doel is om apotheken te ondersteunen die extra hulp nodig hebben, terwijl we apotheekassistenten de kans bieden om hun carrière naar een hoger niveau te tillen.

Bij Apotheekhulp krijg je niet alleen de mogelijkheid om als zelfstandig apotheekassistent aan de slag te gaan, maar we begeleiden je ook in elk aspect van het opstarten van je eigen zelfstandige onderneming. Wij zijn zelf 2 apothekers en bieden  uitgebreide ondersteuning en advies, zodat je met vertrouwen en kennis van zaken kunt beginnen. Onze partners staan klaar om je te helpen met administratieve formaliteiten, juridische aspecten en financiële planning, zodat jij je volledig kunt concentreren op wat je het beste doet: het bieden van hoogwaardige farmaceutische zorg.

Onze missie is om apotheekassistenten de waarde te geven die ze verdienen. We zijn ervan overtuigd dat hard werken en toewijding beloond moeten worden, en daarom zorgen wij ervoor dat je als zelfstandig apotheekassistent het maximale uit je carrière kunt halen.

Apotheekhulp biedt ook doorlopende farmaceutische knowhow en professionele ontwikkeling aan. We organiseren regelmatig trainingen en netwerkevenementen om je vaardigheden up-to-date te houden en je in een wam en hecht team welkom te laten voelen. Onze community van zelfstandige apotheekassistenten is een bron van inspiratie en ondersteuning, waarin je ervaringen kunt delen en van elkaar kunt leren. Zo ben je zelfstandig, maar sta je nooit alleen! 

Kies voor Apotheekhulp en ontdek de vrijheid, flexibiliteit en beloning van werken als zelfstandig apotheekassistent. Samen bouwen we aan een toekomst waarin jouw expertise en inzet optimaal worden gewaardeerd. Sluit je aan bij Apotheekhulp, plan een vrijblijvend infogesprek en zet de volgende stap in je carrière vandaag nog!

Name: Vital Care of Crown Point
Description:
Vital Care of Crown Point is a locally owned and operated infusion pharmacy dedicated to delivering high-quality, patient-centered care throughout Northern Indiana. We specialize in providing infusion therapy services for both acute and chronic health conditions  in a way that’s accessible, comfortable, and compassionate.

We offer patients the option to receive treatment in the comfort of their own home or in our modern infusion suite, designed to feel more like a spa than a hospital. 
Our private suites include reclining chairs, a welcoming environment, and personalized care ensuring an stress-free experience that promotes healing and dignity.

What We Do:

We coordinate with physicians and healthcare providers to deliver medically necessary therapies such as:

- IV antibiotics and antivirals
- Immunoglobulin (IVIG and SCIG) for immune deficiencies
- Biologics for autoimmune diseases (e.g., Crohn’s, RA, MS)
- Hydration therapy
- Nutritional support (TPN)
- Pain and palliative care infusions
- Specialty medications for rare and chronic conditions

Our team of experienced infusion pharmacists and infusion-trained nurses work collaboratively to ensure safe, effective, and timely care, tailored to each patient’s specific needs.

How We Help the Community:

At Vital Care of Crown Point, we believe that care should come to the patient — not the other way around.

That’s why we offer:
- Home infusion services for patients who are homebound, immunocompromised, or simply prefer the convenience
- A relaxing alternative to cold hospital settings for those who are eligible for outpatient care
- Fast onboarding and support, helping providers get patients started on therapy without unnecessary delays
- Insurance coordination and billing assistance, to minimize the stress on patients and families
- We are here to serve as a trusted local partner in care—improving outcomes, reducing hospital readmissions, and helping patients get back to living their lives.

Name: Apotek Laura Farma
Description:
Apotek Laura Farma adalah sebuah apotek baru yang berlokasi di sebelah barat Jakarta. Kami menawarkan berbagai produk farmasi berkualitas dan layanan kesehatan yang lengkap untuk memenuhi kebutuhan kesehatan pelanggan kami. Apotek Laura Farma didirikan dengan tujuan untuk memberikan pelayanan kesehatan terbaik dan pelayanan pelanggan yang berkualitas tinggi, sehingga pelanggan dapat memperoleh pengalaman yang nyaman dan aman saat membeli produk farmasi.



Kami menyediakan berbagai macam obat-obatan, suplemen, vitamin, dan produk kesehatan lainnya yang dipilih dengan hati-hati oleh tim farmasi kami untuk memastikan kualitas dan keamanan yang optimal. Selain itu, kami juga menyediakan alat kesehatan dan perawatan pribadi, seperti alat pengukur gula darah, dan lain-lain.



Kami juga bekerja sama dengan Praktek Dokter Umum untuk memberikan layanan kesehatan seperti konsultasi penyakit, pengobatan, tes gula darah, pengukuran tekanan darah, imunisasi, suntik KB dan vaksinasi, oleh dokter umum yang handal dan berpengalaman. Kami juga menyediakan layanan pengiriman obat untuk memudahkan pelanggan dalam memperoleh produk farmasi yang mereka butuhkan.



Apotek Laura Farma selalu berusaha untuk memenuhi kebutuhan kesehatan pelanggan kami dengan memberikan layanan dan produk yang terbaik. Kami selalu mengutamakan kualitas, keamanan, dan kenyamanan pelanggan dalam segala aspek bisnis kami. Kami percaya bahwa pelayanan yang berkualitas tinggi akan membantu kami membangun hubungan jangka panjang dengan pelanggan kami dan memperluas pasar kami di masa depan.

Name: Q-Bit Wellness Pharmacy
Description:
Don’t you deserve a pharmacy that will take a genuine interest in your medical needs?Have you ever waited in line to drop off a prescription at the pharmacy, then had to wait while it was being filled, then get back in line to pick it up? Has your pharmacy ever run out of your medications and had to order it for you? And how about hanging at a pharmacy for a vaccination? Meanwhile, the other folks waiting for their prescriptions may be sneezing or coughing, and did you remember your mask and hand sanitizer? Don’t forget the parking, the kids or even getting everyone in the household to get their vaccinations at the same time.
Urgent care facilities are helpful, yet they do not have your full medical history. Medications prescribed there may be in direct conflict with the medications you are already taking—potentially causing more harm than good. Is your general practitioner available to consult? Will your insurance cover this urgently needed medication expense? Or is this urgent medicine actually harming you?
Even under the best of circumstances, trips to the pharmacy can be a major outing—especially with illness, pain, injury, small children or elderly people. If you value quality time more than errands and chores, a full-service concierge pharmacist may be for you. 
When you are sick, or caring for an ill person in your home, why not have your prescriptions filled by an experienced pharmacist and delivered to your home? And why not take your vaccinations at home? Setting up delivery of your needed medications and scheduling household vaccinations will save you time and hassles, so you can get on with your life. And a concierge pharmacist will oversee your medications, even suggesting new medications to help you stay healthy and possibly reduce the number of medications you take. Having the correct medicine in the correct dosage is vital to keeping you and your family healthy.

Our pharmacists are experts in medication dispensing and always readily available to offer insightful advice and patient counselling on various health concerns. They take the time to explain each medication, ensuring that our patients understand their treatment plan thoroughly.

Our services go beyond just filling prescriptions. We offer over-the-counter medications, health consultations, medication reviews, chronic disease management advice, immunization services, and a wide array of health and wellness products.

At SaveOnRx Howden Pharmacy, we believe that healthcare is not one-size-fits-all. Therefore, we personalize each patient's experience, providing the attention and care they deserve. This commitment to our patients has helped us build a community of health-conscious individuals who trust and rely on our services.

Understanding the importance of accessibility in healthcare, our location within the Howden Medical Clinic allows patients to fulfill their prescription needs immediately after their clinic visit, ensuring a seamless healthcare experience. We also understand that life can be busy, and getting to the pharmacy might not always be convenient. To assist, we offer free delivery of prescribed medications directly to our patients' homes.

Whether you're looking for a trusted source for your medication needs or seeking personalized advice on managing your health, we are here to help. Connect with us today to start your health journey and experience the exceptional care that SaveOnRx Howden Pharmacy offers.

Name: MaxRx
Description:
MaxRx isn’t another pharmacy or telehealth brand — it’s a new standard for men’s healthcare and pharmaceutical distribution.

We built MaxRx to solve two big problems:
	1.	Men deserve better care. Most online health platforms are cookie-cutter and clinical. MaxRx delivers discreet, high-quality treatments with a brand voice that speaks directly to men — from ED and testosterone optimization to hair loss, peptides, and beyond.
	2.	Clinics deserve better pricing. Small and mid-sized practices are often overpaying for meds. MaxRx is launching a wholesale ordering solution that gives clinics access to premium medications at true scale pricing.

What makes MaxRx different?
	•	Compounding precision — engineered for maximum purity, potency, and effectiveness.
	•	Brand with backbone — we don’t water down care; we deliver results.
	•	Dual impact — empowering both patients and providers with better access and better pricing.

Launching October 2025 — MaxRx is set to change the game in men’s health and pharmacy-tech.

Our mission is simple: make advanced therapies more accessible, affordable, and effective — while giving men and providers the confidence, tools, and results they deserve.

Name: Waters Consulting Services
Description:
Waters Consulting Services is a pharmaceutical consulting firm partnering with healthcare organizations to design compliant, efficient, and financially sustainable medication-use strategies.

We work with Direct Primary Care (DPC) clinics, physician practices, and healthcare organizations to evaluate and implement in-office medication dispensing models, optimize pharmaceutical workflows, and navigate regulatory and licensing requirements.

Our approach helps organizations:

Improve patient access and outcomes through streamlined medication delivery

Unlock new revenue streams tied to pharmaceutical services

Reduce medication-related costs and operational friction

Maintain full compliance with state and federal regulations

While Direct Primary Care clinics are a natural fit for in-office dispensing, our services extend beyond any single care model. Waters Consulting Services supports organizations seeking to treat pharmaceuticals as a strategic component of care delivery, not just an operational expense.

Attachés à une approche globale et responsable de la santé, nous favorisons, dans la mesure du possible, les traitements naturels, notamment à travers des préparations réalisées dans nos propres laboratoires. Afin de garantir un accès simple et équitable aux soins, nous offrons également un service de livraison gratuite à nos clients.

Pharmora, c’est la conviction que des pharmacies indépendantes, engagées et innovantes sont essentielles à une santé humaine, accessible et de qualité.

GramMeds is a healthcare, Ayurveda, and wellness platform built with a mission to make medicines and holistic wellness accessible and affordable for every household in Tier-2, Tier-3, and rural India.

Our Vision
To empower India’s villages and towns with affordable healthcare at their doorstep, blending modern efficiency with Ayurvedic wisdom - ensuring “Healthcare for Every Gram.”

Affordable branded & generic medicines
Ayurveda & wellness products
Prescription upload & doorstep delivery
Localized service designed for Tier-2/3 cities and rural regions

Name: SolaraRX Pharmacy
Description:
SolaraRX Pharmacy is a groundbreaking, clinic-based integrated pharmacy model established to revolutionize pharmaceutical services and directly address critical health disparities. Recognizing the urgent need for accessible medications, particularly in Chicago communities facing alarming drugstore closures on the South and West sides, SolaraRX prioritizes improving medication access and adherence for vulnerable populations. While deeply committed to providing specialized care for the LGBTQIA+ community, including expert HIV/AIDS medication management, accessible PrEP services, and convenient home delivery, SolaraRX operates with a core focus on patient well-being rather than profit maximization. 

Distinguishing itself from traditional retail pharmacies, SolaraRX implements a Comprehensive Integrative Clinical Pharmacy Model. This patient-centered approach emphasizes direct engagement with individuals, seamless collaboration with other healthcare professionals, and the full integration of clinical pharmacy services into every aspect of patient care. "Solara," derived from "solar," embodies the pharmacy's mission to bring hope, healing, and illumination to the community by actively addressing disparities in healthcare access. SolaraRX is dedicated to providing comprehensive wellness services and tailored support to meet the unique needs of vulnerable populations, setting a new standard for accessible and compassionate pharmaceutical care.

Name: Pain Balm
Description:
Formerly known as "Arthritis and Pain Relief Balm" by Kingston Chemicals. 

New Name, New Branding, same great product inside huge 250g jar.  

An effective, TGA (Therapeutic Goods Administration) approved formula for pain relief. Proven to alleviate mild arthritic pain, sports and muscle soreness, joint pain and inflammation.
Whether you're an athlete, arthritis sufferer, or dealing with daily discomfort, Pain Balm offers a reliable solution.
Patented formula, EST 1992. 

AUSTRALIAN OWNED & MADE!

Naturally Derived Actives:

Eucalyptus Oil: Eucalyptus oil is known for its analgesic (pain-relieving) and anti-inflammatory properties. When applied topically, it can help soothe muscle and joint pain by reducing inflammation and promoting blood circulation. Its cooling effect can provide relief to sore muscles and contribute to the overall sensation of comfort.

Clove Bud Oil: Clove bud oil contains a compound called eugenol, which has both analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. It's often used for its pain-relieving effects, making it useful in alleviating muscle aches and pains. Additionally, clove bud oil has warming properties that can help increase blood flow to the area of application, providing a comforting sensation.

Melaleuca Oil (Tea Tree Oil): Melaleuca oil, commonly known as tea tree oil, possesses anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. While it might not directly provide pain relief, its ability to combat infections and reduce inflammation can contribute to the overall healing process. By maintaining a clean and infection-free environment around the affected area, melaleuca oil indirectly supports pain management.

Name: MEDVAL HEALTH LLC
Description:
MEDVAL HEALTH is a pharmaceutical and Non-pharmaceutical distribution company that aims to address a fundamental inefficiency in the pharmaceutical and non-pharmaceutical supply chain. Our model is built on the principle of direct, transparent partnerships, effectively bypassing the fragmented and costly traditional channels dominated by opportunistic brokers. 
What We Distribute
MEDVAL HEALTH provides a comprehensive range of critical healthcare products to meet the diverse needs of our clients. Our distribution network is equipped to handle everything from essential medications to complex medical devices, all sourced directly from reputable manufacturers.

Our product portfolio includes, but is not limited to:
Pharmaceuticals: i.e., essential drugs, specialty pharmaceuticals, and generic equivalents.
Medical Equipment and Devices: From advanced diagnostic tools and surgical instruments to patient monitoring systems and lab equipment.
Medical Consumables: A full line of everyday supplies, such as sterile gloves, syringes, IV kits, wound care products, and personal protective equipment (PPE).
Non-pharmaceutical supplies: Specialized products that support the operational needs of hospitals and clinics, ensuring they have everything required for efficient patient care.

Our mission is to establish a new standard for ethical and streamlined distribution, ensuring critical healthcare products reach their intended destinations with integrity and precision.
Our main clients include;
 Hospitals (private and public)
 Healthcare providers (private and public)
 Retail and institutional pharmacies
 Outpatient clinics and specialized treatment centers
 Medical research laboratories and academic institutions
 Government health agencies
 Non-profit organizations (NGOs)
 Long-term care facilities and nursing homes
Among many others.
Reach us today and get quality affordable products sourced directly from Certified and ethical manufacturers.

Name: Pharmacie affiliée à Uniprix Marc Picard et Stéphanie Simard
Description:
Bienvenue à Saint-Raymond, dans la magnifique région de Portneuf ! Ici, on profite du meilleur des deux mondes : la proximité de Québec et l’ambiance chaleureuse, conviviale et authentique des régions.

Dans notre pharmacie, on croit fermement qu’un bon milieu de travail, c’est un endroit où l’on se sent bien, où l’on rit, où l’on collabore et où l’on se dépasse ensemble. C’est exactement ce qu’on s’efforce de construire chaque jour.

Notre pratique est dynamique, moderne et résolument tournée vers le clinique. Grâce à une collaboration exceptionnelle avec les équipes médicales du réseau, la demande de consultation fait partie de notre quotidien. Prises en charge, ajustements, accompagnement… on aime être présents pour nos patients, et ça se ressent.

Vous travaillerez en équipe de 2 à 4 pharmaciens, ce qui nous permet d’offrir une présence clinique complète, mais aussi de maintenir une ambiance de travail vivante, solidaire et agréable. Notre équipe d’ATP — compétente et proactive — est là pour soutenir toutes les sphères : vaccination, DVCC pillulier et chaine de travail, triage, actes cliniques… un vrai moteur d’efficacité et de fluidité. Nous sommes également déjà complètement robotisé.

Notre environnement est à notre image : neuf, lumineux, et pensé pour simplifier la vie. Et surtout, vous nous verrez, nous les propriétaires, sur le plancher à vos côtés : engagés, accessibles et passionnés par l’innovation et les nouveaux projets.

Notre vision : offrir un milieu stimulant, humain et innovant où il fait bon évoluer — tant pour les professionnels que pour les patients.

Vous êtes étudiants et voulez nous découvrir, nous sommes un milieu de stage pour l'Université Laval!

We are a deeptech, healthtech startup. We aim to revolutionize pharmacy operations in hospitals and e-pharmacy warehouses by developing cutting-edge, AI driven robotics technology. We are a strong and skilled team with a big aim to transform the retail pharmacy sector in India through innovation and technology.

Problem we solve :
Chronic patients have long-term medical conditions and manage multiple medications daily, for many years or a lifetime. Juggling numerous medications, dosages and schedules causes confusion leading to missed or incorrect dosages.Improper medication intake worsens their condition, causing more hospital visits, escalated expenses, and potentially fatal outcomes.

Our solution:
We establish our own automated e-pharmacy. To order medicines, users upload their prescription on our app. Patient’s medicines are sorted into sachets, 
printed with name, date, time, and medicine details. Sachets are packaged sequentially as per prescription. The sachets are put in a box and delivered to their house every month.

Comprehensive medication reviews & reconciliation

Chronic condition management (e.g., hypertension, diabetes, COPD)

Disease state education for patients and caregivers

Development of medication-related action plans

Personalized interventions and clinical referrals

Ongoing documentation, dosage adjustments & therapy monitoring

We work with:

Patients managing chronic diseases who need better medication guidance

Healthcare providers and clinics seeking clinical pharmacy expertise

Hospitals and organizations aiming to improve outcomes and reduce preventable admissions

Why Choose Pishon Consulting?
Our practice is built on a foundation of Professionalism, Innovation, Patient-Centered Care, Collaboration, and Integrity. We bring together clinical expertise and compassionate service to empower patients, support providers, and drive safer, smarter pharmaceutical care.

With proven success in reducing hospitalizations, improving quality of life, and streamlining medication use in critical care settings, Pishon is redefining pharmacy consulting for modern healthcare.

Name: Farmacia Santa Barbara
Description:
Quella della Farmacia Santa Barbara è una storia di famiglia che nasce a La Spezia nel 1955. L'assunto che guida il nostro lavoro consiste nell'interpretare ogni cliente-paziente come un'unità specifica propria di bisogni fisiologici differenti, che meritano di essere compresi e valorizzati. Per questo agiamo un ascolto orientato alla “cura” nel rispetto dei ritmi fisiologici di ogni persona. 
In linea con l'Organizzazione Mondiale della Sanità (OMS) intendiamo il concetto di salute come «uno stato di completo benessere fisico, mentale e sociale e non semplice assenza di malattia». 
Crediamo fortemente in un sistema premiante. Cerchiamo persone con forte spirito di squadra che si identifichino nel valore della comunicazione, nella necessità di aggiornarsi continuamente. La Farmacia internamente organizza corsi di formazione, proprio per potenziare la qualità professionale di ogni risorsa, con l'obiettivo di fornire opportunità di crescita individuale.

Organic herbal supplements & nutraceuticals

Research partnerships in herbal pharmacology
